M) humpe, humpeノ アブラダト. ソレデ コンド ソノ, アノhekaci reske taa ソノアブラ toto 'ike taa keehe kara teh taa taa 'ani taa neya mahmicihi tura, mahmicihi ッテ イウンダ, (うん、kuwante. M), tah tura taa 'ee yayne コンド monimahpo ponno poro. ponnn…","translation":"背負って上って来て家へ入って来たのを見ると、クジラの脂だったとさ。クジラ、クジラの脂だったとさ。それから、子どもを育ててその脂を炊いて、保存用に分離して、その孫娘と一緒に、孫娘のことはmahmicihiっていうんだ。(うん、分かります。M) その子と一緒に食べているうちにその娘は少し大きくなった。少し大きくなると、炉ぶちのところへ行っては炉ぶちと自分の背を比べるのだとさ。まだ炉ぶちよりも短い。また少し経ったらまた炉ぶちと自分の背を比べたらもう自分の背のほうが長い。いま炉ぶちより大きくなってもう婿取りができるほどになった。婿取りができるほどになって、それから婿をとってそしてそれからその、暮らしていたがやがてババは死んだとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"さらわれた娘 -84","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at01aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/003#18","text":"“kee hemaka. kahcici ahciahci","translation":"「さあ(魚とりは)終わったよ。婆、","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 3 (言い伝え3)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/33#0","text":"yara kee wa hankata kara teh oh ta an=ama ciki pirika","translation":"樹皮を剥がして曲げ物を作って、そこに（虫を）入れたら良いだろう","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ33 「～へ」「～から」格助詞","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/014#16","text":"nah kii. nukaraha ne'ampe neya hokuhu 'opas tunke 'ene 'an kusu 'an manu. neeteh 'orowa numare teh taa 'orowa taa 'arikihci hosipihci manu.","translation":"という声がした。見ると、その夫が雪の中にいて、いたとさ。そうして起こして、それから一緒に歩いて帰ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ハシ細カラスとカラス","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at14aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/001#28","text":"wahka tunke ene ka an pe nee.","translation":"水の中なぞにいたものだった。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 1 (言い伝え1)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/20#1","text":"nea too kaari wahka oh ta ahah_anihi neanpe too tunke poka iramasinne paye=an.","translation":"その湖から水の中に私が飛び込んだところ、湖の中を、苦も無く歩いていくことが出来た","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ20 動詞の単数・複数２","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/020#157","text":"a=unuhu yaynumwen って言ったとこまで言ったんだな。","translation":"母が具合が悪いって言ったとこまで言ったんだな。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（前半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=20","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#794","text":"hapo, e=yaynumwen? pirka ruwe?","translation":"お母さん、具合は悪い？ いいかい？ お母さん。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#197","text":"“kusu eun yaynumwen'=an wa","translation":"「体を壊していたために","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/007#24","text":"Yoannes, orowano a=teskar utar paye okake ta, Yoannes kusu inne utar oro ta Sinuma itak heasi wa ene ye hi :— Nep eci=nukar kusu nup or ta eci=paye ya? rera aesuyesuye rapenpe nukar kusu ne ya?","translation":"ヨハネの使いが去ってから、イエスは群衆に向かってヨハネについて話し始められた。「あなたがたは何を見に荒れ野へ行ったのか。風にそよぐ葦か。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"7","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/12#584","text":"toy ka ta kaparno rapenpe","translation":"土の上に薄くカヤを","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"供養をしてくれる人を探す墓標（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BE%9B%E9%A4%8A%E3%82%92%E3%81%97%E3%81%A6%E3%81%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%82%8B%E4%BA%BA%E3%82%92%E6%8E%A2%E3%81%99%E5%A2%93%E6%A8%99%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/005#38","text":"neeteh taa 'orowa sapahci manuyke taa tani 'ehahtahci wa sapahci 'ike tani tah hah sukehci manu. sukehci 'ike taa, tani tah horokeypo 'eere, tura 'ehci. 'ipehci 'omantene tani taa re'usi. rewsi teh taa sinke'ikehe taa,","translation":"それから娘たちはユリ根掘りをして帰ってきて、ユリ根を料理したとさ。料理して今度はそれを男に食べさせて、自分も一緒に食べた。しばらく食べてからそこに泊まった。泊まってその翌日、","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"フンドシをとられた話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at05aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/ainudict_bot#674","text":"pirka reusi cise e=eraman","translation":"いい宿屋を君は知っていますか？","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"トピック別アイヌ語会話辞典 非公式bot (@ainudict_bot)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/ainudict_bot/status/1657717400308170752","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/046#22","text":"tura 'ahun teh tani taa, hoski kanne cikaripeh 'ehah'oo 'itanki sanke 'ike taa, 'eere 'ike taa, 'acahcipo 'ee, horo-, monimahpo 'eerehe ne'ampe, 'acahcipo honca sarape(?) 'etaakara manu.","translation":"いっしょに入って、前のように、ご馳走やユリ根の皿を出して、食べさせようと、ババが女に食べさせようと、ユリ根の皿を出してご馳走したとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"牝イヌ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at46aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/002#19","text":"Nen ka Kamuy ko-oripak an kusu ikkewe sak no ayayramsitnere, ayke, ne sarape oknatara anpe e=yaysiporore yakun, tanpe anakne irenka ne ruwe ne.","translation":"不当な苦しみを受けることになっても、神がそうお望みだとわきまえて苦痛を耐えるなら、それは御心に適うことなのです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/019#12","text":"neeteh taa, sanketa sine monimahpo 'an teh taa kiro コシラッタンダト, cehkah kiro, nah karahci. kara kusu kiro karaha nee manu. kiro kara hawehe suukawka hawehe horokewpo nuuhe ダト。","translation":"そして、そのそばに一人の娘がいてクツをこしらえていたんだと、魚皮のクツを、こうして作っていた。クツを作ったとさ。そのクツをはいて逃げようと思ってクツを作っていたのだとさ。クツを作る音が、縫う音が男に聞こえたのだ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"トンコリ娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at19aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/08#2","text":"B: suukawka 'an=kii kusu 'an.","translation":"B: 縫い物をしているんだ。","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第8課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#45","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy (monimahpo,) 'iine'ahsuy pon horokewpo, 'e'ani 'e'ommoho ne'ampe 'aynu monimahpo. nee kusu taa pon 'etuhka tura 'an kusu 'an kusu, simma 'e'ommoho 'esan 'ewooneka kusu 'iki.\"","translation":"「あのね（姉さん）、あのね兄さん、お前の母さんは人間の娘だよ。でも母さんは今カラスの子と一緒にいるから、お前は明日お前の母さんに会いに行きなさい。」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/020/002#14","text":"Iskar emkoho wa kor nispa uymam esan ranke kor hosipi wa","translation":"石狩川の奥のほうから、そこの村長が交易のために度々下って来てはその帰りに","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「チナナサパ」ホッチャリの頭","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N020P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-yukar/02#486","text":"e=esan??","translation":"??","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ポイヤウンペとスマメノコ（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%EF%BE%97%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%9D%E3%82%A4%E3%83%A4%E3%82%A6%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%81%A8%E3%82%B9%E3%83%9E%E3%83%A1%E3%83%8E%E3%82%B3%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/psa/088#4","text":"Ku=ramat anakne wenpe ani esik, Orowa, Sio orun ku=inotu anakne karankeno ek ruwe ne.","translation":"わたしの魂は苦難を味わい尽くし命は陰府にのぞんでいます。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"88","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#41","text":"sio, titioya dasitekite kurete, sono sippo ani kani eun kasi a=kikkik wa oro.. oro wa easir cise or un omare wa en=kore","translation":"塩を父が出してきてくれて、その塩で私をお祓いして、ようやく家へ入れてくれた。","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/15#67","text":"nep ka sio ka pokonka an ruwe","translation":"何か病気にでもなったようなのを","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"子グマをわが子のように育てた女（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%AD%90%E3%82%B0%E3%83%9E%E3%82%92%E3%82%8F%E3%81%8C%E5%AD%90%E3%81%AE%E3%82%88%E3%81%86%E3%81%AB%E8%82%B2%E3%81%A6%E3%81%9F%E5%A5%B3%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1co/014#16","text":"Ramat ani e nunuke ciki, eram-sak nep kor an kur e ye itak ikkew eranpewtek kusu, nekona iki wa e koyayirayke hi ta sinuma anakne Amen ari itak ya?","translation":"さもなければ、仮にあなたが霊で賛美の祈りを唱えても、教会に来て間もない人は、どうしてあなたの感謝に「アーメン」と言えるでしょうか。あなたが何を言っているのか、彼には分からないからです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"14","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/008#133","text":"eram... e... e=resu poka eyaykorampetetne ruwe ne yakka","translation":"お前を育てるにも子育てに苦労したのであったけれど","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ウェンクㇽ　フチ　イレス」貧乏人のお婆さんに育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3373","text":"toan pon sontak sesek pe a=ere wa... eram...","translation":"あの小さい子供に熱いものを食べさせて……","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/037/2#13","text":"oro wa, \"Tenjô no kuni kara chino ame ga furu monogatari (kanna mosir or wa kem apto as)\" ci=numke wa, oya réhe ci=kore wa \"Ama kakeru eiyû no monogatari\" (kanna mosir or péka terke Pon Otasutunkur) ne ci=kar ruwe ne.","translation":"その中から「天上の国から血の雨が降る物語」を選んで、別の名前を付けて「天駆ける英雄の物語」にしました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Akan yúkar geki","dialect":"阿寒","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/017/02#100","text":"suy (hi, GA,) GAKKOU or un","translation":"また､ 学校へ","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"和人の散文説話 ― 継母から殺されかけた姉を救った妹 ―","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou17_02.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#19","text":"oro un ne hi no tama, densinbasira kurai mo takai takasa ga atte tondekita hi no tama ga","translation":"そこへその火の玉電信柱くらいも高い高さがあって飛んできた火の玉がそこへその火の玉、電信柱くらいもの高さがあって飛んできた火の玉が","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#35","text":"utarihi erampokiwen kasioyki, kor an wa kusu néno e=iki kor e=an néno ukokusis iki=an yakne a=karku'utari,","translation":"その親族たちに同情して面倒を見ていたのだから、そのようにお前（妻）がしているのと同じように、みんなが一緒にするならば、私の甥たちが","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/024/3#7","text":"netopake poro wa a=sitoma siri ne sekor ku=yaynu korka, un=kasioyki kur ne yakun, nen ne yakka pirka ruwe ne.","translation":"体が大きくて怖い感じだなと私は思いましたが、私たちを助けてくれる人ならば、誰でも良かったのです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"pon cápe asiknep","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/002/002#71","text":"somo ipereno sinna okay pe ne somo kasioyki p ne hine ene","translation":"ちゃんと食べさせずに、別の家に暮らして、世話もしないとは","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ランコ　カッケマッ」桂の木の女神","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N002P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/018#161","text":"oka=an, umurekkur an=ne kus, po ka a=kor menoko ka a=kor okkay ka a=kor hine,","translation":"私たちは夫婦となったので、子供も生まれ、娘も息子も生まれ、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（後半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=18","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/kitakaze/002#11","text":"えー、そこのオヤジの言うことだな、ku=po umurekkur ...","translation":"息子夫婦と孫たちと、自分の妻と6人で住んでいる(1)","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"語彙（問答・例文 002〜145）","dialect":"名寄","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/名寄","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/34#105","text":"asir umurekkur usa okay pe","translation":"新しい夫婦がいろいろ","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"若夫婦の立派な家（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E8%8B%A5%E5%A4%AB%E5%A9%A6%E3%81%AE%E7%AB%8B%E6%B4%BE%E3%81%AA%E5%AE%B6%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/024/1#7","text":"\"\"wakka us kamuy kosikiru' sekor a=ye tusu anak, pet or ta siyeye kur a=tura wa, inaw neya takusa neya ani ekasi kamuy'oroytak kor, takusa-ehoripi, inaw-ehoripi wa, wenkamuy okewe kusu petne takusa ani kasi a=kik híne, pet or un nérok takusa opitta a=momka.\"","translation":"「『ワッカウシカムイアコシキル wakka-uskamuy a=kosikiru 川の神様の方に振り向く』というトゥス (巫術) は、川に病人を連れて行き、イナウ (木幣) やタクサ (清め草) やらで、おじいさんが神様に祈りの言葉を言いながら、タクサを持って踊り、イナウを持って踊り、悪い神を追い出すために濡れたタクサで病人を叩いてお祓いし、川にそのタクサを全部流す」。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"noya","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/017/002#121","text":"soy wa as aw wa as, kamuy’oroytak ayne","translation":"家の外に立ち、中に立ち、神へ祈りをとなえました。すると","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トランネ　アオナ　トゥラ　オカ　アン」怠け者の父と暮らす","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N017P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/21#77","text":"uko... kamuy'oroytak ne ya","translation":"皆で神に祈ったり","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"スズメの恩返し（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%B9%E3%82%BA%E3%83%A1%E3%81%AE%E6%81%A9%E8%BF%94%E3%81%97%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/041/1#12","text":"Kusuri newa Sirarika kotan un aynu orospe oputta a=uekarire wa kampi ka ta a=sikama kuni ne ani ku=ramu ruwe ne.","translation":"釧路と白糠コタンにあるアイヌのお話し全部を集めて紙上に保存すべきであると私は思います。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"nep kusu...","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#85","text":"ikirokpe oputta rekuci a=tuypa an wa suy soosma=an.","translation":"そいつら全員の首を斬って、また外に出た。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2000/1/05#1","text":"susam pet turasi arki ciki kotan oputta okay nispa petca ta uwekarpa wa kamuynomi ruwe ne.","translation":"シシャモが川をさかのぼって来たら、村中の旦那方が川岸に集まって神に祈るのです。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"5","dialect":"白糠","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/白糠","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/00-1.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#181","text":"irwak utari (tap) irwak utari pókoinne pa yakka,","translation":"親戚の人たちに子が多くても、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#1021","text":"pokoinne=an rapok","translation":"子供がたくさんできました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/002#395","text":"pokoinne=an a korka,","translation":"おおぜいの子宝にめぐまれたが、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"ぶどうづるの輪がトパットゥミを退けてくれた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/007#168","text":"ney ta ekimne=an yakka (as, as) atu i=sipeste wa,","translation":"私がいつ山に行ってもその刀の紐を父が私に下げさせて、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その2）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=6","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/heb/012#12","text":"Tanpe kusu, racici teke sipeste yan,","translation":"だから、萎えた手と弱くなったひざをまっすぐにしなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"12","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/006/001#134","text":"a=sipeste hine paye=an ayne tane sino tuyma paye=an kor","translation":"私の体にしのばせて行った。やがて、ずっと遠くまで行くと","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ヌサコㇿカムイ　イカオピューキ」祭壇を司る神さまが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N006P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/1#2","text":"néa húci ekasi utar basu o pa híne hoskino Siraw-o-i (Siraoi) or un paye wa oro ta Siraoi Aynu Minzoku Hakubutukan nukar. ora cuwan okake ta Nupurpet un Sekisuitê kosirepa ruwe ne. onuman ipe etok ta okake ta tu suy kensyukai ki pa ruwe ne.","translation":"そのフチやエカシたちはバスに乗ってまず白老へ行って、そこで白老アイヌ民族博物館を見ました。 そして昼食後、登別の石水亭に到着しました。 夕食の前後に2回研修会を行いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"húci ekasi kensyû-ryokô ki ruwe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/asirso#334","text":"Siraoi un ku=oman rusuy.","translation":"白老に行きたい。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"成田英敏 (@asirso)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/asirso/status/968227335496323072","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2001/1/09#2","text":"siraoi kotan otta ku an.","translation":"白老町に住んでいます。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"9","dialect":"白老","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/白老","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/01-1.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"akor-itak/009#8","text":"A: ku=irwaki sitakkaneko unukar ka eramuskare p ne ap rammaka e=omanan siri enta an a?","translation":"A: 兄弟よ、長い間会わなかったけれど何事もなくてやってきたのかい。","collection":"アコㇿイタㇰ","document":"第9章","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784905756217","source_slug":"akor-itak"},{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/009#32","text":"Petros newa turano okay utar anakne mokor rusuy wa okay, korka, ne utar i=rammaka mos an ciki, Sinuma kor a=rakur hemhem turano roski wa okay tu aynu hemhem nukar.","translation":"ペトロと仲間は、ひどく眠かったが、じっとこらえていると、栄光に輝くイエスと、そばに立っている二人の人が見えた。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"9","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/07#106","text":"“sone rammaka aynu okkaypo","translation":"「本当にいつも通り??アイヌの若者よ","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"交易に行って針ばかり持ち帰った男（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E3%81%AB%E8%A1%8C%E3%81%A3%E3%81%A6%E9%87%9D%E3%81%B0%E3%81%8B%E3%82%8A%E6%8C%81%E3%81%A1%E5%B8%B0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E7%94%B7%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/015#2","text":"neyke toono mokoro 'ike taa, 'ene'an tarah ダカ kiyehe nee manu.","translation":"それで昼寝をしたとさ。こんな夢を見たのかこう言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"人食いババ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at15aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#61","text":"papuy papuy toono an too an=ukowente","translation":"昼も愛し合いましょう","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/27#3","text":"kunne neyahka toono neyahka hecire kanne oman manu. hempara ka sihtoono taka an=wante ka han kii.","translation":"夜でも昼でも遊びながら行った。（今が）いつか、昼なのかもわからなかった","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ27 疑問詞を用いた疑問表現2","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/002#108","text":"a=yaykokarkar","translation":"突きたてた(?)","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（１）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（１）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#67","text":"a=ki rok awa somo suy kusu sirki ya ka a=eramiskari i=etoko wa Kamuy’otopus a=kor hayokpe uyna hine pirka sike ne yaykokarkar ki p ne korka ney ta pakno atusa=an wa a=tamnospare ki rok awa somo suy kusun humas kuni a=ramu rok awa arekuskonna ar _horikasi a=i=rawkotapu neun katkor pe i=ekira wa ar _herikasi （a=i=ekira）…","translation":"そうするとよもやそうなるとは（思わなかったが）私の前からカムイオトプㇱが私の鎧を取って立派な荷物としてひとまとめにしてしまったのでいつまでも私は裸で刀をふりまわしたけれどまさか（そんな）気配はしなかったのに突然真上から抱え込まれて何者かが私をさらって真上へ（私はさらわれ）霞の天星の天を通り抜ける。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#917","text":"pirka mesi yaykokarkar","translation":"美味しい飯を炊ぐ","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/663652393591017472","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/016/1#5","text":"ne okake ta, Perusya Babironia wente.","translation":"その後に、ペルシャがバビロニアを倒した。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ben Iehuda newa Heburai-itak","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/005#13","text":"Eci turano a=numke Babironia kotan ta okaype eci=ekap ruwe ne; suy, ku=poho ne Markos ne yakka néno ki na.","translation":"共に選ばれてバビロンにいる人々と、わたしの子マルコが、よろしくと言っています。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/006#18","text":"'anayne tani taa, 'osukeh sineh cahse wa san 'ike taa nukara teh taa nukara teh 'orowa cahse wa makan teh 'anayne taa, nii 'otunkehe 'ekuroo, 'ekurehe yaysan koh sine humkayoh 'esani ike,","translation":"するとウサギが一匹走って来て、見えたがすぐまた走って行ってしまった。そうしているうちに木の幹のところが暗くなっていたが、そっちの方からウンカヨお化けが出て来たのだった。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ウンカヨお化け -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at06aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/003/0#2","text":"mosir esani kamuy esani tapkasike","translation":"大地の先の岬、立派な岬、その上に","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"1","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1co/004#17","text":"Tapan ikkewehe kusu. Utarpa oske ta an ku=omap ikipniwkes poho Timoteos eci=orun ku=omante nisa ruwe ne; ney ta ne yakka okay pisno an karisia or ta ku=epakasnu koraci poka, sinuma anakne Kiristo oske ta ku=an wa iki puri eci eskarunte kusu ne.","translation":"テモテをそちらに遣わしたのは、このことのためです。彼は、わたしの愛する子で、主において忠実な者であり、至るところのすべての教会でわたしが教えているとおりに、キリスト・イエスに結ばれたわたしの生き方を、あなたがたに思い起こさせることでしょう。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"4","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#2231","text":"Ratci sirpeker an wa tane sirkamu kinrakur nisatcaot kokira ayne suy yayamkir=an yakun inne utar Eskarunte ataye eraman kuni ku=ramu .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/820875482790961152","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#57","text":"…kusu sanihi ne'ampe, アノー ソノ 'oyasi, cipihi 'ay シタ, 'an manu. ソノ cipihiコンダ 'onnayketa repahci teh taa ソノ hekaci 'utah naa tura teh taarepahci teh taa 'atuy kaata nay 'ohta repahcihi ne'ampe horokewpo アノー 'oyasi taa, neya 'unci 'ohta 'ama tokoho 'ohta 'omanihi ne'ampe 'unci 'okore 'us wa 'isam rewehe 'an manu.","translation":"それから、その娘は逃げたとさ。浜に出ようと下りて行ったら、あのうそのお化け、舟があったとさ。その舟のこんど、中に乗って沖へ出て、子どもたちもいっしょに沖へ出てその海の上に、川に、漕ぎ出して行ったら、男、お化けが、その火を置いて来た所へ行ったが、火はみんな消えてなくなっていたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/05#6","text":"B: tara too kaata cikah renkayne 'okay.","translation":"B: あの湖の上に鳥がたくさんいる。","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第5課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/013#28","text":"Abraham, Isaak, Yakob newa opittano okay ueinkar utar anakne Kamuy mosir ta okay wa, eci utar yaykota soy ta asoyunpare siri eci=nukar ciki, ne hi ta cis anpe hemhem an, nimaki niyorkar hemhem an kusu ne na.","translation":"あなたがたは、アブラハム、イサク、ヤコブやすべての預言者たちが神の国に入っているのに、自分は外に投げ出されることになり、そこで泣きわめいて歯ぎしりする。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"13","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3709","text":"niyorkar","translation":"泣き顔","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/005#12","text":"Ci=kor ikipniwkes irwak ne sekor ku=esanniyo Sirowanos ani takne no eci kusu kampi ku nuyere yara, ayne, onisnisi ku=ki, sama ta, tanpe anakne Kamuy sonno irenka ne sekor, pawetesu ku=ki ruwe ne; ne anpe or ta utumasi somo ki no roski yan.","translation":"わたしは、忠実な兄弟と認めているシルワノによって、あなたがたにこのように短く手紙を書き、勧告をし、これこそ神のまことの恵みであることを証ししました。この恵みにしっかり踏みとどまりなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#37","text":"Nispa utar iruska wa Yaunkursonkokanpi ruska wa, \"wenno cinuye hi cieyayapapu\" sekor nuyere, nisatta kanpi ta anukar nankor.","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/813662698701365248","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/004/3#3","text":"inonno itak a=eraman yakun, kamuynomi=an easkay sekor ku=yaynu. aynu itak patek \"aynu-Bunka\" ne sekor ye utar ka oka. eposokane, aynu itak a=ye easkay yak síno pirka. anak ki korka, aynu itak a=utari porosere ye eaykap.","translation":"祈りの言葉がわかったら、 カムイノミが出来ると私は思う。アイヌ語ばかりが 「アイヌ文化」であると言う人もいる。 なるほど、アイヌ語を言うことが出来ればとてもいい。しかしながら、アイヌ語を私たちの大部分は言うことが出来ない。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Aynu puri","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/012/003#738","text":"utar porosere","translation":"人々の大部分は","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚ ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」ポイヤウンペ イソイタㇰ　火なしに育った、水なしに育った","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N012P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/023/2#15","text":"néwaanpe anakne, sekiyu neya sekitan neya usa oka kaseki-nenryo uhuy kor san nisankatanso sekor a=ye p, taiki or ta poro kaspa kusu a=kar pe ne.","translation":"これは、石炭でも石油でもいろいろな化石燃料を燃やすと出る二酸化炭素と言われるものが、大気に多くなりすぎたために生じるものです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Tikyû-ondanka","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#5518","text":"SEKIYU HAKO a=omare wa, moro NI a=kar wa oro un emo ne yakka nep ne yakka a=omare wa oka=an pe ne awa, sine an to ta ku=kor hapo \"emo sanke. ohaw a=kar_ ro\" sekor hawean kusu ... kusu moro puta ku=caka wa ku=nukar ka somo... nep ka isam. \" hapo, emo anakne nep ka isam wa\" TTE \"makanakne wa isam hawe nap(?) ANO...sekor…","translation":"（芋やかぶなどのもらいものは）石油箱に入れられて、室に入れられて、そこに芋でも何でも入れられていたものだったが、ある日、私の母が「芋を出しなさい。オハウ〔汁もの〕をつくろう」と言うので、私はそうするのに、室の蓋を開いて中を見たけど何も無かった。「お母さん、芋も何も無いよ」って（私が言うと）、「どうして無いって話があるかと思うよ」と母が（言うので）","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/031#356","text":"\"a=onaha［222］ pewre=an ukokusis pewre=an hine anakne ukosinewe=an ka ki wa an... a=amkir nispa ne a p,","translation":"「あなたの父上とは、若い頃に互いに、若い頃に互いに訪問しに行き来していて、私も顔を見知っている長者でしたが、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 21","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=31","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/18#84","text":"ukoikutasa ne ya ukosinewe ne ya","translation":"酒を酌み交わし、訪ね合って","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"あの世の入り口（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%81%82%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%96%E3%81%AE%E5%85%A5%E3%82%8A%E5%8F%A3%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/046#79","text":"nah yee 'ike taa, yaysiyuhte yaysiyuhte 'omantene citokihi 'asinke 'ike taa, 'omayehe 'enkaske wa 'ah teh taa heekopo ko'irahmee teh taa, 'orowa 'oman manu.","translation":"と言ったが、勇気を出してがんばって、玉を出して、フトンの上から掛けて、妹はkoirahmeeして、それから外に出ていったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"牝イヌ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at46aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#14","text":"manu. reekoh_ yaysiyuhte manuyke wa,","translation":"たいそう着飾って、","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#356","text":"irura kusu soyenpa hine asinuma ka a=onaha turano teke a=ani kane i=teke ani p ne kusu teke a=ani kane nusa or ta paye=an akusu","translation":"送るために外に出て私も父と一緒に手をとって父が私の手を取るので手を取って祭壇のところに行ったところ","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/002/002#122","text":"ora tun ne hine sike pa hine irura pa hine","translation":"ふたりで荷物を背負って運んで","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ランコ　カッケマッ」桂の木の女神","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N002P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/14#280","text":"usa an pe a=kore wa a=irura wa","translation":"いろんなものをもらって、送られて","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述 ウエペケレ 和人の殿様にもらわれた男の子","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/102478/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/017#192","text":"wen’isis=an kane (paye=an aku...) payaka=an akus,","translation":"私はひどく怒りながら旅をしたところ","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（前半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=17","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/024/1#22","text":"\"a=satke noya neya noya sinrici neya a=popte wa aku kor, a=honihi arka hi pirka ruwe ne.\"","translation":"「干しておいたヨモギを煎じて飲んだり、ノヤの根を煎じて飲めば腹痛が止まりました」。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"noya","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/18#300","text":"a=ramu aku... inne ... pon sipuyne korka","translation":"思い…大勢の…小さいけれど","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"山奥で暮らす老夫婦と犬（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%B1%B1%E5%A5%A5%E3%81%A7%E6%9A%AE%E3%82%89%E3%81%99%E8%80%81%E5%A4%AB%E5%A9%A6%E3%81%A8%E7%8A%AC%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/031#225","text":"poro serkehe a=haruhu er... e=rura,","translation":"私の肉の大部分をあなたは運び、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 21","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=31","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/020/002#40","text":"usa haruhu a=se kuni p kar hine oraun","translation":"いろいろな食糧も背負えるものを母に作ってもらい、そして","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「チナナサパ」ホッチャリの頭","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N020P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#11","text":"a=haruhu a=kor katkemat a=kare.","translation":"私の（狩りに行く間の）食料を私の妻に作らせた。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/006#18","text":"cep ka nuwekoan wa satsatu.","translation":"魚もいっぱい捕れて干しました。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その1）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=5","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/1#4","text":"Nupkipet (Nukibetu) un umurek utar ene hawan i, \"teeta Nupkipet kotan ta ka cep nuwekoan wa sircuk kor kutu ani cepkoyki=an. ora sirmata kor a=e kuni a=pakare cep ka a=kar a wa. okkayo utar anakne sirmata etok ta kim ta kucacise kar wa or ta rewsi kor matanki ka ki pa p ne a wa. ora yuk neya kamuy neya isoan kor kamihi…","translation":"貫気別の夫婦は次のように言いました。 「昔は貫気別村でも魚が多くいて、秋になるとクトゥ (魚をとる仕掛)で魚取りをした。 それから、冬になると食べるための薫製の魚も作ったよ。 男たちは冬になる前に山に狩小屋を作り、 そこで泊まりながら狩りもしたものだったよ。 また、鹿やら熊やら獲物があると、肉はウェペケレのように村全体へ配られた。 皮は売られたものだったよ。 子供達も自分で、 ウサギのわなやらカケスのわなやらを作ったものだったよ」 と話しました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"húci ekasi kensyû-ryokô ki ruwe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/011/001#80","text":"nuwekoan pe kamuy ne ciki yuk ne ciki nep ne kusu","translation":"獲物に恵まれるのでクマでもシカでもなんでも","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ウラユシウンクㇽ」ウラユシの人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N011P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#5","text":"kuttomo arka cik wakka ku wa itekke ruki no kuttomo uraye. wakka ari kuttomoho uraye cik kuttomo ponno kay riten nankor. o'use wakka ne cik pirka korkay kikinni-wakka ne cik na'a pirka. teeta anakne páse no omkekar hi ta ekasi utar kikinni apaca péka roski. ekasi utar kikinni ari inaw kar wa pirka ibe a=suye wa rataske…","translation":"のどが痛いなら、水を飲んで、飲み込まずにうがいをします。 水でのどを洗ったなら、のどは少しでも治まるでしょう。 普通の水ならいいですが、キキンニのお湯ならさらにいいです。昔は、重い風邪をひいたときは、エカシたちがキキンニを戸口に立てました。 キキンニでイナウを作って、私たちはおいしい食事を炊いて、ラタㇱケㇷ゚でも川端へ流しました。 川端でイナウを立てて、エカシたちはカムイノミもしました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"akor-itak/006#2","text":"A: enkota e=nanuhu uraye.","translation":"A: 顔を洗っておいで。","collection":"アコㇿイタㇰ","document":"第6章","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784905756217","source_slug":"akor-itak"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1ti/005#10","text":"ne kur anakne poho utar respa yakun, atci un utar a=yanto kore yakun, askanne utar cikiri uraye yakun, yayramhekonro utar kaopiwki yakun, siarikiki no opittano okay pirka iki p néno iki yakun, sapaha nuye yan.","translation":"善い行いで評判の良い人でなければなりません。子供を育て上げたとか、旅人を親切にもてなしたとか、聖なる者たちの足を洗ったとか、苦しんでいる人々を助けたとか、あらゆる善い業に励んだ者でなければなりません。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/068/0#44","text":"‘Hinna' sekor a=ye hi ta makanak iki=an pe ne yaka, anime ani a=nukáre easkay kusu néno a=ki kuni i=nisuk ruwe ne.","translation":"たとえば「ヒンナ (ありがとう) 」という時は、手のひらを上に向け上下させますが、これもアニメに取り入れることができるので、そうするようにお願いしました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"\"Gouruden-Kamuy\" oruspe","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/28#1383","text":"hinna ki kane too hosippa","translation":"感謝をしながらずっと帰っていきました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"村長の息子と貧乏人の娘（1988）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E6%9D%91%E9%95%B7%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A8%E8%B2%A7%E4%B9%8F%E4%BA%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881988%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2070","text":"hâpapa hâpapa hinnâ.","translation":"ありがとうございます。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1740133958040551484","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/029/4#11","text":"tonkori ene ne yakkay, oya gakki ene ne yakkay, ratcitara rekte wa okay tek, nempak suy ku=nu yakkay ku=kewtum pirka.","translation":"トンコリでも、別の楽器でも、穏やかに演奏されていて、何回聴いても気持ちがいいのです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"CD \"upopo sanke\"","dialect":"十勝・本別","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#9","text":"wano eusaron ene yayunakotaci=an kane yayturasinot=an nempak","translation":"下座へと灰まみれになりながら一人遊びをしていた。何日","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#15","text":"B: en=mosma, pewre kur utar, oro ta easir ku=amkir wa ku=ekiroran. nempak suy kay uekarpa or ta ku=nukar hi kay an a korkay, ku=koytak hi kay isam. aynuitak usa unci=sinnaramu hi usa, easir ku=eramuan. aynu sinrit ku=kor yakkay ku=eramiskari p patek inne. sisam sukupkur kay Urespa kurabu eyyorot wa, rimse usa ku=ecakok…","translation":"B: 自分以外で若い（同族の）人たちと、そこで初めて知り合って楽しかったです。何度か、集まりなどで（同年代を）見かけることはありましたが、話す機会がなくて。アイヌ語も、差別の歴史もはじめて学びました。アイヌにルーツがあっても、知らないことばかりたくさんあります。和人の学生もウレㇱパクラブに参加していて、踊りなどを教える立場になると熱心に学んでくれました。和人の間にも、私たちの文化に好意的な人がいるということがわかりました。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

Ora suy aynu mosir ta arki yan” sekor kane kamuynomi=an.","translation":"「今までここで本当に辛い目にあわされましたが、これから土産を持たせて神の国へ送りますから、何も思わず真っ直ぐにオオカミの神の所へ行くのですよ。またアイヌの国へ帰って来なさい」と祈りました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Seta-hopunire uwepeker","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/015/010#83","text":"turay wenray=an","translation":"ひどい死に方、悪い死に方をした。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"カムイユカㇻ「フリ　ニッネㇷ゚　チャㇰチャㇰカムイ（フㇺフㇺトリヤテ）」怪鳥フリとミソサザイの神","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N015P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/11#146","text":"toyray wenray _hine","translation":"ひどい死に方をしていた。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"シナ皮を背負ったクマ（1980）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%B7%E3%83%8A%E7%9A%AE%E3%82%92%E8%83%8C%E8%B2%A0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/08#734","text":"sukupkur kewtum uehosi oka ka somo ki.","translation":"大人の気持ちには変わりはないのです。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ユペッの川尻の村の兄弟と沖の国の兄弟（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%A6%E3%83%9A%E3%83%83%E3%81%AE%E5%B7%9D%E5%B0%BB%E3%81%AE%E6%9D%91%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E3%81%A8%E6%B2%96%E3%81%AE%E5%9B%BD%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#15","text":"…i kay an a korkay, ku=koytak hi kay isam. aynuitak usa unci=sinnaramu hi usa, easir ku=eramuan. aynu sinrit ku=kor yakkay ku=eramiskari p patek inne. sisam sukupkur kay Urespa kurabu eyyorot wa, rimse usa ku=ecakoko kor, arikikino ki ru ne. sisam utur ta kay, an=utari kor puri eramaspa p okay hi kay ku=eramuan.","translation":"B: 自分以外で若い（同族の）人たちと、そこで初めて知り合って楽しかったです。何度か、集まりなどで（同年代を）見かけることはありましたが、話す機会がなくて。アイヌ語も、差別の歴史もはじめて学びました。アイヌにルーツがあっても、知らないことばかりたくさんあります。和人の学生もウレㇱパクラブに参加していて、踊りなどを教える立場になると熱心に学んでくれました。和人の間にも、私たちの文化に好意的な人がいるということがわかりました。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/ainu_museum#0","text":"sukupkur karpe","translation":"ことば・もの・こころ","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"ainu_museum (@ainu_museum)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/ainu_museum/status/840132375988248578","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/011/002#162","text":"a=oyanene na kamuy e=ekoypak","translation":"世間の笑いものになるぞ。神々がお前をとがめて、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「シㇼマオッテ」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N011P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#199","text":"a=oyanene p yaykotanka- esina ne kusu a=kor kotanu rekor katu Repunsir ne wa pak utari inne p isam kur a=ne ruwe ne.","translation":"私が嫌いなことは自分の村を隠すことだから（言うが）私の村の名前はレプンシㇼであって私ほど仲間が多い者はほかにいないのだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-uepeker/002#123","text":"usayne i=oyanene an yakka,","translation":"種々 人をばかにしたりするものもありますけれども","collection":"知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）","document":"Iskarputu un Nispa itak","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784832804029","source_slug":"chiri-yukie-uwepeker"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2co/011#25","text":"Re suyne kuwa ani a en=kik an, arsuy ne suma ari a en=piyekar an, re suyne ku mimam-awente ruwe ne, sine kunne-to sine tokap-to ututta oohoy or ta ku=an;","translation":"鞭で打たれたことが三度、石を投げつけられたことが一度、難船したことが三度。一昼夜海上に漂ったこともありました。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"11","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#719","text":"yayesikarunas wa inkaras awa kiraus momanpe asurpe ututta okayas kane okayas.","translation":"気がついてみると、角の生えた牡鹿の耳の間に、私は居たのでした。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1594227274714578944","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"yukie-uepeker/003#133","text":"ari yaynu wa toop útutta sesserke kor an.","translation":"と考えて、 ずっと下座の方でしゃくりあげています。","collection":"知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）","document":"Kemram kamuy nō-tonoho itak","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784832804029","source_slug":"chiri-yukie-uwepeker"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#53","text":"(monimahpo taa) horokewpo taa, tani taa pon horokewpo tura teh taa, 'aacaha tura teh taa sapahci manu, pon horokewpo.","translation":"（娘は）男は、その男の子と一緒に、男の子は父親についてそこへ下りてきたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/30#0","text":"ku=aacaha ene caskumakara wa mitutarike ehunkikara.","translation":"私の父はこのようにお話を語って、孫達を子守していた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ30 「私の兄、君の兄」親族関係の表現","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2ti/002#20","text":"Kor cise onnayke ta owse konkani op newa sirokani op patek okay somo ne, korka, cikuni op newa toytoy op ne yakka okay; sama ta, momokpe kusu aeywanke kunip okay, aeoripakpe kusu aeywanke kuni anpe okay ruwe ne.","translation":"さて、大きな家には金や銀の器だけではなく、木や土の器もあります。一方は貴いことに、他方は普通のことに用いられます。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/Ainu_Ekashina#41","text":"pirka itak aeywanke yakun","translation":"キレイな言葉を使うと","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"アイヌのエカシナ☘️ (@Ainu_Ekashina)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/Ainu_Ekashina/status/2027519112180863294","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#19","text":"naanaha 'asin kusu kara teh 'imuhsay ッテ citoki nah yeepe, tah 'omayehe 'enkaske wa 'ahte teh hohpa teh 'omanihi neya citoki コンダhaaciri manu.","translation":"姉が出ようとした時に、首飾の玉というものを、それを床の上から掛けて出て行ったのだが、その玉が落ちてしまったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#19","text":"kaa wa ahte. ruh... ruhne sitoki sankeyke","translation":"かけた。大きな飾り板をだして","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#32","text":"rani ike taa, hemata 'ohcikepihi 'ampa teh 'arikihci 'ike taa, 'ano monimahpo sanketa 'amahci 'ike taa, 'orowa suy, ciki heriko rikipahci wa 'isam manu.","translation":"下りて来て、何か食器を抱えてやって来て、それで娘のそばにそれを置いて、その後すぐ上って天へ帰って行ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"express-special/001#3","text":"hekaci: hatagoya nee kusu wooyaan mosiri orowa arikihci utah rewsihcihii?","translation":"男の子：旅館だからいろんな国からきた人たちが泊まってたの？","collection":"ニューエクスプレス・スペシャル 日本語の隣人たち I+II","document":"祖母は朝鮮語もロシア語も少しわかった","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560089231","source_slug":"new-express-special-neighbors"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/003#20","text":"ne ramat anakne huskotoyta, Noa okay wa sinuma kar cip a=etokoyki wa an Kamuy ramusiporore ki wa untere rapoketa itakkasi utar ne; ne cip or ta moyo utar, tupesan niw ne utar wakka kusu kasiaopiwki nisa ruwe ne na;","translation":"この霊たちは、ノアの時代に箱舟が作られていた間、神が忍耐して待っておられたのに従わなかった者です。この箱舟に乗り込んだ数人、すなわち八人だけが水の中を通って救われました。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/002#0","text":"Huskotoyta kotan kar Kamuy Aynu mosir kar wa okere okake an kor kanto or un oman ruwe ne.","translation":"昔、国造りの神は人間の世界を作り終えた後、天へ（帰って）いきました。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#3228","text":"Kuani anakne yaunkur ku ne korka aneinkaroonumausi ta kumonrayke ka somo ki no kukotcise anakne otta kamuynomi usa kuki korka annukarus kunip ne ka somo ne .","translation":"私はアイヌだが観光地で働いているわけじゃないし、私の家ではカムイノミやら行ってるけど見世物じゃあない。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/965158369009975296","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/1998/1/07#3","text":"kuani ka kuarikiki wa kumonrayke na.","translation":"私も頑張って働くよ。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"7","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/98-1.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語教材テキスト","浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II"]
column10: ["樺太/西海岸/小田洲","樺太/西海岸/鵜城"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#3","text":"katuhu kara ranke taa kaskepoka mokoro. kaskepoka mokoro 'ike taa, nani yoy horokewpo taa tura mokoroho takara. ranke 'orowa numa ranke taa 'orowa cise 'ohta makan. suy nah 'an ko'omantene 'asin koh 'otakaata san koh, 'otakaata taa, アノー takara horokewpo katuhu ta'ah kara manu. katuhu kara ranke kaskepoka mokoro. mokoro…","translation":"男の人形を作ってはその上に寝た。その上に寝ていたが、すぐにその美男に抱かれる夢を見た。毎晩そんな夢を見て、それから家に帰っていった。また同じように外へ出て、浜に下りて、浜辺で夢に見た男の人形を作ったとさ。人形を作ってその上で寝た。寝たらその夢に見た男がやって来て抱かれる夢をまた見た。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/14#1","text":"neera’anpe eci=nukara kusu eci=mokoroho?","translation":"君達は何かを見たために（嫌になって）寝ているのか？","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ14 「君達が」2人称複数主格","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","ニューエクスプレスプラス アイヌ語"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/千歳","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/019/4#0","text":"Nakagawa Gorôzi","translation":"中川五郎治","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Nakagawa Gorôzi","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"express-new/39#1","text":"kani ku=maci ku=matnepo ren ci=ne wa, NEX Ainu-go ukoytak hawehe c=omare kuni, Nakagawa sensey or wa a=en=nisuk hi, sonno k=eramutuy hine k=eyaykopuntek. kani ka hoskino EX Ainu-go hawehe poronno ku=nu kor ku=kampioroytak ka ki wa, ueepakta aynu itak ku=kateomare p ne. epapakno inne utar, tan asinno a=sanke kampisos ey…","translation":"私、妻、娘の３人で「ニューエクスプレスアイヌ語」の音声を吹き込んで欲しいと中川先生から頼まれたときは、とても驚き、そして嬉しく思いました。私も既に出版されている「エクスプレスアイヌ語」の音声をたくさん聞きながら音読しているうちにだんだんアイヌ語に夢中になってしまったのです。新たに出版されるこの本をできるだけたくさんの人に使っていただき、私のようにアイヌ語好きの人が増え、アイヌ語で会話できる人が増えればいいなと思います。","collection":"ニューエクスプレスプラス アイヌ語","document":"ナレーターからのメッセージ","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086391","source_slug":"new-express-plus-ainu"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アコㇿイタㇰ"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/北東/様似","北海道/南西/千歳","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/011/2#8","text":"tanpa anakne tu pa pakno etoko ta, ne suma kamuy nisuk wa kusukeraypo pirka mat etun pewre kur Obihiro or wa macihi turano arki wa, yayirayke itak ye ruwe ne.","translation":"今年は2年くらい前に、この石の神様に頼んで、そのおかげで良い嫁が見つかった若者が、帯広からその奥さんとともにやってきて、お礼の言葉を言いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"cipsanke","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"akor-itak/001#3","text":"B: Obihiro or en ku=oman ru ne na.","translation":"B: 帯広へ行きます。","collection":"アコㇿイタㇰ","document":"第1章","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784905756217","source_slug":"akor-itak"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#25","text":"neyke tani taa monimahpo taa, 'asin teh taa 'isam. 'isam 'ampa teh 'ahun 'ike taa, 'uhcinke ('ohcikeh) hemata ka 'oro'oo teh taa, 'ampa wa 'ahun manu. taa,","translation":"それでその娘は出て行った。それから(食物を)もって入って来て、食器か何かに入れて、持って入って来たとさ。それで、","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#27","text":"renkayne kara omantene tani, ohcikeh_","translation":"作ると、今度はお膳を出して","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#198","text":"hopuni=an onkami=an aokay ne yakka neyta pakno ne yakka nupuri kes un kamuy utar a=oyra somo ki kuni h_i ramma a=okanomi kuni h_i osino a=koytak.","translation":"私は起き上がって祈りを捧げ、いつまでも山裾に住むカムイたちを忘れるつもりがないこと、いつも供養をするつもりであることを、後から（彼らに）述べた。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/04#406","text":"i=okanomi wa i=kore yak pirka na”","translation":"私を拝んでおくれ」","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"クマと一緒に逃げた娘（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%E3%81%A8%E4%B8%80%E7%B7%92%E3%81%AB%E9%80%83%E3%81%92%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/004#60","text":"neyke tani taa payehci yayne taa sine ruu(?) payehcihi ne'ampe ta, sine 'ahcahcipo ta peray kusu 'an manu.","translation":"それでどんどん行ったら、一本の道をずっと行ったら、一人のババが魚を釣っていたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/07#1","text":"taranoka cikah utah nah ene payehcihi?","translation":"あの鳥達はどこへ行くの？","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ７ 疑問詞を用いた表現２","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1co/012#23","text":"orowa, pokasnu a=eoripak kuni ari a=yaynu awehe kusu, ne okaype kasuno eoripak ruwe ne; ayke, a=nukar kuni ipokas pe citomtere ruwe ne; korka, siretokpe anak citomtere kunip somo ne na:","translation":"わたしたちは、体の中でほかよりも恰好が悪いと思われる部分を覆って、もっと恰好よくしようとし、見苦しい部分をもっと見栄えよくしようとします。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"12","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/yukar/00#441","text":"pokasnu pa kor pe ne hi ne ya","translation":"同じくらいの年の者なのでしょうか","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"シンヌタㇷ゚カの勇者と腹違いの兄弟（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%B7%E3%83%B3%E3%83%8C%E3%82%BF%E3%87%B7%E3%82%9A%E3%82%AB%E3%81%AE%E5%8B%87%E8%80%85%E3%81%A8%E8%85%B9%E9%81%95%E3%81%84%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/051/2#46","text":"Uskes un aynu utar patek henne ne, mosirkes un aynu utar usa yaysinritnuyna ka henne ki yakkay ratcino urespa easkay cik sonno pirka nankor ari ku=yaynu.","translation":"函館にいるアイヌの人たちだけでなく、道南にいるアイヌの人たちも自分の先祖を隠したりしなくても健やかに暮らすことができれば素晴らしいと思う。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Yaunmosir mosirkes or peka apkas=as","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"hokkaido-minzokugaku/2/001#12","text":"an ru an a ari humas kan, ratcino, hoyuppa-an cikanak i-nospa","translation":"いるのであるかと思いながら静かに、走ったならば私を追いかける","collection":"北海道民族学","document":"クマの追跡を逃れた話","dialect":"十勝（本別）","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://hes.official.jp/images/kaishi_pdf/02/02-06takahashi.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/yukar/02#62","text":"ratcino ... ratcino paye=an... payeka=an easkay kuni ari an pe","translation":"無事に行くことができますようにと","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"カッコン鳥のかぶと（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%82%8A%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%AB%E3%83%83%E3%82%B3%E3%83%B3%E9%B3%A5%E3%81%AE%E3%81%8B%E3%81%B6%E3%81%A8%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#48","text":"nah kiihi ne'ampe taa, monimahpo taa 'o'ara notankamsoo'ike monimahpo taa neya チチオヤ 'aacaha taa tura 'ahun manu. 'aacaha tura 'ahui ike taa pirika sohkara kasketa 'aarehci kun nah 'eramanuhu ne'ampe weesiri ko'asi, toyre 'ukurupus sohkara, tah sohkara kasketa 'aarehci manu.","translation":"そうしたら、その娘は、その片方の頬に傷のある娘は、その父親、つまり自分の父親と一緒に入ったとさ。父親と一緒に入って、いいゴザの上に座らせるだろう、と思っていると、凍り付いた、冷たいぬれたゴザを敷いて、そのゴザの上に座らせたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/005/002#103","text":"nani e=hopunire wa nitne inaw poka e=koasi","translation":"あなたはすぐに送り返して、魔神に捧げるイナウだけを立てて、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「スルクマッ　チクペニカムイ　イカオピューキ」トリカブトとエンジュのカムイが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N005P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/9/001#10","text":"neanpe suy san. otaka wa? makan uta op ku na koasi te","translation":"そいつ（＝化物）がまたやってきた。浜から山に来た者たちは槍や弓を持って","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"カワウソのばけもの（エサマン チャラハウ）","dialect":"樺太（西海岸南部・多蘭泊）","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸","region":"樺太","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/73720/08_sakaguchi.pdf","source_slug":null}]

'anoka kayki mawa'an kusu 'okayan, hemata 'ehci wa 'okayahci?\"","translation":"「ねえ、一体この家の娘たちは、何を食べているんだろう？ わしは腹が空いたわい。娘たちは何を食べているんだろう？ 」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/yamada/001#4","text":"ipé ané: ranke okáyan manu.","translation":"食事をして暮らしていた。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"口頭文芸（ある村の物語）","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#4621","text":"Anerampetek yakne ansitoma p isam sekor an pe ne yakun Tokapci otta ne yakka Kioto ne yakka cihomapsakno okayan ruwe ne na .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1228461533694349312","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/025#39","text":"'ani ike\" taa, cehkoyki koh 'ehci, niina koh kuruhci, cehkoyki'an 'ohta taa, monimahpo ceh sukere kusu nah yeehe ne'ampe monimahpo ceh suke 'ike taa, pirikano cehkara ranke, suke 'ike, 'eere 'ike トッテモ 'etumne manu.","translation":"いっしょにいて、魚をとっては食べ、マキをとってはくべして、ある時魚をとってきて娘がそれを料理しましょうと言ってご馳走をつくって、おいしいご馳走をつくって、煮て、食べさせたが、男は食べたがらなかったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"フキとりの話 -88","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at25aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/024#140","text":"hine turano an=an. i=arsoke oma wa a=sukere wa ukasuy a=e i=paro oske kor","translation":"一緒に暮らした。私の向かいの座にいて私は炊事をさせて、助け合って私は食べ、私の口に食べさせながら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・山田慎太郎聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 17","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=24","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#432","text":"a=sucihi a=sukere somo ki no","translation":"おばあさんには炊事をさせずに","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/078/1#11","text":"Ora na tukko ka rerko ka oro ta án=an rápok ta utar ka nani pirka kusu, a=kotánuhu a=kosírepa ruwe ne. Nep ka a=ye ka somo ki no arpa=an pe ne kusu cise soy ta \"Ék=an na ék=an na\" sekor hawean=an akusu, a=macíhi cisoyekatta wa ukataray=an ranke cís=an rok cís=an rok. Nani kotan or un utar opitta a=hotúyekar wa \"Tapne k…","translation":"あと二、三日村に残っている間にみんな直ぐに元気になったので村に帰りました。なにも言わずに出ていたものなので家の外で「帰ったよ、帰ったよと言うと妻が飛び出してきて二人抱き合って泣きました。すぐに村人を呼んでことの次第を説明すると「そうだそうだ」と言いながら頷いていました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Seta-hopunire uwepeker","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#5728","text":"tukko","translation":"二日","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/15#926","text":"tukko rerko e=tura an=an wa","translation":"２、３日はあなたと一緒にいて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"沖の国から逃げてきた陸の国の女（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E6%B2%96%E3%81%AE%E5%9B%BD%E3%81%8B%E3%82%89%E9%80%83%E3%81%92%E3%81%A6%E3%81%8D%E3%81%9F%E9%99%B8%E3%81%AE%E5%9B%BD%E3%81%AE%E5%A5%B3%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#12","text":"tu monimahpo, tu horokewpo, 'eh teh taa neya monimahpo 'utah taa, nuhsu 'ani kusahci, sikenii 'ah taa haarehci teh taa kusahci, taa payehci yayne taa, cikah 'utah taa rih poka 'ahkasahci manuyke taa, 'ene yehci manu.","translation":"娘が2人、男が2人、やって来て、その娘をみんながソリで運んで、そのソリのひもを落して、また運んで、やって来たのだが、その道中、トリたちが空を飛んで、こういって鳴いたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/29#0","text":"oyasi setaha caruhu onne etuhka hemata taka haarehci.","translation":"お化けの飼い犬の口の中に（2羽の）カラスが何かを落とした","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ29 「私の犬、君の犬」所有の表現2","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","ウポポイ職員インタビュー"]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/5#1","text":"◆ Aynu-go-pen-kurabu or un Kayano Sirô anakne, te wano san'insen or ta rikkôho ki kusune. aynu utari nep ne yakka kokkai or ta cáranke easkay kuni rikkôho ki sekor ye wa an.","translation":"◆アイヌ語ペンクラブの萱野志朗は、これから参院選に立候補するつもりです。 アイヌ民族が何でも国会で議論できるように立候補する、と言っています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Topikkusu (usa oruspe)","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#12","text":"A: nekon e=yaynu wa, Urespa kurabu e=numke ru tapan a?","translation":"A: どういう思いからウレㇱパクラブを選びましたか？","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2jn/001#1","text":"Ekasi anakne sonno ku=omap a=nunke wa an siwentep kor poho utar tura kane oro ta kampi omante na; owse kuani patek somo ne, korka, sonno anpe eraman opittano okay utar ka e omap ruwe ne;","translation":"長老のわたしから、選ばれた婦人とその子たちへ。わたしは、あなたがたを真に愛しています。わたしばかりでなく、真理を知っている人はすべて、あなたがたを愛しています。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#729","text":"nunke. nunke","translation":"…を選ぶ","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#3","text":"neeteh taa 'okaaketa taa, ウン monimahpo 'isam 'okaaketa taa, horokewpo taa nukara 'ike taa, muhru wa 'empoke taa macihi hemata 'an'ama haa, nah 'anramu. nukaraha ne'ampe kosonto soma. pitataha ne'ampe niinum tuhpis 'ohta 'ay manu.","translation":"それからしばらくして、妻が出かけていない時に後で、男はそれを見て、枕の下に妻は何を置いたのだろう、と思った。見ると晴れ着にくるんだものだった。開いてみると木の玉が２つそこにあったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/17#22","text":"soma oma iwatarap an","translation":"おしめをした赤ん坊がいました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"山で拾った赤ん坊（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%B1%B1%E3%81%A7%E6%8B%BE%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E8%B5%A4%E3%82%93%E5%9D%8A%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/0#3","text":"Sawai Tomeno húci (88) (Tokati, Honbetu-tyô) newa Kuzuno Tatuzirô ekasi (87) (Hidaka, Sizunai-tyô) anakne, 10 cup 31 to or ta néan syô eunkeray.","translation":"沢井トメノフチ (88) (十勝、本別町)と葛野辰次郎エカシ (87) (日高、静内町)は、10月31日にその賞をもらいました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"”Aynu Bunka-syô” a=sapte","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/002#22","text":"tyo.. tyosarerutte yuu koto dooyuu koto da, wasureta, kor husigidana sekor ku=yaynu kor apkas hi ta,","translation":"「ちょされる（悪さされる）」という言葉、アイヌ語でどういうんだ。忘れてしまった。そうしながら、不思議だなと思いつつ歩いているとき","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト2・2015年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/017#13","text":"neyke tani ne'ampe nanuhu 'o('is)sikaarimpa, 'oysikaarimpa nankoro 'ohkayo 'utah pateh taa tani taa cise 'ohta 'an teh, tani neya monimahpo caro'oyki niina, yuhkii manuyke taa 'ehci manuyke taa re monimahpo taa 'ehci manu.","translation":"それで今、まんまる顔の男だけ娘たちと一緒に家にいて、食べさせて、マキとりをして狩をして、食べて一緒に3人の娘も食べていたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"丸顔スキー","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at17aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/003#8","text":"ehci. yuhkii koh ehci, kihci ani","translation":"食べ猟をしては食べ、そうして","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 3 (言い伝え3)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/049/0#6","text":"1997 pata, Kushiro-Ainu-go-no-kai kar wa, utari turano, Kushiro un aynuitak usa aynupuri usa a=eyam wa, nekon pokay ki wa pirasa kuni arikiki ruwe ne.","translation":"1997年には、釧路アイヌ語の会を作り、その人達と共に、釧路のアイヌ語やアイヌ文化を大切にして、何とかして広めるべく努力しました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Matsumoto Shigeyoshi nispa","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/001/03#264","text":"otasut'unkur nek on pokay","translation":"オタスッウンクㇽは何とかして","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"沢井トメノさんが語る ツッポㇰクㇱペッ ”cuppokkuspet”","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou01-03.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#28","text":"okay an nankor_ na. nekonna pokay i=kaocaska wa i=kore nankor.”","translation":"たくさんいらっしゃるでしょう。何とか私を助けさせてください」","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

Nep kusu ene ohor no en=kasiopiwki somo ki ruwe? nep kusu ku=cis hawe anu somo ki ya?","translation":"わたしの神よ、わたしの神よなぜわたしをお見捨てになるのか。なぜわたしを遠く離れ、救おうとせず呻きも言葉も聞いてくださらないのか。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"22","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/020/006#19","text":"ene iwan nay ka aka… a=kama hine ekimne=an hi an”","translation":"その六つの沢も私は越えて狩りにきてしまった」","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「イエマカアトゥサレ　メノコ」もろ肌を脱いだ女","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N020P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/019/1#14","text":"apehuci neya, wakkauskamuy neya, sirkorkamuy neya, kamuy utar or un ene hawan i;","translation":"火の神や、水の神や、樹木の神などのカムイたちにこのように言いました;","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"cip-sanke","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/22#112","text":"apehuci a=ne ruwe ne","translation":"火の神が私なのだ。","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述カムイユカㇻ「雷神の怒り（RITTUNNA / kanna kamuy）」","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900122337/S21857148-25-P191-NAK.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#6435","text":"sirkunne hi ta k=apkas kor apekes ku=kor wa k=apkas yakun apehuci kamuy epunkine wa en=kore wa...","translation":"あたりが暗くなった時に、私は歩いて……火の燃えさしを持って歩けば、火の神様が守ってくださって……","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#7","text":"ku ani a=epunpa wa, corpoki a=kus kor kira=an w_a, hemesu=an ayne, <ne> erikoma wa arpa p pet ne kusu, kari hemesu=an ayne, inu=an akusu, inne topaha i=kesampa wa arki hawe as. pet turasi ki hine, top sar eukamu wa arikinne ironne p ne kusu, oro pak arki wa oro wa","translation":"弓で（竹の）先端をもち上げて、その下を通って逃げ、山を上って行くと、高い所から流れて来ている川なので、それに沿って上って行って、耳をそばだてると、大勢の人間が私達を追いかけてくる声が聞こえる。川を上って追いかけて来ると、竹やぶがとても深くなっているので、そこまでやって来て、","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#196","text":"…tamkur hopuni nuy ne i=eonuyta- pukte kane tek us cikap ne tek us tori ne arurako- cuppa=an wa humne an kor mosir so kurka a=cerana- suototke awa kina kina corpoki emuketerke","translation":"怒れる神腹を立てた神であるから何十の剣撃幾十の剣撃を私に投げつけるのだが私は刀の間をそよ風のようにひらりと避け天へ飛び去る。（すると）下を通る太刀影は飛び散る炎のように上を通る太刀影は舞い上がる炎のように炎を燃やして私を追うが手の生えた鳥のように手の生えた鳥のように私は翼を羽ばたかせてある時は私は国土の上に降りて急降下して青草の草の下へもぐり走る。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nakamoto-upaskuma2/001#17","text":"orowa ne cikuni corpoki ta k=arpa wa ku=inkar akusu pon nata an kusu sonno k=eyaykopuntek.","translation":"そこで、その木の下に行って見ると、小さなナタがあったので本当に嬉しかった。","collection":"アイヌの知恵・ウパㇱクマ2","document":"KU=KOR SETA","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784880242354","source_slug":"upaskuma-2"}]
