column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/005#30","text":"Ci=kor ekasi kor Kamuy anakne cikuni or ta eci=eokte wa rayke Yesu hetopo-siknure nisa ruwe ne.","translation":"わたしたちの先祖の神は、あなたがたが木につけて殺したイエスを復活させられました。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/023/008#205","text":"nea a=kor kamuy turano a=eokte hine ora nea","translation":"私の家の守り神を一緒壁に掛けて、それからその、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケトゥペトノ　イカオピューキ」ハリガネムシに助けられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N023P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-358/3/1#175","text":"heru ram ari ne tampakop nikitay eokte korka","translation":"ただ念じるだけでその煙草入れを木の梢に引っ掛けたのですが、","collection":"アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","document":"金田一京助宛ノート散文説話「金の煙草入れ（konkani tampakop）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/109482/358-p015.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-ainu-research-issues"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#7","text":"nah yee teh taa, herikoh 'okasura wa rikinke manu. 'okasura wa rikinkehe ne'ampe taa, 'annayne taa, rikiy yayne kiroho hosihi pitahke manu. kiroho シモ-ho pitahke 'ike taa, 'atuhu pitahke 'ike taa, muyehe ne'ampe taa rawta haaciri manu, rawta.","translation":"と言って、上の方へ押して天に上らせた。押して上らせたら、しばらく上って行ったが、くつのひもがほどけたとさ。くつひもがほどけたから、結んだら下に落ちてしまったとさ、下へ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/006#94","text":"irammakaka sat poro muyehe a=kar wa,","translation":"私は、いい具合に乾いた大きい箕を作って、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その1）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=5","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/024/003#123","text":"nea pon menoko tarpe muyehe eporosike ki wa sap wa","translation":"その若い娘は茣蓙を束ねた大きな荷物を持って下りてきて","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケレㇷ゚ノイェ　ケレㇷ゚トゥㇽセ」トリカブトとオオトリカブト","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N024P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/0#5","text":"Sawai Tomeno húci anakne teeta puri pirkano eraman húci ne. teeta itak ene ne yakkay, ucaskoma ene ne yakkay eraman kusu, kenkyū ki kan okay utar cakoko aru ne. kampi ka ta (\"Sawai Tomeno Tokati Honbetu aynu go bunrui ziten\" or ta kay) néokay pe poronno a=nuye wa an.","translation":"沢井トメノフチは、アイヌ文化をきちんと知っているフチです。 昔の言葉でも、言われ話でも知っているので、研究をしている人たちに教えました。 紙の上に (『沢井トメノ 十勝本別アイヌ語分類辞典』にも) たくさん書かれています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"”Aynu Bunka-syô” a=sapte","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/001/03#21","text":"teeta ucaskoma anakne","translation":"昔からの言い伝えによりますと","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"沢井トメノさんが語る ツッポㇰクㇱペッ ”cuppokkuspet”","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou01-03.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#357","text":"nah an ucaskoma.","translation":"こういう言い伝えだ。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1co/004#7","text":"Hunna eci=ue-ecutkore ruwe he an? Sama ta, somo a=kor anpe hemanta eci=kor ruwe he an? Korka, akorep ne ciki, hemanta kusu somo ne anpe ikore an néno eci=yayomonnure ruwe he an?","translation":"あなたをほかの者たちよりも、優れた者としたのは、だれです。いったいあなたの持っているもので、いただかなかったものがあるでしょうか。もしいただいたのなら、なぜいただかなかったような顔をして高ぶるのですか。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"4","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#5575","text":"ku=matnepo ikore… ikor ponno en=kore sekor hawas wa k=eyaykopuntek akusu ponno patek en=kore wa k=eyayrampokiwen","translation":"私の娘がお金をくれるという話で喜んでいると、すこししかくれなくて残念に思った。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"onsei12/07/0#78","text":"sapte wa ikore yan","translation":"出して下さい．」","collection":"アイヌ語音声資料","document":"村焼き国焼き1 KOTAN SITCIRE MOSIR SITCIRE 1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://waseda.repo.nii.ac.jp/search?search_type=2&q=1636","source_slug":"ainu-audio-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/013/3#7","text":"néno an yakun, osoma=an ka okuyma=an ka eaykap kusu, sem or ta an cikuni a=kor wa ek=an wa, ani néa si nupuri a=kikkik, a=otkeotke ruwe ne korka, rupus wa an pe ne wa, sonno niste p ne kusu, sorekusu ru so a=kónere pakno, ne cikuni a=kaye pakno, yupke no a=kikkik, a=otkeotke ayne, ne nupuri a=kónere wa okere.","translation":"これでは、大きい方も小さい方もできないので、私は物置にある棒を持って来て、それでその糞の山を叩き叩き、突き突きしたのですが、凍っていてすごく堅くなっているので、それこそ便所の床を壊してしまうくらい、その棒を折ってしまうくらい激しく叩き叩き、突き突きしたあげく、その山を壊してしまいました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"toranne sísam","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1ti/001#5","text":"Korka, ne ikaspaotte eramusinnere anpe anak tur-sak sanpe wano omap hi oasinke anpe hemhem, a=otkeotke somo ne an kewtura kor pe hemhem, kankapkapeka sak no an eysokor hi atte anpe hemhem ne ruwe ne:","translation":"わたしのこの命令は、清い心と正しい良心と純真な信仰とから生じる愛を目指すものです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/11#1724","text":"soksoki otkeotke rusuypa hawe ene oka’","translation":"突きたいというのですか』","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"伝染病の神の息子とねたむ人間たち（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BC%9D%E6%9F%93%E7%97%85%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A8%E3%81%AD%E3%81%9F%E3%82%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","アイヌ語教材テキスト","トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典"]
column10: ["北海道/北東","北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/北東/様似","北海道/北東/白糠","北海道/北東/釧路","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#5","text":"…pirka. teeta anakne páse no omkekar hi ta ekasi utar kikinni apaca péka roski. ekasi utar kikinni ari inaw kar wa pirka ibe a=suye wa rataskep ene ne yakkay petca en kor wa momte. petca péka inaw roski wa ekasi utar kamuynomi usa ki.","translation":"のどが痛いなら、水を飲んで、飲み込まずにうがいをします。 水でのどを洗ったなら、のどは少しでも治まるでしょう。 普通の水ならいいですが、キキンニのお湯ならさらにいいです。昔は、重い風邪をひいたときは、エカシたちがキキンニを戸口に立てました。 キキンニでイナウを作って、私たちはおいしい食事を炊いて、ラタㇱケㇷ゚でも川端へ流しました。 川端でイナウを立てて、エカシたちはカムイノミもしました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-dict/061#59","text":"petsama; petsamake ta; petca","translation":"川辺；川辺で；川岸","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"水","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2000/1/05#1","text":"susam pet turasi arki ciki kotan oputta okay nispa petca ta uwekarpa wa kamuynomi ruwe ne.","translation":"シシャモが川をさかのぼって来たら、村中の旦那方が川岸に集まって神に祈るのです。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"5","dialect":"白糠","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/白糠","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/00-1.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#70","text":"rapoke ta a=kor katkemat soyne wa isam.","translation":"その間に私の妻は外に出て行ってしまった。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/002#18","text":"Suy, ne okokko anakne sak an kor sino sirsesek kor rapoke ta, ne okokko ur piru wa an yakun ne anpe a=ye hi ene an hi:―","translation":"また、ヘビが夏になりとても暑い間、ヘビが皮を剥ぐとこのように言われました。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/008#11","text":"B: sirawoy un sisam oruspe ku=nu rapoke ta, hoskino aynu utar okay wa, samorun sisam arki okake ta, sisam oro wa toy ka a=eikka hi ponno ponno patek ku=nu. kotan ka a=tupte hi hene, sisam irenka ari, usa okay pe a=eaykap hi hene ku=nu.","translation":"B: 白老の和人の歴史を教わるなかで もともとアイヌの人がいて 本州から和人が入ってきて 和人から土地を奪われたことを 少しだけ習いました 住む場所を制限されたとか いろいろなことを禁止されたことも聞きました","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　シッチャリ【アイヌ語・白老方言】","dialect":"白老方言","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/白老","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=28ul8k88Srg","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#163","text":"ruasir(?) un 108 cironnup kamuy a=koonkami tuwan onkami rewan onkami a=ukakuste kane 109 sipini=an wa soyosma=an.","translation":"続いて（？","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#196","text":"iruska kamuy siyante kamuy ne p ne kusu tuwan tam cipa rewan tam cipa i=koterkere ki p ne korka tam utur peker_ rera ne a=mawnoyere kantokotor a=kosietaye ra kus tamkur rapse nuy ne rik kus tamkur hopuni nuy ne i=eonuyta- pukte kane tek us cikap ne tek us tori ne arurako- cuppa=an wa humne an kor mosir so kurka a=ceran…","translation":"怒れる神腹を立てた神であるから何十の剣撃幾十の剣撃を私に投げつけるのだが私は刀の間をそよ風のようにひらりと避け天へ飛び去る。（すると）下を通る太刀影は飛び散る炎のように上を通る太刀影は舞い上がる炎のように炎を燃やして私を追うが手の生えた鳥のように手の生えた鳥のように私は翼を羽ばたかせてある時は私は国土の上に降りて急降下して青草の草の下へもぐり走る。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/07#103","text":"tuwan onkami rewan onkami akuka... an=ukakuste","translation":"何度も拝礼をしました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"交易に行って針ばかり持ち帰った男（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E3%81%AB%E8%A1%8C%E3%81%A3%E3%81%A6%E9%87%9D%E3%81%B0%E3%81%8B%E3%82%8A%E6%8C%81%E3%81%A1%E5%B8%B0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E7%94%B7%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#4","text":"ne'ampe sineh taa 'arikirihi mesu 'ike taa ciire teh 'ee manu. sineh 'are'anno 'an. sineh 'arikirihi.'orowa macihi nukara kusu taa, アノー neya kosonto kocupu teh taa suy 'unci 'onne 'ociwe manu.","translation":"それで、そのひとつ、半分の１つを取って焼いて、つぶして、それを食べたとさ。もう一つはそのままにしておいた。一つ、半分の一つはそれから妻が見たので、その晴れ着で包んでまた火へ投げ込んだとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#360","text":"arikirihi enciw","translation":"片方の血統は人間","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1569582525579952128","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/28#1","text":"an=ponhekaci arikirihi nanuhu poniwne yupihi nanuhu neeno an.","translation":"私の幼子の顔の片側は、年下の兄のようだった。","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ28 「私の手、君の手」所有の表現1","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#1","text":"mata an kor omkekar utar poronno okay. ekattar omkekar wa e'ikostek sések kaspa cik pirkano pakehe yamka yan.","translation":"冬になると、風邪ひきさん達がたくさんいます。 子供たちが風邪をひいて、あんまり熱が高すぎると危ないので、ちゃんと頭を冷やしなさい。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-dict#92","text":"taan compa tumpu anak eikostek pon kaspa.","translation":"この事務室はあまりにも小さすぎます。","collection":null,"document":"ウポポイのアイヌ語表示辞典","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://nam.go.jp/wp/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/5c5e1f24922be5ef27295ed7cbba5e48.pdf","source_slug":"upopoy-ainu-language-signage-dictionary"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2016/2/22#3","text":"eikostek pase tasum","translation":"あまり重い病気には","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"22","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/H28ainuradiotext_vol.2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/南西/千歳"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/002#25","text":"B: sonno k=eramasu p, horippa mukkur yukar ne kusu, tanpe ekiroran wa eramaspa yak pirka. ku=kor huci anak yaunmosir ta siko yakka aynu puri eramiskari wa kusu, sinuye sekor an pe sitoma korka, pon hi wano amkirpa yakun sitoma ka somo ki nankor sekor ku=yaynu. Upopoy or ta arki wa, usa usa amkirpa wa, yayekota ka kor p…","translation":"B: 特に好きなのがアイヌの踊り、口琴、英雄詞曲なので、これを楽しんで好きになってもらえたら。私の祖母は、北海道に生まれてもアイヌ文化を知らなかったので、入墨というものを恐く思いましたが、小さいころから知っていれば恐いと思わないだろうと思います。ウポポイに来ても、色々なことを知って、来場者にとっては自分の文化だったりちがったりするけど、ルーツに関係なくだれでも、日本にアイヌ文化があることを知って、そうしたらその人の地元の文化のことも改めて良く理解することができると思います。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　ケチ【アイヌ語・千歳方言】","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/jsYjmkgV4v8?si=BUIOa-vg4yYCjKB7","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/Ainu_Ekashina#74","text":"poronno yairaike kur anakne ekiroran kor sikunu easikai","translation":"たくさん感謝する人は 楽しく生きることができる。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"アイヌのエカシナ☘️ (@Ainu_Ekashina)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/Ainu_Ekashina/status/2033679706386510017","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-benron/27/00#19","text":"…omo ki, ciukokeske a=ekarkar ka somo ki. ene an kotan ene an mosir kar rusuy kor an hi a=eraman nankor. sisam kar 知里 moymoykenoka, 知里漫画 a=nukar wa, 不幸 萌え a=ekiroran wa ne yakun, 知里 katkemat cipacipa a hi, a=kar easkay ya?","translation":"多くの理不尽を感じながら、すべてあきらめざるを得なかった人を持ち上げて、ただ「素晴らしかった、その心を知ろう」と言っていて何になるのでしょう。知里さんは、本当はアイヌ語が消えないことを望んでいた、アイヌが見下されない、迫害されない。このような国、このような世界を望んでいたことは明らかです。 和製知里映画、和製知里漫画を見て不幸萌えに浸って、なにか知里さんの望みが実現するのでしょうか。","collection":"アイヌ語弁論大会","document":"知里幸恵生誕120年に思う事","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/itakanro/files/r05_pg_22.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-speech-contest"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/022/1#4","text":"6 cup 1 to ta Doitu turano Sauziarabia, 3 to ta Itaria turano Ekuadoru, 7 to ta Aruzentin turano Ingurando, Sapporo-dômu or ta uwetusmak ruwe ne.","translation":"6月1日にはドイツとサウジアラビア、3日にはイタリアとエクアドル、7日にはアルゼンチンとイングランドが、札幌ドームで互いに競い合いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Sapporo or ta an Wârudokappu","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/act/010#1","text":"Kaysaria kotan ta Kornirios ari an rehe kor Itaria ari a=porse ikiri or ta kotuk asikne kotumi-kor kur esapane kur an, Sinuma anakne Kamuy kooripak,","translation":"さて、カイサリアにコルネリウスという人がいた。「イタリア隊」と呼ばれる部隊の百人隊長で、","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"10","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynu_sumari#18","text":"Itaria Mosir otta ka mean humi an!","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"AynuSumari (@aynu_sumari)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynu_sumari/status/804727852230934528","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/14#50","text":"masar uturu a=koetaye wa","translation":"草原の間に引っ張りあげて","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述 ウエペケレ 和人の殿様にもらわれた男の子","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/102478/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#61","text":"hoski yan cip makun masar a=koetaye tutanu yan cip sanke masar a=koetaye tutanu yan cip sat ota ka a=koetaye tutanu yan cip teyne ota ka a=koetaye tutanu yan cip orirsitayki","translation":"先に上陸する船は奥の浜辺に引き上げられ次に上陸する船は手前の浜辺に引き上げられ次に上陸する船は乾いた砂浜の上に引き上げられ次に上陸する船は湿った砂浜の上に引き上げられ次に上陸する船は波に打たれている。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/21#190","text":"oka=an katu i=koetaye an hine","translation":"いる様子は、私を後ろに下げて（隠し）","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"殿様の無理難題とアイヌラックㇽ（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E6%AE%BF%E6%A7%98%E3%81%AE%E7%84%A1%E7%90%86%E9%9B%A3%E9%A1%8C%E3%81%A8%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8C%E3%83%A9%E3%83%83%E3%82%AF%E3%87%BD%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/007/002#502","text":"kosietaye rikin hi wano tap aynu ne pekor yaynu=an rok pe","translation":"わが身を引き去って、上って行くとき今人間だと思っていたものが、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケソラㇷ゚　カムイ　イレス」孔雀の神に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N007P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/006#11","text":"orowa nesi supki ham ka a=kor yupi turano kayki kane sinta sinta upsor a=osikirpa senram sekor kane sinta kohumumatki kanto kotor kosietaye ki ruwe ne.","translation":"／今度《コント》は【それから】ぐもの大神【ヨシの葉の上の】我の兄【兄さんと】友に今度【一緒に】金の工神駕【金のシンタ】神駕内へ【シンタに】乘入けり【乗った。】いちもかわりなし【いつものことだが】金の神駕【金のシンタは】おとが立り【轟々と鳴りつつ】天の上へ【天に】上りけり【引き返した】そうして【のだ。】","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/ueda-minwa/05#48","text":"a=i=kosietaye hene ki pekor","translation":"引っ寄せられるように","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"エゾマツと魔鳥（1999）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E4%B8%8A%E7%94%B0%E3%83%88%E3%82%B7%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A8%E3%82%BE%E3%83%9E%E3%83%84%E3%81%A8%E9%AD%94%E9%B3%A5%EF%BC%881999%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/017#314","text":"akus ikirok okkaypo utar kosimusiska hine, sonno ka un,","translation":"と、その息子たちはおじさんに（？）咳払いをして本当に、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（前半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=17","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#84","text":"sekor okay pe taye kane a=kor yupi kosimusiska ki ruwe ne.","translation":"ということを言うと兄さんは（賛同の）咳払いをした。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/35#214","text":"ikia ekasi kosimusiska wa","translation":"そのおじいさんは了解の咳払いをして","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"見なれない魚を食べてはならない（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E8%A6%8B%E3%81%AA%E3%82%8C%E3%81%AA%E3%81%84%E9%AD%9A%E3%82%92%E9%A3%9F%E3%81%B9%E3%81%A6%E3%81%AF%E3%81%AA%E3%82%89%E3%81%AA%E3%81%84%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["AA研アイヌ語資料","アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語アーカイブ"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/北東/静内"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/017#96","text":"“a=kor yupo utar taani pakno[60] sinotca, kuttomo or un[61] pirka, kuttom kor wa sinotca kane sap rok pe” ari yaynu=an kus,","translation":"「兄さんたちはここまで歌を、喉から、よい喉を持って歌いながらきたのに」と私は思ったので、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（前半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=17","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#4","text":"kuttomo hup cikanakne kikin ari réan ni, húra yupke ni a=tuypa wa arki=an. ni ruye cikanakne kapu a=kar yakkay pirka korkay níteke usa a=kaypa wa su or en a=o wa a=popte. numihi anakne pon korkay a=e easkay. su otta kikinni a=popte wa imi an=ekamure tek ohonno an cikanakne kuttomo ponno kay riten nankor. kikinni wakka…","translation":"のどが腫れたなら、キキンという名の木、香りの強い木 (注: エゾノウワミズザクラ) を切ってきます。 木が太かったら皮を剥いでもいいですが、枝も折って鍋に入れて煮ます。 実は小さいですが食べられます。 鍋でキキンニを煮て、服を頭にかぶってしばらくすると、 のどが少しでも治まるでしょう。キキンニの (を沸かした)お湯の湯気を決して逃がさないように服を頭にかぶって口を開けます。 のどが治まってくればいいです。 2度3度だけならのどは治まらないでしょう。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/19#132","text":"kuttomo an=esirkocotca","translation":"喉に私が鋭く射かけました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"人が行方不明になる村を救ったイクレスイェ（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BA%BA%E3%81%8C%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%B9%E4%B8%8D%E6%98%8E%E3%81%AB%E3%81%AA%E3%82%8B%E6%9D%91%E3%82%92%E6%95%91%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/020#18","text":"Ne suma kasiketa hacir kur anakne hurane a=perke kusu ne; korka, nen ne yakka kasiketa tan suma hacir kur an ciki toytoy mana a=caricari koraci sinuma kusu aki kusu ne na.","translation":"その石の上に落ちる者はだれでも打ち砕かれ、その石がだれかの上に落ちれば、その人は押しつぶされてしまう。」","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"20","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2007","text":"e=sikihi mana us!","translation":"お前の目は節穴か！","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1734410336911122763","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/002/0#32","text":"toy siki mana us towa towa to","translation":"「眼の曇ったつまらないヤツ","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"1","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#38","text":"'ommo 'onne 'ekoweepekerehe ne'ampe taa, 'etuhka simah 'ene yee manu.","translation":"こう母さんに話したら、カラス母さんはこう言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"express-special/002#2","text":"hekaci: iso hee? sonno hee? iso neyke sahne an paa ku=ommo suke teh KAREE karaha. anpene keeraan.","translation":"男の子：クマ？ ほんと？ クマだったら去年お母さんが料理してカレーを作ったよ。とても美味しかった。","collection":"ニューエクスプレス・スペシャル 日本語の隣人たち I+II","document":"アザラシよりクマが好きだな","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560089231","source_slug":"new-express-special-neighbors"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/22#4","text":"ommo tani ahkapo too eere too eere.","translation":"母親は、赤ちゃんに乳を飲ませ飲ませした","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ22 自動詞・他動詞・複他動詞","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/040/1#10","text":"rimse anak Sipicar (Shizunai), Operper (Obihiro), Enrum (Erimo), Sirawoi (Shiraoi), Muka (Mukawa) wa arki utar ki.","translation":"踊りは、静内、帯広、えりも、白老、鵡川から来た人たちがやりました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Aynu-minzoku-bunkasai newa \"itak=an ro\"","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#9","text":"B: Operper or ta ku=sukup wa, aynupuri anakne, Satporo ta ku=ekampinuye.","translation":"B: 帯広で育って、アイヌ文化は札幌で勉強しました。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2013/3/33#2","text":"Operper pakno nekon e=oman?","translation":"帯広まではどうやってあんたは行くの？","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"33","dialect":"浦河","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/浦河","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/25-3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/019/004#132","text":"orano cise pannok un cise pennok un a=kesanpa ayne","translation":"それから家の西の軒へ、家の東の軒へ追いかけたあげく","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ポイサルンクㇽ」若い沙流の人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N019P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/010#165","text":"casi pennok casi pannok un utamkocupu","translation":"山城の上手の軒や山城の下手の軒へ（跳んで）攻撃しあう。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-3","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/00#822","text":"ikia an=kor cise cise pennok","translation":"その私の家の上手の軒","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"いつの間にか子供ができ、置き去りにされた娘（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%84%E3%81%A4%E3%81%AE%E9%96%93%E3%81%AB%E3%81%8B%E5%AD%90%E4%BE%9B%E3%81%8C%E3%81%A7%E3%81%8D%E3%80%81%E7%BD%AE%E3%81%8D%E5%8E%BB%E3%82%8A%E3%81%AB%E3%81%95%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/031#225","text":"poro serkehe a=haruhu er... e=rura,","translation":"私の肉の大部分をあなたは運び、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 21","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=31","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/jhn/007#40","text":"Tanpe kusu, inne utar un serkehe anakne tan itak nu ciki ene itak hi :— Sonno poka tanpe anakne ueinkar kur ne, ari itak.","translation":"この言葉を聞いて、群衆の中には、「この人は、本当にあの預言者だ」と言う者や、","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"7","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/015/015#126","text":"nea kamuy noka o konpan poro serkehe pon wen sisam a=kore.","translation":"そのカムイの像の入った小判の大部分を若い貧乏和人がもらいなさい。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ポン　ウェン　シサㇺ　ウエペケㇾ」若い貧乏な和人のお話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N015P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#110","text":"e=matnepo (esik,) e=sitekanire wa,","translation":"娘をお前は自分の手に抱いて［註11］、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/09#290","text":"ponmat... ponmatnepo sitekanire hine","translation":"小さい娘を連れて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"人間に火を授けた女神（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%AB%E7%81%AB%E3%82%92%E6%8E%88%E3%81%91%E3%81%9F%E5%A5%B3%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-benron/27/00#14","text":"…nunishpa maukowen wa wenkur ne wa, teeta wenkur tane nishpa nep utarorke wa apiye hawe akorewen shiri chinukar wa, chierampoken kushu” ari wenkur ne yakka sitekanire p ne awa, sonno an yayutari hekota, earikinne niste sisam inkar ki siri sonno poka osserke keuwtum ku=yaykore. orowa suy, sisam ari a=porse p anakne ar su…","translation":"なぜ、知里さんはこのように同族、先祖たちに厳しい目を向けるのでしょう。自ら記した神謡のなかでは「アイヌのニシパが運が悪くて昔貧乏人で今お金持になっている者たちにばかにされたりいじめられたりしてるさまを私が見て不憫に思ったので」と、貧しい人にも救いの手が伸べられているのに、現実の同族に対しては、あまりにも厳しい、シサㇺ的な目を向けていることに驚きます。そして、シサㇺについては一言も触れていません。","collection":"アイヌ語弁論大会","document":"知里幸恵生誕120年に思う事","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/itakanro/files/r05_pg_22.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-speech-contest"}]

column10: ["樺太","樺太/西海岸/小田洲"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/004#18","text":"nah 'eraman teh taa, 'orowa taa, 'oka 'an 'ike taa, siwpu kanne taa 'ahun manu. 'ahunihi ne'ampe taa 'iramusinta mokoro kusu 'an manu. mokoro kusu 'anihi ne'ampe taa, 'orowa taa, アノnanna nanna 'utah taa, niinahci wa sapahci manuyke taa, neya hekaciyehehcin 'ohta 'ahu- 'ahupahci teh taa suy, 'epuntekahci 'ike taa, '…","translation":"そう思って、それからしばらくいたが、勇気を出して中に入ったとさ。入ったら、静かにすやすやと寝ていたとさ。寝ていたのだが、それから姉さんたちがマキとりから帰って来たが、その子のいるところに入って、また喜んで抱き上げてまたあやした。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"pilsudski#2","text":"POORANTO MOSIRI OROUN PORO NISPA KARAHUTO MOSIRI OHTA AYKU, KIRIYAKU, OROHKO UTARA KUSUKANNE SIWPU KANNE KAMPINUYE KII 1903 PAA 8 CUH OHTA TAN SIRAWOY KOTANTA REWSI","translation":"ポーランド人流刑者，卓越せる民俗学者 アイヌと極東先住民研究の開拓者 1903年8月 当地白老に滞在，研究に勤しんだ","collection":null,"document":"ピウスツキ記念碑","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"http://hokkaido-poland.com/POLE/POLE80-81Pilsudski.pdf","source_slug":"pilsudski-memorial-inscription-shiraoi"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#383","text":"siwpu kanne kampinuye kii","translation":"一生懸命に研究をした","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/2010667332679655626","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/幌別","樺太/西海岸/小田洲"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/043#88","text":"neeteh taa 'orowa kirahci wa 'asipahci manu. kirahci wa 'asipahcihi ne'ampe taa soyta 'asipahcihi ne'ampe taa soyta 'asipahcihi neya, neya 'unkayo 'utah taa tani taa, horokewpo 'utah nospahci manu. nospahci 'asipahci. soyta 'asipahci turanno taa 'otakaa ka pohka rehorokewpo taa makapahci manu.","translation":"そうしてそれから逃げようと外に出たとさ。逃げようと外に出たら外に出たら、そのウンカヨ達がいま、その男たちを追っかけてきたとさ。追っかけて出てきた。外に出てすぐさま浜を通って3人の男は山の方へ逃げて行ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"三人娘とウンカヨ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at43aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#63","text":"pon=an h_i ta Iskar petput ta a=utari utar turanno uesayne=an ueterke=an sinot=an h_i ta kanna kanna <sisam> ari a=porose pa p poronno a=nukar.","translation":"私が小さかった頃、石狩川の河口で私の同胞たちとともに、群れて飛んだり遊んだりしたときは、何度も何度も＜和人＞と呼ばれる者を大勢見た。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-358/3/1#78","text":"hempara pakno tap koraci utar_ turanno kamuy turanno","translation":"いつまでこのように同胞たちとも、カムイたちとも","collection":"アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","document":"金田一京助宛ノート散文説話「金の煙草入れ（konkani tampakop）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/109482/358-p015.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-ainu-research-issues"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/015#144","text":"oykesne tokap usitta ka[64] usa wenkamuy i=ramusuye[65] hawe ene oka sekor hawe=an kor simuyamuya hike ka,","translation":"とうとう昼間にも色々な悪いカムイが私の気を引くというのか」と言いながら嫌だ嫌だと身を揺すっても","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・山田慎太郎聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 12","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=15","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/03#414","text":"tane usitta mak sino iki=an pa kor","translation":"今この時、本当にどのようにして","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イクレスイェとミズナラの神（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%E3%81%A8%E3%83%9F%E3%82%BA%E3%83%8A%E3%83%A9%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/096/003#20","text":"（川上）hoskipa tane usitta anak","translation":"昨年の今ごろは","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"「天候・自然現象・天文」に関する語彙と表現","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34737AP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/013#246","text":"e=onautari nomi kamuy opitta yaykopuyarseske yaykoapaseske","translation":"お前の父親たちが祈る神は、みんな家の窓を閉じ家の戸を閉めて","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 11","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=13","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#190","text":"yaykopuyarseske","translation":"自分の家の窓を閉めて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/013#24","text":"sekor haweoka kor_ *ra … yaykopuyarseske yaykoapaseske pa hine ora konto,","translation":"と言って、窓を閉め、戸口を閉めてしまう。そこで、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チセコﾛカムイが育ててくれた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/030#38","text":"'okaakeketa taa, panka'an yeesuh taa, 'otakaata 'ay yane taa, 'otakaata 'omanu wa hosipi manu. hosipihi ne'ampe taa hariyam naa 'opompaki naa taa マイダリ 'uhcinkehe 'ohta 'oro'oo teh 'ampa wa makan manu.","translation":"その後で川下男は浜にいて、浜に出てから帰って来たとさ。帰って来るとき、そのカナヘビやカエルなどを、前かけの裾までいっぱいに入れて持って帰ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"川上男と川下男","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at30aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#202","text":"hosipihi neanpe suy reekoh_ renkayne an","translation":"帰ってきて、また、たくさんの","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/016/1#15","text":"néanpe anakne, Igirisu un kur nuye \"Robinson Kurusô (The Life and Strange Surprizing Adventures of Robinson Crusoe)\" sekor an=ye syôsetu ne wa, Heburai itak ani an=nuye p ne.","translation":"それはイギリス人が書いた「ロビンソン・クルーソー (The Life and Strange Surprizing Adventures of Robinson Crusoe) 」という小説で、ヘブライ語で書いたものだった。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ben Iehuda newa Heburai-itak","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"prague#16","text":"eigo eraman rusuy kur ne yakun, Amerika oruspe neya Igirisu oruspe neya pirkano eraman kuni p ne.","translation":"英語を学びたい人なら、アメリカの話やイギリスの話をきちんと勉強することになります。","collection":null,"document":"プラハ宣言","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"http://www.hokkajda-esp-ligo.jp/jp/AinaManifestoDePrago.htm","source_slug":"prague-manifesto-ainu-translation"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/toykaunpe#68","text":"IGIRISU mosir un nispa! sino nispa ne manu p rawoterke p ne wa.","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"toykaunpe (@toykaunpe)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/toykaunpe/status/11537052188","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語訳新約聖書"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/北東/様似"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/064/3#11","text":"Apoi-dake or ta an kanran suma kay nonno kay, sisak pe ne ruwe ne.","translation":"アポイ岳にあるカンラン岩や花も、珍しいものです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Apoi-dake (Apeoy nupuri)","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/act/001#12","text":"Orowa ne utar anakne Kanran-us ari a=ye nupuri oro wano Yerusarem kotan orun hekompa nisa ruwe ne; ne nupuri anakne Yerusarem kotan ehanke, Kamuy toho ta paye hi pakno an usike ne ruwe ne.","translation":"彼らは都に入ると、泊まっていた家の上の部屋に上がった。それは、ペトロ、ヨハネ、ヤコブ、アンデレ、フィリポ、トマス、バルトロマイ、マタイ、アルファイの子ヤコブ、熱心党のシモン、ヤコブの子ユダであった。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語アーカイブ","アイヌ語訳新約聖書"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/北東/静内"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1jn/003#15","text":"Nen ne yakka kor irwak etunne kur anakne keweuk kunne: orowa, nen ne yakka kewe-uk kur anakne, ne oske ta ramma okere somo ki inotu kor somo ki ruwe ne ari an anpe eci=eraman.","translation":"兄弟を憎む者は皆、人殺しです。あなたがたの知っているとおり、すべて人殺しには永遠の命がとどまっていません。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/19#523","text":"keweuk wenkamuy a=pakasnu","translation":"殺した悪い神を罰して","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"人が行方不明になる村を救ったイクレスイェ（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BA%BA%E3%81%8C%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%B9%E4%B8%8D%E6%98%8E%E3%81%AB%E3%81%AA%E3%82%8B%E6%9D%91%E3%82%92%E6%95%91%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/050/0#3","text":"Henshukyokucho Hamada nispa, jimukyokucho Kayano (Shiro) nispa, kaikei Tokutomi nispa, Yokoyama nispa, Kanzaki nispa, Akibe (Hideo) nispa, Shikata katkemat, Komatsu (Kazuhiro) nispa, Nagane katkemat, Hiraishi nispa, usa oka Penkurabu un kur utar arikiki pa wa kusu, sonno k=éyayirayke ruwe ne.","translation":"編集局長の浜田さん、事務局長の萱野 (志朗) さん、会計の徳富さん、横山さん、神崎さん、秋辺 (日出男) さん、鹿田さん、小松 (和弘) さん、長根さん、平石さん、ペンクラブ会員の努力のおかげと深く感謝申し上げます。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Penkurabu esapanekur or wa","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#3692","text":"numan onuman maciya or un k=arpa akusu KOMATSU sekor hawe BABA unarpe ku=nukar wa...","translation":"昨日の夕方、町へ行くと、コマツというおばさんを見て…","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/002#11","text":"koyoyamokte","translation":"不思議に思い","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（１）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（１）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/005#6","text":"i=osmake un sirsasnu ranke sirtaknu ranke kusu humas pe koyoyamokte a=ki ruwe ne.","translation":"私の後ろで，何度もサラサラ鳴りドンドンと何度も響くので，音がするのを私は不思議に思った。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column10: ["北海道"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/jhn/005#29","text":"Kuani anakne yaykota nep ne yakka ki eaykap: Ku=nu koraci ku koypisi ruwe ne: Ku koypisi hi anakne owpeka anpe ne ruwe ne; Kuani yaykota kor irenka hunara somo ki, En omantep kor irenka Ku=hunara ruwe ne kusu ne na.","translation":"善を行った者は復活して命を受けるために、悪を行った者は復活して裁きを受けるために出て来るのだ。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1564","text":"Ku=nu etoranne itak irara itak anak somo ku=nu kusune !","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/769582514444787717","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/040#51","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy 'acahcipo, horokewpo, sonno sirara 'acahcipo nah taa ku'eraman kusu, 'iruskaha neya waa. tah horokewpo hanka 'iruskare kusu.\"","translation":"「ねえ、おばあさん、ホロケウポ、てっきり本当のババだと私は思ったから怒ったのです。ホロケウポ、あなたを怒らせる積もりはなかったのです。」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"イムー女 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at40aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#2251","text":"Karaptunkur iposse ne an pe ta oar kueraman ka rusuy ka somo ki korka kueraman .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/824593723442892800","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/031/0#2","text":"Kushiro un Yamanoto Tasuke ekasi newa Iga hude húci usa, Shiranuka un Masuno Mitsunori ekasi newa Nemoto Yosaburô ekasi usa, Akan un Kotori Sawa húci utar ye aynu itak, ne kampi ka ta a=nuypa wa okay.","translation":"釧路の山本多助さんと伊賀フデさんに、白糠の増野光教さんと根本与三郎さんに、阿寒の小鳥サワさんたちが話したアイヌ語が、この本に書かれています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Kushiro aynu itak kampisos a=sanke","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/001#1","text":"ku=kor hekattar tasumkar siri ene ku=ye hi isam wa kusu ekasi kar puri ne a kusu ku=kor mici kampi ka ta nuypa itak iresu kamuy ekoytakkar ku=ki hawe ne hi tapan na.","translation":"子供（又は大人）が病気になってどうしようもないので父祖の習わしですから私の父が紙の上に書いた言葉を育ての媼神に捧げ唱え申し上げるのですよ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"inonnoytak-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/023#11","text":"Ne e=oya ancikar ta Utarpa anakne sinuma samake ta as kane ene itak hi :— Ramu-ritetke yan: eani anakne Yerusarem kotan ta en kusu pawetesu ki nisa ruwe ne koraci, Roma kotan ta ne yakka pawetesu e ki kusu ne ap ruwe ne na.","translation":"その夜、主はパウロのそばに立って言われた。「勇気を出せ。エルサレムでわたしのことを力強く証ししたように、ローマでも証しをしなければならない。」","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"23","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/04#366","text":"tane ritetke=an pe ne kusu","translation":"それからはもう回復したので","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"クマと一緒に逃げた娘（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%E3%81%A8%E4%B8%80%E7%B7%92%E3%81%AB%E9%80%83%E3%81%92%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/016#33","text":"samahciteh taa pirikano 'okayahci 'ike taa'usahpa 'usahpa cise karahciteh tani taa 'okayahci manuyke taa, ウン 'okayahci yayne tani 'okorehehcin tani taa, poo korohci manuyke taa, rihpo ka 'ahkas cikah ka tehkupihi sayayse 'ike 'uynahci 'ike muysankeh ne naa sahka ne naa ta'ah korohcipe nee manu.","translation":"一緒になって幸せに暮らして、みんなそれぞれ家を建てて暮らしたんだが…そうしている中にみんな今は子どももできて、空飛ぶ鳥も羽を落とし、その羽を拾ってホウキやハシを作ったということだ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"魚の尾びれの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at16aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/24#1","text":"usahpa usahpa payehci.","translation":"めいめい出かけて行った","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ24 動詞の単数・複数１","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#20","text":"\"nannaha, nanna tani 'oyasi 'uta 'ehcihii ダナッテ コウイッテ cisahci manu. cisahci teh 'orowa suy taa, sinke'ikehe taa, アノ 'inoskun monimahpo, nannaha wooneka kusu heekopo tura makan kusu yee yahka 'ampene 'etunne manu.","translation":"「姉さんが今化け物たちに食べられたんだな。」って、こう言って泣いたとさ。泣いてからまた、その次の日に、中の娘が、姉さんを探しに妹といっしょに山に行こうと言ったが、（妹は）嫌がったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/17#2","text":"ku=nanna en=wooneka.","translation":"姉が様子を見に来てくれた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ17 人称について学ぶ5「私を...する」の表現","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/008#29","text":"Orowa, Ramat anakne Piripos or ta-karankeno arpa wa tan nisinta orun yaytura yan — ari itak.","translation":"すると、“霊”がフィリポに、「追いかけて、あの馬車と一緒に行け」と言った。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"8","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#516","text":"Tampe neno an merayke annoski ta yaytura e=hotke ruwe ?","translation":"こんな寒い夜に君は孤床をかこつのかな？","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/537629572565463040","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1112","text":"yayutari","translation":"自分の仲間の","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/687771323934752768","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-benron/27/00#12","text":"ta koraci, aynu ponmenoko sinrici pakno, cikayhekaci ari porse kane yayutari kemnu kane an. a=omap ka ta ramatcak utar ne ari, kasi un suy sisam tura uwetusmak wa an=rapokkikar utar ne ari hawean. na akkarino, yayutari kewtumu yupkehawe kosuyekar siri ene okay hi.","translation":"ここでは、アイヌの少女が自ら、先祖を含む同族を幼い子供と呼びながら憐れんでいます。可愛くも、愚かな人々として、そしてさらに競争に敗れた人々であるとしています。それにとどまらず、同族の人格への非難が続きます。","collection":"アイヌ語弁論大会","document":"知里幸恵生誕120年に思う事","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/itakanro/files/r05_pg_22.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-speech-contest"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/040#38","text":"'ipe kara 'omantene taa, 'acahcipo 'oypepihi taa ceh 'oro'oo 'ike 'oro'oo teh taa","translation":"女はご飯を作って、ババの食器を出して、ご飯をついでついで、そして","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"イムー女 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at40aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/001/008#49","text":"a=oypepihi e=nupehe o wa, a=e ka eaykap hi kusu","translation":"私の食器にあなたの涙が入って、私は食べることもできないので","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"シサㇺウエペケㇾ「ピㇼカ　チャペ　アレス」良い猫を育てた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N001P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"center/011/04#223","text":"a=uk tekhine ne cape oypepihi","translation":"それを取ってネコの食器に","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"ネコに殺されそうになった友人を助けた男の話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou11-04.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#14","text":"a=turá wa ék=an yak ikan, eci=ukópokor yakne i=koiyomap póka, a=ki p (seko) sekor hawean kor i=ciskokoyki hike ka ene","translation":"一緒に来たら、ひょっとしてあなたたちに子供が生まれたらば、私は可愛がるだけでもしますもの」と話しながら私に泣きつくのですが、こんなに","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/002#14","text":"Iyotta rikun kanto or ta an Kamuy orun nupeki an, Mosir kata okay pirka irenka kor utar or ta i=tom an na, seko-ran itak ani ye nisa ruwe ne.","translation":"「いと高きところには栄光、神にあれ、地には平和、御心に適う人にあれ。」","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/018/004#163","text":"a=kor onnekur seko... neno hawean=an yakun","translation":"と義理の父が言ったので、そのように私が言ったなら","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ウッコッナイ　アイヌ　アネ」好色が元で死んだ男の話（途中でテープ切れ）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N018P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/013#31","text":"\" 'orowa tani taa, yayko 'ahturi hannehka 'eysika kusu 'iki.\"","translation":"「これからは、もうヤチブキを盗らないよ。」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ヤチブキの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at13aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/020#168","text":"oar yayko... yaykosina [22] eaykap kusu","translation":"全く（自分に縛りつけて）背負うこともできないので","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（前半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=20","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/037/1#14","text":"têpu ku=nu kor k=an akusu, teeta sonno arikiki no itak k=éraman hi késikarun wa sonno k=éyaykopuntek kusu, ku=yayko-orsutke kor k=árikiki kor k=an.","translation":"テープを聴いていると、昔、本当に一生懸命に言葉を勉強したことを思い出して本当にうれしいので、自分を励ましながらがんばっています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Uepeker \"shûtaisei\" asinno a=sanke","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#94","text":"\" 'acahcipo, 'ipecikare, 'ipecikaree. hemata 'oyasikepihi ダカ 'inospa kusu tah kusu, teeta 'ariki 'anihi neyke 'isam, nah yee.\"","translation":"「おばあさん、私を渡して、渡してちょうだい。なんだかお化けが私たちを追っかけてくるから、もし来たらいないと言って。」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-358/4/1#0","text":"Tan kotàn ohtà utása=an kusú áriki=an.","translation":"私はこの村を訪れるために来た。","collection":"アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","document":"テキスト1","dialect":"樺太（西海岸中部）","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸","region":"樺太","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/109483/358-p043.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-ainu-research-issues"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/002#10","text":"ariki=an koh an=cinkew utarike","translation":"来ると、私の親達に","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 2 (言い伝え2)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/psa/078#35","text":"Sinuma anakne ne utar ronnu hi ta a=epis, ayke: Hosippawa earikinne Sinuma hunara nisa ruwe ne.","translation":"神が彼らを殺そうとされると彼らは神を求め、立ち帰って、神を捜し求めた。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"78","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"center/011/04#361","text":"（epis u）pis ta an，petoput ta an","translation":"浜の河口にいる","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"ネコに殺されそうになった友人を助けた男の話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou11-04.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#5258","text":"kani anakne epis ta san wa tu suy ka cisetupte orowa arsuy cise anakne uhuyka wa isam.","translation":"私は浜へ降りて二度も引越し、それから一度家は燃やされてしまった。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/010/001#20","text":"ineapkusu kotan pirka wa siran ya ka a=eramisikari.","translation":"その村の素晴らしい様子は私が見たことがないほどだった。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「オタサムン カムイ ヘカッタㇻ」オタサㇺのカムイの子ども達","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N010P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3918","text":"ineapkusu pirka cise ne ruwe.","translation":"なんてきれいな家なのだろう。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#1","text":"ineapkusu i=omap kusu sirki ya ka paronna wa tekonna wa i=ecoknure ramma kane katkor kane oka=an hike inehunak un ne nankor _ya otu otonrim otukitara","translation":"なんと私を可愛がってくれるのだろうか，私の口もとに手もとにキスをしていつも変わりなく暮らしていたが，どこからなのだろうか，何度も轟音が聞こえてくる。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/mat/021#14","text":"Orowa, sik-nak utar newa her utar anakne Kamuy kor kenru ta an Sinuma orun ahup nisa ruwe ne; ayke, Sinuma ne utar iwankere nisa ruwe ne.","translation":"境内では目の見えない人や足の不自由な人たちがそばに寄って来たので、イエスはこれらの人々をいやされた。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"21","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#54","text":"rapoki ta hemanta awoterke wa inkar=an akusu seenne nak suy inkar=an kuni a=ramu rok h_i a=kor katkemat tane kuran iotta siretokkor monak pirka p suy asir attus mi kane hemanta poro sike oro wa ponpe pakkay kane ney ponpe cis wa humke kor wa ek hawe ne awan.","translation":"すると何かが家の中に飛び込んできて、私が（そちらに）目をやると、まさかそのようなものを見ると私は思わなかったことに、妻が今夜はなんとも器量がよく、ただでさえ美しい者が新しい厚司を着て、何か大きな荷物に赤ちゃんをおぶってその赤ちゃんは泣いて、（妻は）あやしながら来た声であった。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3794","text":"nep ne nak...","translation":"何にでも…","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#4","text":"kuttomo hup cikanakne kikin ari réan ni, húra yupke ni a=tuypa wa arki=an. ni ruye cikanakne kapu a=kar yakkay pirka korkay níteke usa a=kaypa wa su or en a=o wa a=popte. numihi anakne pon korkay a=e easkay. su otta kikinni a=popte wa imi an=ekamure tek ohonno an cikanakne kuttomo ponno kay riten nankor. kikinni wakka…","translation":"のどが腫れたなら、キキンという名の木、香りの強い木 (注: エゾノウワミズザクラ) を切ってきます。 木が太かったら皮を剥いでもいいですが、枝も折って鍋に入れて煮ます。 実は小さいですが食べられます。 鍋でキキンニを煮て、服を頭にかぶってしばらくすると、 のどが少しでも治まるでしょう。キキンニの (を沸かした)お湯の湯気を決して逃がさないように服を頭にかぶって口を開けます。 のどが治まってくればいいです。 2度3度だけならのどは治まらないでしょう。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/012/003#537","text":"a yupke ruye ne...","translation":"激しい（炎となって）","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚ ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」ポイヤウンペ イソイタㇰ　火なしに育った、水なしに育った","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N012P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/26#316","text":"pirkano apkas ruye an=nukar konno","translation":"よくよく歩いた跡を見ると","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"居候の男に言い寄られメス馬にされた奥さん（1988）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E5%B1%85%E5%80%99%E3%81%AE%E7%94%B7%E3%81%AB%E8%A8%80%E3%81%84%E5%AF%84%E3%82%89%E3%82%8C%E3%83%A1%E3%82%B9%E9%A6%AC%E3%81%AB%E3%81%95%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A5%A5%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%EF%BC%881988%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/009#113","text":"i=eyayram’ekasure he ki p i=tomunno ne apekor ek _humi as na","translation":"私を負かそうするものがどうやら私の方に来るようです。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 9」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=8","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/011/004#125","text":"e=tomunno ek wa e=e poka ki wa","translation":"あなたの方に来て、せめてあなたを食べてから、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ユペッホントムンクㇽ」湧別の中流の人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N011P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/007#27","text":"asinuma anak pase kamuy a=ne wa kusu arokamkinno i=tomunno a=e=utek katu ne ruwe tapan.","translation":"我友は【私】本当の【は】義の神【重い神】有成る故【であるから】全く態と【わざと】我に差て【私の方に】貴下使持【お前は使い立てされた】故【の】それですから【ですよ。】","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-3","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#47","text":"\"hemata pirika ruy moni... horokew, monimah, horokewpo 'uta, nupuru monima, horo... horokewpo 'uta, kosonto sohkara ka 'ekarakara ka hankihci kusu 'ene'ani hii? \"nah yehci manu.","translation":"「こんな立派な、勇ましい(娘…)、青年、(娘)、青年たち、えらい(娘)、青年たちだ、どうして晴着を敷かないでいるのか? 」と言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-358/4/2-2#3","text":"Hameum pono ne yahka urankarakara an-ekarakara,","translation":"仕返しを少しでも（したいが？）、仲直りを私はする。","collection":"アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","document":"テキスト2②","dialect":"樺太（西海岸中部）","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸","region":"樺太","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/109483/358-p043.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-ainu-research-issues"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/001#16","text":"oh ekarakara teh,oẖ, opihi naa","translation":"柄を作って、柄、その柄にも","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 1 (言い伝え1)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#318","text":"ora \"i=okake ta i=eokari wa tan porosir un casi epunkine p hunna","translation":"そして「私の後で代わりにこのポロシㇼの館を守るもの、誰を","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/004/002#7","text":"a=onaha kor pe ne a, a=eokari wa","translation":"持っていたのですが、父に代わり","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「キムンカムイ　カネ　アワンキ　イエルサ」熊の神が鉄の扇を私に貸した","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N004P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#424","text":"orano hat huci a=eokari wa","translation":"おばあさんの代わりに私が","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/020#213","text":"i=resu poka eyaykorampetetne kor i=resu sine matkaci takup a=ne wa","translation":"（父は）私を育てるだけでも、苦労しながら私育てて、私は一人娘なので","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（前半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=20","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/008#133","text":"eram... e... e=resu poka eyaykorampetetne ruwe ne yakka","translation":"お前を育てるにも子育てに苦労したのであったけれど","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ウェンクㇽ　フチ　イレス」貧乏人のお婆さんに育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#279","text":"eyaykorampetetne kor an","translation":"苦労して","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/025#312","text":"iye... itak kor an _hike ka","translation":"兄は話したのだが、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 18","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=25","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/040/0#1","text":"\"Aynu-taimuzu\" iye-e-tu-hotne p ci=sanke","translation":"私たちは「アイヌタイムズ」第40号を出しました","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Nibutani or ta uwekarpa=as","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#5376","text":"ku=pon _hi ta hinak un ka unarpe arwenpasrota iye hawe ku=nu wa “ iyohaysitomare “ sekor ku=yaynu","translation":"私は小さいときにどこかのおばさんがひどくののしっていた。話す声を聞いて「おそろしい」と思った。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/006#10","text":"komewnatara","translation":"堂々として立派である。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（４）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（４）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#68","text":"sinis kanto a=koesoykarpa tan kinup so arpa ru ko maknatara kinup noski ta kane casi as ru konna komewnatara","translation":"本当の天を突き抜けるとカヤ原が遥かに広々と打ち開けてカヤ原の真ん中に金の城が建つ様子は堂々と立派だ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/23#308","text":"asir cise asir konna komewnatara","translation":"新しい家が立派に立っていて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"姉に虐待された娘とオコジョ神（1988）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E5%A7%89%E3%81%AB%E8%99%90%E5%BE%85%E3%81%95%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%E3%81%A8%E3%82%AA%E3%82%B3%E3%82%B8%E3%83%A7%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881988%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#84","text":"niiina koh kuruhci, tani 'aynu 'okore 'uneeno 'asipahci koh, niinahci, 'uneeno 'asipahci koh niinahci koh sapahci, nah kihcipe nee manu. nah kanne.","translation":"マキをとってはくべ、今、みんなでいっしょに外に出て、マキとりをして、いっしょに出てマキをとっては帰ってきて暮らしたとさ。これまでだ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/056/0#5","text":"Tani 'usa 'oka mosiri 'ohta 'okay=ahci 'utah EIGO 'ani 'ukoytak=ahcihi nee sirihi tura 'uneeno 'an Neera 'an ku=kii 'ike neya JIDAI mosiri 'onne ku=oman teh neya sirihi ku=nukan rusuy.","translation":"現在、様々な国々の人々が英語で話し合っているのと同じ状況です。私はなんとかしてその時代の国 (樺太) へ行ってその状況を見てみたい。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Karahuto'aynu'itah","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/08#58","text":"une'eno sinki=an pa wa iwak=an __hike ka","translation":"同じように疲れて帰ってきても","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ユペッの川尻の村の兄弟と沖の国の兄弟（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%A6%E3%83%9A%E3%83%83%E3%81%AE%E5%B7%9D%E5%B0%BB%E3%81%AE%E6%9D%91%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E3%81%A8%E6%B2%96%E3%81%AE%E5%9B%BD%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/026#20","text":"ikesuy=an wa an=cisehe or ta sap=an wa an... nottesusu=an wa inkar=an hike sonnoka un, Otasut un nispa kor rametok, kamuy or ta ka isam. ka... kor katkemat ka sino puri pirka sino siretokkor.","translation":"怒って出て行って、自分の家に下って行って、（不機嫌で）顔を上を向けて目をやると、本当にオタスッの長者の度胸は神の国にもないほどだ。その奥方も本当に行いが良くてまことに美しい。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ Otasut-un-katkemat オタスッウン カッケマッ","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=26","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/02#205","text":"soyenpa=an __hine an=cisehe ta arki=an","translation":"私は外に出て、自分の家まで戻り","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"アイヌにタモギタケを授けた蛇神（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8C%E3%81%AB%E3%82%BF%E3%83%A2%E3%82%AE%E3%82%BF%E3%82%B1%E3%82%92%E6%8E%88%E3%81%91%E3%81%9F%E8%9B%87%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/27#4","text":"hemata kusu an=cisehe e=horahte?","translation":"どうして私の家を崩したの？","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ27 疑問詞を用いた疑問表現2","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/010#89","text":"atteyne mosir arpokna mosir a=kokiru kusu ne hi a=ekopasrota kor","translation":"じめじめ湿った国、地下の国に追放することになる」と私は叱りながら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 10」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=9","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/005/008#143","text":"tane anakne atteyne mosir arpokna mosir","translation":"もはや湿った国地下の国へ","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「キㇰレッポ　チチラ　ウコイソイタㇰ　ヒ　アヌ」ヤマベとドジョウが話をするのを私は聞いた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N005P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/014#119","text":"atteyne mosir a=kooterke, ne wen kamuy anakne ki ruwe ne kusu,","translation":"私が地下の冥府に蹴り落とした。","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チチケウニッネイと疱瘡神の息子","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/027#146","text":"cise or ta nep ka kar ka eyaymoysak,","translation":"家で何もする暇がない。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ reyep kamuy レイェㇷ゚　カムイ","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=27","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/074/3#4","text":"Pu-iwakte ci=ki wa pu-carpa=as rusuy kusu, Nibutani kotan ta okay Takumi nispa utar usa inne utar ku=koramkor a korkay, Takumi utar opitta monrayke eyaymoysak ruwe ne kusu, pu-carpa=as ka eaykap.","translation":"プ送りの儀をしてこのプを片付けるのを二風谷の匠や多くの人に相談したけれども、匠の人達は仕事がみんな忙しくて、片付けることもできませんでした。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Pu-iwakte","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/05#480","text":"eani ka ehotanuapkas eyaymoysak","translation":"おまえも訪ねて行く暇がない","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イヌエンジュの神に助けられた娘の話（1981）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8C%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B8%E3%83%A5%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AB%E5%8A%A9%E3%81%91%E3%82%89%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%E3%81%AE%E8%A9%B1%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/001/006#103","text":"horipi tura ikewehomsu hawe ene an hi","translation":"踊りと共に魔を払う儀式を行い、このように言った","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"カムイユカㇻ「エパウ」キツネの神が自叙した神謡","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N001P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#40","text":"sekor itak=an akusu, nea caca kamuy humse tura hopuni hine, ikewehomsu. こんど rupne mat ka <ka> pewtanke kor ikewehomsu. uekari,","translation":"と話をすると、そのおじいさんは雄叫びを上げながら立ち上がって、イケウェホㇺスをした。おばあさんもペウタンケしながら立ち上がってイケウェホㇺスをした。かわるがわる、","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/03#358","text":"orano a=macihi cis kor ikewehomsu.","translation":"妻は泣きながら無事を喜び","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イクレスイェとミズナラの神（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%E3%81%A8%E3%83%9F%E3%82%BA%E3%83%8A%E3%83%A9%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/008#123","text":"inki pito inki kamuy ikiyakka taan ponpe peka wa i=kore yan.","translation":"どの尊、どの神でも、この赤ん坊を受け止めてくださいませ。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ウェンクㇽ　フチ　イレス」貧乏人のお婆さんに育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/20#139","text":"hokure hokure nen ikiyakka","translation":"さあさあ、誰でも","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"切羽が取り持った縁（1980）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E5%88%87%E7%BE%BD%E3%81%8C%E5%8F%96%E3%82%8A%E6%8C%81%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E7%B8%81%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2021/4/40#2","text":"tapan kinarataskep piyapaharu ikiyakka pittok ikiyakka","translation":"この山菜、ひえでも、おおはなうどでも、","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"40","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/2021Ainugoradio_Vol.4_a4.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/007#43","text":"Orowa, Morok kor kas newa Repan Kamuy kor nociw eci=uk, Onkami kusu ne nokaha eci=kor nisa: Orowa, Babyronia mosir ikuske ta kuani eci=tupte as kusu ne na.","translation":"お前たちは拝むために造った偶像、モレクの御輿やお前たちの神ライファンの星を担ぎ回ったのだ。だから、わたしはお前たちをバビロンのかなたへ移住させる。』","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"7","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-dict/059#26","text":"ikuske ta","translation":"向かい側に","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"方向","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/ainudict_bot#326","text":"ikuske ta","translation":"向かい側に","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"トピック別アイヌ語会話辞典 非公式bot (@ainudict_bot)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/ainudict_bot/status/1650182752879116289","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/017/002#45","text":"inawkotaktaku hine suwop or omare siri","translation":"それをイナウにくるんで、箱の中に入れるのを","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トランネ　アオナ　トゥラ　オカ　アン」怠け者の父と暮らす","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N017P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#1299","text":"a=inawkotaktaku a=haru... haru kotaku wa","translation":"木幣をつけて、食物をつけて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/016/004#8","text":"a=inawkotaktaku wa a=anu","translation":"木幣をつけておいて","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"散文説話（ｱ）「臼の神に育てられた娘（部分）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34622ABP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]
