column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#266","text":"yaytomte kuni p un amip kar wa etomte.","translation":"大事にすべきものに着物を作って大事にしました。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/003#3","text":"yaytomte kar ciki, somo a=nukar kuni sapa sioca hene ki, somo konkani an tonpe unu hene ki, mipihi utomciwre hene somo ki, korka,","translation":"あなたがたの装いは、編んだ髪や金の飾り、あるいは派手な衣服といった外面的なものであってはなりません。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/19#5","text":"a=yaytomte siporo cise","translation":"立派な大きな家を","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イクレスイェとカラス神（1984）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%E3%81%A8%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B9%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881984%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/007#440","text":"(aona, a) a=hekóte nispa turano uwepirka=an.","translation":"私は、連れ添う夫と共に良い人生を送りました。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その2）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=6","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/012#129","text":"sorekusu *aona ... nupekorapapse kor","translation":"（娘は）それこそ涙をはらはらと落とし","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チェンパｸのニｼパの話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2052","text":"toranne aona tura oka an","translation":"怠け者の父と暮らす","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1739163956093268342","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/002#50","text":"a=arkotomka p","translation":"違いないもの","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（１）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（１）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#58","text":"arkotomka kani ne cise kani cise ueroroski ru an annoski tapne","translation":"荘厳な金である家、金の家立ち並んでいる。真夜中に（？）","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/07#80","text":"a=arkotomka poro cise an wa ne ko","translation":"うまい具合に大きな家がありました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"交易に行って針ばかり持ち帰った男（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E3%81%AB%E8%A1%8C%E3%81%A3%E3%81%A6%E9%87%9D%E3%81%B0%E3%81%8B%E3%82%8A%E6%8C%81%E3%81%A1%E5%B8%B0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E7%94%B7%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/004/010#176","text":"hese attom sampe attom i=ekote a=ekote kor oka=an wa","translation":"息の真ん中に、心臓の真ん中に私を結び、私も（兄たちを）結んで暮らして","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「パㇱクㇽトノ　ヤニ　アコㇿ」カラスの神と危うく結婚するところだった","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N004P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/010#8","text":"oro wano kamuy ek _hum turimimse a=kor casi attom unno ek kotomno a=esanniyo an=an awa hontomo ta casi ras sam un aynu terke hum korimkosanpa","translation":"そこから神の来る（かのような）音が鳴り響き私たちの山城めがけて来るように思っていたがそのうちに山城の割木の柵のそばへ人間が跳び下りる音がドシンと響いた。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-3","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#4301","text":"Upas ruy upun ruy sonno sirwen attom ku=kus ayne naani ku=ray human korka ku=onumposo ruana !","translation":"雪が激しいわ、吹雪が激しいわ、本当に悪天候を潜り抜け、死にそうになりながら、何とか帰還した。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1092309938238439424","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#487","text":"a=ki kor oka=an kamuy ciresu kamuy siri ekapne","translation":"私たちはそのようにしながら暮し、神のように子を育て、神のようにさながら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#659","text":"kamuy ciresu a=i=ekarkar kor an=an _ayne","translation":"神のように育てられていました。そして","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/004#124","text":"\"ayay ciresu kusu ne kusu,","translation":"『赤ん坊というものは自分で育つだろうから、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"イクレスイェニｼパ、イㇱカㇻの不幸な女を第二の妻にする","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/029#56","text":"cupipor pirka cupipor ne hine","translation":"月明りが、きれいな月明りで","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 19","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=29","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/019/005#64","text":"sirpeker wa cupipor an ruwe neno eun","translation":"明るく、月明かりが照らすように、そこの","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ユペッ　イㇼワㇰ　ウコイキ」湧別の兄弟げんか","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N019P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#66","text":"homar cupipor an pe ne hine","translation":"かすかな月明かりがあり","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/006#21","text":"ehapapu no kina kopoye wa súpa wa,","translation":"節約しつつ山菜に混ぜて炊き、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その1）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=5","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#2088","text":"ehapapu","translation":"節約する","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/11#64","text":"a=anu wa ora a=ehapapu","translation":"そこに置いて、感謝をしました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"伝染病の神の息子とねたむ人間たち（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BC%9D%E6%9F%93%E7%97%85%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A8%E3%81%AD%E3%81%9F%E3%82%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/様似","北海道/南西/幌別","北海道/南西/虻田"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/043/3#14","text":"Aynu ne sik'o wa pon i wano Aynu ne nekon siknu kusune ya onaha wa an=ecakoko oruspe eisoitak wa onaha koyayrayke itak ye ruwe ne.","translation":"アイヌとして生まれて小さい頃からアイヌとしてどのように生きていくのか父親から教えられたことについて語り、父親に感謝する言葉を述べました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ainu Minzoku Bunkasai newa \"itak=an ro\" Sirarika ta an=kor","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/015/0#198","text":"a=eisoitak","translation":"私は物語った","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"アイヌ語虻田方言の英雄叙事詩（yukar）テキストとその言語的特徴（1）","dialect":"虻田","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/虻田","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou15-01.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-uepeker/003#106","text":"harkiso ne uesam erok kamuy oruspe patek a=eisoitak","translation":"左座にお互いの側に座って 私と神の話ばかりをしましたが","collection":"知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）","document":"Kemram kamuy nō-tonoho itak","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784832804029","source_slug":"chiri-yukie-uwepeker"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#170","text":"eko... e=kor ekasi oro ta e=rewsi yakun","translation":"お祖父さんのところに泊まったら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/004#76","text":"eko... i=kokor kuni","translation":"私に対して持っては","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（３）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（３）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/iitsutae/04#10","text":"eko... ku=rikin konno","translation":"上流へ行くと","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"夢に見た金掘りの話（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E8%A8%80%E3%81%84%E4%BC%9D%E3%81%88%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%A4%A2%E3%81%AB%E8%A6%8B%E3%81%9F%E9%87%91%E6%8E%98%E3%82%8A%E3%81%AE%E8%A9%B1%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","アイヌ語訳新約聖書"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/027/1#19","text":"Kanpô or ta, sat kina sinrici anak \"shazenso\" sekor a=ye p ne wa, epuyke anak \"shazenshi\" sekor a=ye p ne. \"shazenso\" a=popte wa ruri a=kar.","translation":"漢方では、乾燥した全草は「車前草 (シャゼンソウ) 」、種子は「車前子 (シャゼンシ) 」といいます。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"erumkina","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/jas/001#10","text":"orowano, oteknu kur aeraratki kusu nupetne yan; mun epuyke koraci isam kusu ne kusu ne na.","translation":"また、富んでいる者は、自分が低くされることを誇りに思いなさい。富んでいる者は草花のように滅び去るからです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1317","text":"Eskerimrim epuyke irammakaka epatke wa an siran na !","translation":"カタクリの花が見事に咲き誇っているなぁ！","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/724254528053235717","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/012#9","text":"Orowa sinuma esoyun osiraypa ciki ne osi arpa nisa ruwe ne: awa, ne hawturunpe ki a=rap anakne sonno a=rap ne ya a=eramuskare, korka, kewtum anukarape ne ari yaynu nisa ruwe ne na.","translation":"それで、ペトロは外に出てついて行ったが、天使のしていることが現実のこととは思われなかった。幻を見ているのだと思った。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"12","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/010#222","text":"“nep ka eci=kor pe oka ciki esoyun a=kor wa eci=uni un","translation":"「何かお前たちが持っていたものがあったら、外へ持って（出て）お前たちの家に","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「アアチャハ　イレス」私の叔父に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/17#174","text":"esoyun a=ninpaninpa na”","translation":"外に引きずっていくよ」","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"山で拾った赤ん坊（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%B1%B1%E3%81%A7%E6%8B%BE%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E8%B5%A4%E3%82%93%E5%9D%8A%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語訳新約聖書","平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/002#30","text":"Sinuma anakne ueinkar kur ne wa kusu, orosama, kor araset kata rok kuni kur sinuma etumam noske wa hetuku kusu ne ari an anpe ani Kamuy siyuppa no itak wa uytaknu nisa ruwe ne sekor eraman kusu;","translation":"ダビデは預言者だったので、彼から生まれる子孫の一人をその王座に着かせると、神がはっきり誓ってくださったことを知っていました。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/006#15","text":"e... konru hayokpe etumam konna tesnatara","translation":"氷の鎧を身体にきちんと着て","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「アトゥイソカタ　クッタㇻ　モシㇼ」海の上のイタドリの国","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#135","text":"Repunsir’unkur aarkotomka p aynu pito asno pinni sikopayar kane hayokpe etumam kasi kotesnatara p as ruwe ne.","translation":"レプンシㇼウンクㇰに違いない者（すなわち）立派な人物は屹立するヤチダモのよう（に立派）で金の鎧を体の上にきちんと着ている者が立っているのだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#8","text":"…ke taa, honkapuhu taa kiiki kiiki, honkapuhu kiiki nah kii manu. nahkii yayne taa honihi poroho nee manu. \"honihi poro teh taa (mun?) pon horokewpo poonekoro hoo.\"nah yee manu.","translation":"そうしていたら外に出したゴミ、いつも家の中のゴミを出して、そのゴミを持って外に捨てたゴミ捨て場にカラスたちが集まってきたとさ。カラスたちが集まってきて、腹の皮をカリカリ、腹の皮をカリカリ掻いたとさ。そうやっているうちにカラスのお腹が大きくなったとさ。「お腹が大きくなったから男の子が生まれるだろう。」と言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/041/0#11","text":"orowano, Siroo nispa anak aynu itak a=pirása kuni \"aynu itak tokku\" neya oro ta aynu itak an \"kooyoogo-hoo\" neya a=kar yak pirka sekor hawean.","translation":"また、志朗さんは、アイヌ語普及のために「アイヌ語特区」やアイヌ語を含む「公用語法」を考えています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Hokkaidoo-Esuperanto-Taikai","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/022#16","text":"MINNA IPPENNI mici ATO TOMO ray=an SITA HOO II\" TTE,","translation":"みんないっぺんに父さんたちと死んだほうがいい」って,","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"会所の番人に家族を殺され、逃げた若者","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/004/004#9","text":"“ikian ikian cuppok wa kus pet or un e=ekimne na,","translation":"「絶対に西を流れる川へ狩りに行ってはいけないぞ、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「アオナハ　ウェンカムイ　オロワ　アウㇰ」父は悪神にとられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N004P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"onsei12/07/0#355","text":"ikian ki kor","translation":"そうして","collection":"アイヌ語音声資料","document":"村焼き国焼き1 KOTAN SITCIRE MOSIR SITCIRE 1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://waseda.repo.nii.ac.jp/search?search_type=2&q=1636","source_slug":"ainu-audio-materials"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#158","text":"Oya itak ani yaynuan humi makanak ikian pe ka eramuskari.","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/960934251393818625","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/010#109","text":"somo ikutaspa p ka koasinpeuk ciki koasinpeuk","translation":"酒を飲まない人からも、償いの品を取る者は償いを取り、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「アアチャハ　イレス」私の叔父に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/12#682","text":"ikutaspa p arkipa hawe","translation":"酒を酌み交わしに来た声","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"供養をしてくれる人を探す墓標（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BE%9B%E9%A4%8A%E3%82%92%E3%81%97%E3%81%A6%E3%81%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%82%8B%E4%BA%BA%E3%82%92%E6%8E%A2%E3%81%99%E5%A2%93%E6%A8%99%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/004#303","text":"a=utari utar_ turano ikutaspa =an.","translation":"村人たちを連れて酒を酌み交わしに行った。","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"イクレスイェニｼパ、イㇱカㇻの不幸な女を第二の妻にする","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/010/003#347","text":"apunno oro ta ipuyaroposore=an hine inkar=an akusu","translation":"静かに、窓越しに見ると","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ウラユシウンクㇽ」ウラユシの人（最後テープ切れで本編中断）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N010P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"express-new/19#15","text":"ekuskonna ahun ka etoranne kusu ipuyaroposore.","translation":"彼はいきなり家に入るのもいやなので、窓からのぞき込んだ。","collection":"ニューエクスプレスプラス アイヌ語","document":"練習問題6","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086391","source_slug":"new-express-plus-ainu"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/002#289","text":"oro ta sorekusu ipuyaroposore a=yuputari ki akusu,","translation":"兄たちがそこにいって、窓のすきまからのぞくと、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"ぶどうづるの輪がトパットゥミを退けてくれた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/008#42","text":"neyke tani taa toh roski kumpe taa, kayo kokayohci manuyke taa, toh roski kumpe toh roski, pe'oci 'oruntah sih cakamnu cakamnu sapahci, saci'orun tah sih rinnu rinnu nah sapahci, suy pe'oci 'orun taa sih cakamnu cakamnu sapahci 'ike, taa tani tope'enke kumpe tope'enke, toh roski kumpe toh roski, puu setayrihpa kumpe pu…","translation":"それでタケを立てて、となえるものを呼びあって、タケを立てるものはタケたて、カエルはペチャペチャ走ってくる、クマはドシンドシンとやって来る、またカエルはペチャペチャ走ってくる、またタケの先をけずるものはけずる、タケを立てるものは立てる、倉の床板をぬくものは床板をぬく、その中に娘を落としたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"男探しの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at08aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/063/0#5","text":"Michitoshi iyotta kiyanne póho ne wa, onaha Iwamura Hidetoshi sekor re an wa, unuhu Kayo sekor re an ruwe ne.","translation":"通俊は長男であり、父は岩村英俊という名であり、母は加乃という名でした。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"iwamura michitoshi isoytak (1)","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/shinyo/03#1420","text":"sirkunpato kayo... kamuy ye a p","translation":"神が言ったこと","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ハチの姉妹と雷神（シﾘクンパト）（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%8F%E3%83%81%E3%81%AE%E5%A7%89%E5%A6%B9%E3%81%A8%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%88%E3%82%B7%EF%BE%98%E3%82%AF%E3%83%B3%E3%83%91%E3%83%88%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

'ositayke rupus, オシリ korupus, sohkara コオリツイタ rusa 'ohta 'aarehci 'ike taa, 'ampene 'unci 'uskahci manu.","translation":"家の中に入ってから、ゴザの上に座らせられたとさ。すると、お尻が冷たい、オシリが冷たい、ゴザがコオリツイタ ゴザの上に座らせたものだから、お尻が凍りついてしまった、それで火がすっかり消えてしまったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物-92","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at52aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/004/002#115","text":"netopakehe konru korupus wa yap ka eaykap.","translation":"体に氷がついて上がることもできません。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「キムンカムイ　カネ　アワンキ　イエルサ」熊の神が鉄の扇を私に貸した","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N004P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/06#45","text":"rupus konru korupus wa isam pe ne kusu","translation":"凍りついてしまったので","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"パナウンペの釣りざお（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%91%E3%83%8A%E3%82%A6%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%81%AE%E9%87%A3%E3%82%8A%E3%81%96%E3%81%8A%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/025#425","text":"kotanwente utar wente pa a... asuruhu a=nu hike ka asinuma a=kotanuhu anakne,","translation":"村を滅ぼし人々を滅ぼしたという噂を聞いても、私の村では、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 18","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=25","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#721","text":"kotanwente aynuwente kusu","translation":"村を荒らす、人を荒らすために","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/037#132","text":"\"sorekusu somo i=pa yakun sorekusu kotanwente=an kunak a=ramu a p,","translation":"「それこそ、見つけられなければ、村を全滅させてやろうと思ったのに、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"魔猫","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#2164","text":"hapo maciya or un arpa akusu cep motoci hok wa ek wa ohaw kar wa c=e wa sonno keraan.","translation":"お母さんが町に行くと、魚の背骨を買ってきてくれて、お汁を作って食べると本当に美味しかった。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/005#29","text":"tapanpe kusu a=kar wa an pe a=ukao hine orowa nesi pis ta sap=an ki rok awa a=tekekar kamuy sutu inaw kamuy sanke masar makun masar uturu ta heru motoci a=koniwkes kane wa esitciw ki wa oka ruwe ne.","translation":"そこで私は彫っていたものをしまってそして浜に下りると私が手作りした神（である）ストゥイナウの神が手前の砂浜と奥の砂浜その間にただ背骨だけが切られないで倒れ伏していたのだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-yukar/03#453","text":"heru motoci","translation":"ただ骨だけになって","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"兄を助けて沖の神と戦う（1981）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%EF%BE%97%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E5%85%84%E3%82%92%E5%8A%A9%E3%81%91%E3%81%A6%E6%B2%96%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%A8%E6%88%A6%E3%81%86%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/004#83","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy monimahpo 'uta, アノ、unkayo, koykihci, raykihci 'ike hannehka sinenehka kihcihi ka hannehka. taa 'utah ka 'uta 'eykaasiw wa 'omantene 'unkayo 'utah raykipe neewa ne'an. hemata 'e'ocisahci kusu ne'an 'ekuhtehkahci kusu ne'ani?\"","translation":"「あのね、娘たちや。ウンカヨを捕って殺したのは一人でしたのじゃないよ。みんなに助けてもらって、ようやくウンカヨをやっつけたんだよ。何を悔やんで、こんなに暗くしているのかい？」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#193","text":"sirepahci kusu karahcihi neani aa","translation":"到着しようとしているな","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2015/2/25#5","text":"A: Nekon ku=iki wa neani ta ku=sirepa?","translation":"A: どうやったら私はそこにたどり着く？","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"25","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/2015vol2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2co/003#11","text":"Okere wa i=sanpe anakne nupeki-uspe ne ciki, kasuno isam somo ki anpe anak nupek or ta an anpe ne ruwe ne kusu ne na.","translation":"なぜなら、消え去るべきものが栄光を帯びていたのなら、永続するものは、なおさら、栄光に包まれているはずだからです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#15","text":"sonno sirpirka hine sar enkasi hene kasike ta a=an usike hene sikus nupek maknatara.","translation":"本当に良い天気で、カヤ原の上も、その上に私が座る場所も日の光が明々と照らしている。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#4625","text":"nupek at.","translation":"光る","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/mat/013#4","text":"Inkar=an, Piyehe etoyta sine aynu oman wa piyehe etoyta; etoyta oro ta ru paruru ta hacir anpe an,","translation":"蒔いている間に、ある種は道端に落ち、鳥が来て食べてしまった。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"13","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/004#55","text":"sorekusu kamuy kor pe sintoko paruru are ratki etor sintoko asama a=koetuye.","translation":"カムイの持つような立派なシントコの縁から下がった鈴は、シントコの底まで垂れ下がり、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"イクレスイェニｼパ、イㇱカㇻの不幸な女を第二の妻にする","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2005/2/25#1","text":"itekke cip paruru kisma. iyaykipte.","translation":"舟のへりをつかむな。あぶない。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"25","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/05-2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/002#13","text":"B: ponkampinukatcise or ta k=an hi ta, k=eramuan hike, etoko ta ku=kor huci oro wa aynu utar oruspe anak ku=nu kor k=an. huci pon hi ta, ar suy aynu menoko nukar yak ye.","translation":"B: 小学校にいたときに知りました。そのまえに、祖母からアイヌ民族のことは聞いていました。祖母が小さいころに、いちどアイヌの女性を見たことがあったと。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　ケチ【アイヌ語・千歳方言】","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/jsYjmkgV4v8?si=BUIOa-vg4yYCjKB7","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/mfujita1023#8","text":"ney tutanu Niptay Ponkampinukatcise Kotcake ta a=kosirepa na. rap=an rusuy ciki un=nure yan.","translation":"次は二風谷小学校前に到着します。お降りになりたい場合はお知らせください","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"mamoru fujita （藤田護） (@mfujita1023)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/mfujita1023/status/1691358463040135169","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2023/4/50#0","text":"ponkampinukatcise or ta na k=an rusuy.","translation":"わたしは小学校に、もっといたい。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"50","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/A4%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8C%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B7%E3%82%99%E3%82%AA%E8%AC%9B%E5%BA%A74.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#919","text":"usa usa porosike=an wa arki=an.","translation":"それぞれ大きな荷物を背負ってきました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/012#45","text":"porosike=an h_ine ne Osorkot ta arpa=an hine, ruwe ne akusu,","translation":"大荷物をしょって、そのオソﾛコッに向かった。すると","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チェンパｸのニｼパの話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-dict#85","text":"porosike cietun suwop or k=omare.","translation":"大きい荷物をコインロッカーに入れた。","collection":null,"document":"ウポポイのアイヌ語表示辞典","dialect":"沙流方言","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://nam.go.jp/wp/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/5c5e1f24922be5ef27295ed7cbba5e48.pdf","source_slug":"upopoy-ainu-language-signage-dictionary"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/065/0#19","text":"Ru kasi ta jidôsha tomosma wa a=rayke nep yuk ne yakka tannekamuy ne yakka terkeype ne yakka ku=nukar hi ta pisno \"Untenshu ka nep ka wen puri kor wa eci=rayke ka somo ki. Iteki koyruska no sinrit or un paye wa ney ta pakno aynu epunkine wa kore\" sekor ramu otta k=ómante ruwe ne.","translation":"道で、車に轢かれたシカや蛇やカエルやを見ると「運転手もわざとお前たちを殺した訳ではないから恨むことなく神の国へ行って、いつまでも人間を守ってくれ」と心の中で神送りをする。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Kamuynomi","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/mat/008#3","text":"Orowa Yesu tekehe tun wa ne kur tomosma hine ene itak hi :— Ku=ramuosma na, e askannere as na — sekor itak: orowa, munin tasum anakne nani isam nisa ruwe ne na.","translation":"イエスが手を差し伸べてその人に触れ、「よろしい。清くなれ」と言われると、たちまち、重い皮膚病は清くなった。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"8","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#4551","text":"ku=turse wa ku=kokkasapa ni tomosma wa totce.","translation":"私は転んでひざが木にぶつかって腫れた","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/019/004#21","text":"okkayo sone tumpa humi siorotte","translation":"いかにも男であるらしく、鍔の音が鳴り響いた。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ポイサルンクㇽ」若い沙流の人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N019P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#192","text":"iruka ne kor cise sam ka ta makan katkor pe tumpa humi konaynatara horaociwe ki ruwe ne.","translation":"しばらくすると家のそばにどんな姿の者だか，鍔の音が鳴りわたり（空から）降りて来た。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/shinyo/03#144","text":"sirkunpato i tumpa humi","translation":"刀のつばの音が","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ハチの姉妹と雷神（シﾘクンパト）（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%8F%E3%83%81%E3%81%AE%E5%A7%89%E5%A6%B9%E3%81%A8%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%88%E3%82%B7%EF%BE%98%E3%82%AF%E3%83%B3%E3%83%91%E3%83%88%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/004#65","text":"*Ueno sekor a=ye (eki,) *teysaba or ta sirepa=as akusu,","translation":"上野という（駅）停車場に私たちが到着したら、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：isoytak イソイタㇰ 独話 2」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=3","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/041/0#7","text":"etoko ta Sirawoi un Ueno Muytekun húci ne kamuyyukar ye ruwe ne.","translation":"以前に、白老の上野ムイテクン (おうな) が、この神謡をやっていました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Hokkaidoo-Esuperanto-Taikai","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/006#37","text":"SO YUTTARA*6 KOOIU KADONO UENO KADONO TOKONI6 sirouri =an.","translation":"（sikkewっていったら、こういう家の角のところに）、穴を掘って、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"イㇱカㇻの上流からトパットゥミに襲われたイㇱカㇻの中流の少年がユペﾂの人に助けられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/012/0#1","text":"1999 pa cup 30 to ta, Ibarakiken Tôkaimura un kabusikigaisya Zyê Sî Ô (JCO) Tôkaizigyôsyo or ta JCO un utar, oro un uran ru wa an syôsan'yôeki tindensô (uran a=omare wa a=ratcire uske) or omare akusu, hemanta kusu ne ya ka a=erampewtek korka rinkai an a ruwe ne.","translation":"1999年9月30日に、茨城県東海村の株式会社ジェー・シー・オー (JCO) 東海事業所で、JCOの人たちが、ウランが溶けている硝酸溶液を沈殿槽 (ウランを沈殿させるところ) に入れたところ、どういうわけだか、臨界が起きました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Tôkaimura or ta rinkaiziko an a ruwe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/015/0#147","text":"uran ruyka","translation":"霞の橋を","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"アイヌ語虻田方言の英雄叙事詩（yukar）テキストとその言語的特徴（1）","dialect":"虻田","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/虻田","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou15-01.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/iitsutae/02#57","text":"konto cupkamuy or en uran... irannuppa ku=ki","translation":"太陽の神様に告げ口しました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ヘビににらまれて太陽の神に助けを求めた話（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E8%A8%80%E3%81%84%E4%BC%9D%E3%81%88%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%98%E3%83%93%E3%81%AB%E3%81%AB%E3%82%89%E3%81%BE%E3%82%8C%E3%81%A6%E5%A4%AA%E9%99%BD%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AB%E5%8A%A9%E3%81%91%E3%82%92%E6%B1%82%E3%82%81%E3%81%9F%E8%A9%B1%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/019#1","text":"Sannupista sine horokewpo 'an manu. sine horokewpo 'ani ike niina koh kuru, cehkii koh 'ee, yuhkii koh 'ee, nah kii manu. ne'anayne sine too taa niina kusu makan. kinta makanihi ne'ampe taa sine cise 'an manu.","translation":"サンヌピシ村に男が一人いたとさ。一人いてマキをとって焚いたり、魚をとって食べたり、狩をして食べたりしていたとさ。そのうちある日、マキをとりに山へ行った。山に行ったらそこに家が一軒あったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"トンコリ娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at19aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/003#10","text":"suy, nean, monimahpo tani, suy cehkii","translation":"また、女は魚とりを","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 3 (言い伝え3)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#4495","text":"ikatani kamuy ek noyne wentarap ka an na, ek etoko ta harusoyo=an ro.だ。","translation":"流行病の神が来そうな悪い夢があったよ、来る前に供物を外に出そう。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/001#2","text":"tapanpe patek aynu kotca a=etekuyruke p haru pirka p ne a kusu kamuyhuci sama ta k=anu yakun ikatani kamuy ciramsutkore ciharukore","translation":"こればかりを人間の代わりに貴女が渡すものは食料のよいものなので神のお婆さんのそばに（それを）私が置いたら悪い病気の神に捧げて，食料を与えてください。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"inonnoytak-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/043#27","text":"'orowa tani taa, kimma sine seta san manu. cahse wa sanihi ne'ampe taa, アノ nukara koh taa, meh manu. meh humihi taa,","translation":"それから今、山からイヌが一匹下りてきたとさ。走って下りてきて、見ると、吠えたとさ。吠えたのは、","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"三人娘とウンカヨ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at43aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/13#0","text":"seta meh.","translation":"犬が鳴く","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ13 人称について学ぶ1「彼が・彼女が・それが...する」の表現","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column10: ["北海道","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2co/003#13","text":"ayke, okere kusu ne siri an okaype okes Israeru un utar kasioinkar somo ki kuni ne nankamup ani kor nanu seske Mose ukoraci somo ci ne ruwe ne.","translation":"モーセが、消え去るべきものの最後をイスラエルの子らに見られまいとして、自分の顔に覆いを掛けたようなことはしません。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/049/007#6","text":"（川上）ora nankamup","translation":"そして死体の顔を覆う布","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"死者の身支度で身につける物","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34668BP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column8: ["川上まつ子の伝承","浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流","樺太/西海岸/小田洲"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#67","text":"neyke taa, 'unkayoh ne'an 'utarihi nospa kusu poohohcin ne'an ノッテル モンダカラ イッテ sanihi ne'ampe コンド 'ohoo シテ 'ampene picika kusu kara yahka koyaykus yahka ne'an pecika yayne kemaha nii yohteh 'ike haaciri, honihi naske シタト. honihi naskehe ne'ampe ムシ kikiriダノ hemataダノ reekoh 'orowa 'asin.","translation":"それで、ウンカヨはその仲間を追いかけていたから、その子どもたちが下りて来た時は、水が深くなって、全く渡ることもできなくても、渡ろうとして足に木が引っかかって転んで、腹が裂けたとさ。腹が裂けて虫や何だかが、たくさんそこから出てきた。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/085/001#5","text":"pirka aynu ne e=an na ohoo rrrr hoho","translation":"良い人間におまえはなるよ","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"子守歌","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34712AP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/016#2","text":"（うーん。M）マゴ te monimahpo 'ani ike taa 'ahciyehehcin tura 'okayahci manu. 'ahciyehehcin tura 'okayahci yayne taa, niinahci koh kuruhci, ceh koykihci koh 'ehci, 'ehahtahci koh 'ehci, nah kihci 'okayahci yayne taa, sine too taa 'ahciyehehcin 'asini ike, nakene ka 'omanuwa 'isam.","translation":"（うーん。Ｍ）３人娘がいて、そのババと一緒にいたんだとさ。ババと一緒にいて、山にマキとりに行ってはくべ、魚とりに行っては食べ、ユリほりに行っては食べ、こうして暮らしていたが、ある日その娘たちのババがどこかへ行っていなくなってしまったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"魚の尾びれの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at16aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1581","text":"E,omanuwa ku=ek .","translation":"はい、行って来ます。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/772951887779729408","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/008#27","text":"\" 'ahka nee kusu neyke, ta'anteta taa mahta makan kusu neyke, puu 'an.\" manu. クラノコト puu ッテイウンタ。puu cise 'ohta 'okay moni.... horokewpo 'utah mah kayki sakahci manu. ta'ene rah tura 'oman kusu neyke tani nukante kusu.\"","translation":"「それでは、あっちの方、山の方へ行ったら倉がある」と言った。倉のことをpuuって言うんだ。その倉にいる娘、いや男たちは妻がいないそうだ。そこへ一緒に連れて行って会わせてやるよ」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"男探しの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at08aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/20#4","text":"“tani ran” nah yee hawhe an=nuu. seturu orowa rah_=an","translation":"（オオカミが）「さあ降りろ」と言う声が聞こえたので、（オオカミの）背中から降りた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ20 動詞の単数・複数２","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/014/2#11","text":"sinotcaki etoko ta hôsô ani ene i=núre hi, \"rokuon, rokuga, iteki ki yan. keitai-denwa iteki eywanke yan. ora pen-raito ka iteki eywanke yak pirka.\" sekor hawean.","translation":"開演前に、「録音・録画、携帯電話使用、ペンライト使用もご遠慮を」と放送で知らされる。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Siina Ringo Raibu-Repôto","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2131","text":"humne HON ku=nukar, humne ROKUON ku=nu wa ku=an.","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1743531207965720815","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/北東/様似","北海道/北東/釧路"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/034/1#6","text":"aynu yayyukar otta oyna sákorpe yaysama ucaskoma, tu usa itak re usa itak otta moyo sisam utar teke ani aynu orospe pon an onko kéray kampi ka ta pirka sikama wa an korkay, onne orospe páse ucaskoma anakne iminpi wa isam ne ruy ne tek, neya kampi oske ta an itak anak tane an itak uosa an usinnay no an.","translation":"アイヌが自ら謡うものの中には、聖伝、英雄叙事詩、即興歌、言い伝え、たくさんのいろいろな言葉がありました。数少ない和人の手によって、アイヌの物語は、ほんの少しだけ本の中にきちんと記録されています。古い物語や大切な言い伝えは消滅してしまっていて、この本の中の言葉はいまある言葉とは違っています。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"aynu itak anakne sípirka","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2016/3/30#0","text":"taan kamuy nekon kay a=kar wa sakorpe ne a=kar cik somo pirka ya?","translation":"この神（の声）をどうにかして英雄叙事詩にしたら良いのではないだろうか。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"30","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/h28radio_3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column8: ["ウポポイ職員インタビュー","北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/南西/沙流","北海道/南西/白老"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"center/010/04#127","text":"samorun kotan kotan noski ta","translation":"和人の村の中央で","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"松島トミさんの口承文芸 6","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou10-04.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#21","text":"…ay ku=ki korkay, neanpe patek kay somo ne hike, pumma ku=uk hi wenno en=ye wa. yaun sisam anak aynu puri, aynu amip neno an pe pokay eramuan nankor korkay, samorun utar kay repunmosir un utar kay, eramuan cik pirka ari ku=yaynu hi ene an hi. sisam arki etoko ta, an=utari sinna itak sinna amip korpa wa, sinna ucaroyki k…","translation":"B: 工房で働いているときに、差別的なことをいう人が何度か来ました。アイヌが木彫りをするときに和製の小刀を使うので、「本当にアイヌ文化か？ちがうんじゃない？」と小ばかにしてきました。「ぼくは勉強中なんで、おっしゃることがわかりません」とだけ言っておきました。居酒屋で「ウポポイで働いている」と言ったら知らない人にねたまれて「じゃあいい給料もらってんだな」といわれたこともありました。働いて食べはするけれどそれだけじゃないんですけど、給料をもらうことが悪いみたいに言われて。北海道の和人はアイヌの文化・服装くらいは知っていると思いますが、北海道外の人々や、海外の人々にも、知ってもらったら良いと思うことはこういうことです。和人が来る前には、私たちの仲間は違う言葉、違う服装をし、違う生活をしていたのが、なぜ和人と同じように暮らしているのか、をよく知ってもらえれば良いですね。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/027#4","text":"Orowa, ne kotan wano hopunpa as wa atuytomotuye, ayke, rera wen wa kusu Kupros kotan senpirike akus.","translation":"そこから船出したが、向かい風のためキプロス島の陰を航行し、","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"27","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/11#82","text":"senpirike ta oka=an konno","translation":"陰に隠れていると","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"シナ皮を背負ったクマ（1980）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%B7%E3%83%8A%E7%9A%AE%E3%82%92%E8%83%8C%E8%B2%A0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column10: ["北海道/南西/幌別","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#118","text":"<aynu nispa tan aynu kotan koirawkitupa koapkas h_i epittano sonno mawkopirka kamuy koinkar kunine seremaka a=us kus ne> ari yaynu=an.","translation":"＜アイヌの旦那が、このアイヌの村へ働きにやって来る間中は、全てのことで本当に運が良くなるよう、カムイが見守るよう、私が背後を守ろう＞と私は思いました。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/08#888","text":"yaunkur pakno seremaka yupke p","translation":"私たちの国の人くらい憑き神が強い者は","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ユペッの川尻の村の兄弟と沖の国の兄弟（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%A6%E3%83%9A%E3%83%83%E3%81%AE%E5%B7%9D%E5%B0%BB%E3%81%AE%E6%9D%91%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E3%81%A8%E6%B2%96%E3%81%AE%E5%9B%BD%E3%81%AE%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#45","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy (monimahpo,) 'iine'ahsuy pon horokewpo, 'e'ani 'e'ommoho ne'ampe 'aynu monimahpo. nee kusu taa pon 'etuhka tura 'an kusu 'an kusu, simma 'e'ommoho 'esan 'ewooneka kusu 'iki.\"","translation":"「あのね（姉さん）、あのね兄さん、お前の母さんは人間の娘だよ。でも母さんは今カラスの子と一緒にいるから、お前は明日お前の母さんに会いに行きなさい。」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/10#4","text":"simma nisahta e=numa e=nukara nankoh.","translation":"明日の朝起き（たら）見なさい","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ10 「...しなさい」命令文２","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/019/004#191","text":"sekor i=ye kor tu wenpa kamuy sirotatpa i=kopasrota","translation":"と、私に言いながら、何度も悪口をぶちまけ、私を罵った。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ポイサルンクㇽ」若い沙流の人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N019P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#46","text":"ari okay pe taye kane orowano kunne hene tokap hene or hunak un mawsamama a=ki rok ayne somo suy kusun sirki kuni a=ramu awa pon a=kor yupi cip upsor un esitciw sir ko murkosanpa ki rok kusu poro a=kor yupi otu siwenpa ore siwenpa sirotatpa hawe","translation":"言うとそれからは夜も昼もどこへなのか風に横様に吹きつけられたあげく，まさかそうなるとは思わなかったのに小さい兄さんが船の中へ頭から倒れてばったりと伏してしまったので大きい兄さんが何回も叱責を何度も悪口をぶちまける声はこうだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/021#77","text":"neeteh 'okaaketa taa, sinenehka 'an manu. sinenehka 'ani ike taa, 'anayne taa tetahcikah 'utah ka rihpo ka 'ahkasahci yahkayki taa nah yehci manu.","translation":"そうしてから一人で暮らしたとさ。一人でいるうちに、白鳥たちが空を飛びながらもこう言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カニの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at21aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/05#9","text":"A: tetahcikah.","translation":"A: 白鳥。","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第5課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3450","text":"ueci. ueci.","translation":"凍傷になる","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nakamoto-upaskuma2/002#10","text":"upas as wa mean korka ona utar nea ru or peka apkas ayne onaha yaykosiramsuypa p ene an hi, yar hos use a=anu yakun a=kema ueci wa apkas=an ka eaykap kusu a=unihi ta i=hosipire nankor sekor yaynu.","translation":"雪が降り、寒くなってきましたが、父親たちは同じ道をたどり続けていました。そして、父親はこう考えました。「破れた脚絆を取ってしまえば、足がしもやけで歩けなくなり、そうすれば家に返してくれるだろう」と。","collection":"アイヌの知恵・ウパㇱクマ2","document":"YAYWENNUKAR ORUSPE","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784880242354","source_slug":"upaskuma-2"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/021/3#24","text":"Zyopurin uwepakta tumsak wa, iki ayne 1917 pa ta mosir'hoppa ruwe ne.","translation":"ジョプリンはだんだん力がなくなり、ついに1917年に亡くなりました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"ragutaimu","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/2ti/003#13","text":"Korka, wen utar newa tusu ikici utar uwepakta wen ne kusu ne, ayne, mosma kur kokantama hemhem ki,","translation":"悪人や詐欺師は、惑わし惑わされながら、ますます悪くなっていきます。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"3","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/044/1#0","text":"Yunesuko or ta \"Kokusai-gengo-nen\" oruspe an","translation":"ユネスコで「国際言語年」の話がありました","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Yunesuko or ta \"Kokusai-gengo-nen\" oruspe an","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-exhibits/000#2","text":"korka aynu itak anakne 明治 okake wano an sisam puri kiyar irenka ani uweepakta somo a=eywanke wa a=isamka kor an ayne, 2009pa ta, yunesuko or wa “tane isam kor an noyne siri an itak” oro a=omare ruwe ne.","translation":"しかし、アイヌ語は明治以降、和人の同化政策で生活の中から失われていきました。その結果、2009(平成21)年、国連のユネスコによって消滅の危機にある言語と位置づけられたのです。","collection":"ウポポイ館内展示","document":"ことばを取り戻す","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-upopoy.jp/","source_slug":"upopoy-exhibits"}]

Korka, a=nunuke wa cikosinninup ne a=kar katu anakne ne okokko ramu a=ehorokare kuni kusu an anpe ne ruwe ne.","translation":"しかし、ヘビはあまり良い神ではありません。その年の穀物のところにあるのは良いことではあ りません。悪事を働くために（ヘビは倉に）そうしたのです。しかし、大切にして宝物にすることは その化物の心を反対にさせるためにすることなのです。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/ueda-shinyo/00#76","text":"V hoyyo menoko","translation":"精神の悪い女が","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"アカショウビンになったメナシの女（へイヌ）（1994）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E4%B8%8A%E7%94%B0%E3%83%88%E3%82%B7%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A2%E3%82%AB%E3%82%B7%E3%83%A7%E3%82%A6%E3%83%93%E3%83%B3%E3%81%AB%E3%81%AA%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%83%A1%E3%83%8A%E3%82%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%A5%B3%EF%BC%88%E3%81%B8%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8C%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881994%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

'okayahci yayne 'acahcipo ray manu.","translation":"背負って上って来て家へ入って来たのを見ると、クジラの脂だったとさ。クジラ、クジラの脂だったとさ。それから、子どもを育ててその脂を炊いて、保存用に分離して、その孫娘と一緒に、孫娘のことはmahmicihiっていうんだ。(うん、分かります。M) その子と一緒に食べているうちにその娘は少し大きくなった。少し大きくなると、炉ぶちのところへ行っては炉ぶちと自分の背を比べるのだとさ。まだ炉ぶちよりも短い。また少し経ったらまた炉ぶちと自分の背を比べたらもう自分の背のほうが長い。いま炉ぶちより大きくなってもう婿取りができるほどになった。婿取りができるほどになって、それから婿をとってそしてそれからその、暮らしていたがやがてババは死んだとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"さらわれた娘 -84","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at01aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#301","text":"pirikahi nee wakayki taa ahkari pirika","translation":"美しかったが、いっそう美しい","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"express-special/002#4","text":"hekaci: ahsuy pateh an=ee koroka, kamuy ahkari iso an=konupuru.","translation":"男の子：１回だけ食べたことがあるけど、アザラシよりクマが好きだな。","collection":"ニューエクスプレス・スペシャル 日本語の隣人たち I+II","document":"アザラシよりクマが好きだな","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560089231","source_slug":"new-express-special-neighbors"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/024/004#75","text":"“siknu kewe epunpa sinne yak kor ray=an pa hike","translation":"生きた死骸を堀りだしたようであれば（？）、我らは死んでいたところだが","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「スㇽクトノ　イピㇼマ」トリカブトの女神の警告","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N024P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#7","text":"ku ani a=epunpa wa, corpoki a=kus kor kira=an w_a, hemesu=an ayne, <ne> erikoma wa arpa p pet ne kusu, kari hemesu=an ayne, inu=an akusu, inne topaha i=kesampa wa arki hawe as. pet turasi ki hine, top sar eukamu wa arikinne ironne p ne kusu, oro pak arki wa oro wa","translation":"弓で（竹の）先端をもち上げて、その下を通って逃げ、山を上って行くと、高い所から流れて来ている川なので、それに沿って上って行って、耳をそばだてると、大勢の人間が私達を追いかけてくる声が聞こえる。川を上って追いかけて来ると、竹やぶがとても深くなっているので、そこまでやって来て、","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/007#82","text":"V a=epunpa na","translation":"私が支えて","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"カッコウの妻になった女","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

Kamuy kusu cipacipa yan: Sinuma ku=ko-yay-irayke ki kusu ne kusu ne ne na, Sinuma anakne ku=iporo pirkare Kamuy ne.","translation":"なぜうなだれるのか、わたしの魂よなぜ呻くのか。神を待ち望め。わたしはなお、告白しよう「御顔こそ、わたしの救い」と。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"42","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/00#620","text":"tan... irayke ka","translation":"この…人殺しも","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"犬と一緒に育てられた少年（1980）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E7%8A%AC%E3%81%A8%E4%B8%80%E7%B7%92%E3%81%AB%E8%82%B2%E3%81%A6%E3%82%89%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/imosirkokiru#556","text":"okay=an ka somo ne yakanakne suy iyotta iyaykipte hi es=korura=an usa ikiwaikip irayke hi es=eikasuy nankor na .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"野良アイヌ・ルﾌﾟネイケ (@imosirkokiru)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/imosirkokiru/status/411322635457273856","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/037#85","text":"keta woro won nee","translation":"keta woro won nee","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"フキとりの話－89","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at37aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/001#35","text":"Tata or ta ne hawturunpe ese wa sinuma or ta ene itak hi :— Askanne Ramat ekasi keta ek wa Iyotta Rikunrbe kiroro e kamu kusu ne; tanpe kusu, eani oro wano hekatu kusu ne ap anakne “Askannep” ani a=ye, Kamuy Roho ani a=ye kusu ne na.","translation":"あなたの親類のエリサベトも、年をとっているが、男の子を身ごもっている。不妊の女と言われていたのに、もう六か月になっている。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"sentoku/1#51","text":"keta potoloko kasiketa okay=ahci","translation":"天井（＝屋根と思われる）の上に（水が）ありました（？）。","collection":"千徳太郎治のピウスツキ宛書簡","document":"第2の手紙","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023326/","source_slug":"sentoku-pilsudski-letters"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/055/4#3","text":"Ney ta neanpe nekkono owat poronno okay wa siran!","translation":"どこにそんなにエゾアカガエルがたくさんいたのでしょうか!","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Kushiro-shitsugen","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#84","text":"i=pa nekkono an tu sikupkur an etupok kari rerasuy ne ahun=an.","translation":"私の年と同じくらいである。二人の青年がいる。煙出しの穴からつむじ風となって入った。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2022/4/51#7","text":"upas nekkono retar","translation":"雪のように白い","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"51","dialect":"北東","dialect_path":"北海道/北東","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/2022AinugoradioVol.4_a4.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/010#10","text":"makan oka poro kamuy ka[7] oskonpa kor","translation":"特別に大きなクマも捕まえては","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 10」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=9","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#107","text":"tane anakne asinuma ka <ka> kemapase=an pe ne korka, a=kokowutari ne yakka a=poutari ne yakka, nep ka ekimne yakka pirka yuk patek pirka kamuy patek oskonpa wa arki wa, a=i=tak ka ki p ne kusu, nep a=esirkirap ka somo ki no, <no> nep ka etoyta pa hikeka, i=kousaraye pa p ne kusu, onne=an y_akka, kemapase=an y_akka, nep…","translation":"もはや私も年をとったが、婿たちも息子たちも、狩に行っても、立派なシカばかり、立派なクマばかり捕ってきては、私たちを招いてくれるので、何不自由なく、何か畑で作物がとれると、私たちに分けてくれるので、年とっても、足が重くなっても、何を食べたいとも、何を欲しいとも思わずに年老いた。","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nakamoto-kamuyyukar/999#94","text":"oskonpa na","translation":"追いついた","collection":"カムイユカㇻを聞いてアイヌ語を学ぶ","document":"裸のキツネ","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086803","source_slug":"learning-ainu-through-kamuy-yukar"}]

Sekine Kenji sekor ku=rehe an. Sisirmuka Niptani kotan or ta k=an wa, yaykata ka aynu itak k=eyaypakasnu kor hekattar utar k=epakasnu ka ki ruwe ne.","translation":"こんにちは。関根健司といいます。沙流川沿いの二風谷に住んでいて、自分自身でもアイヌ語を勉強しながら子どもたちにも教えています。","collection":"ニューエクスプレスプラス アイヌ語","document":"ナレーターからのメッセージ","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086391","source_slug":"new-express-plus-ainu"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/QWaddix#522","text":"irankarapte Oripakno Sekine nispa Matne utar usa okai Ainu itak poro pon kampi y-yayraykere","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"Qateri Waddi (@QWaddix)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/QWaddix/status/1801853397097738376","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/064/4#4","text":"Cipiyak neya, Apeucihuci neya, tannekamuy neya, etaspe neya, etucikere neya, usa oka kamuy utar ye oyna ne wa, a=nukar kor síno a=eyáykopuntek pe ne ruwe ne.","translation":"オオジシギや、火の女神や、龍王神や、トド (キタアシカ) や、トガリネズミや、様々な神たちの謡う神謡であり、読めばとても面白いものです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"\"Ainu-no-kamigami-no-monogatari\" (Oyna)","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2019/4/45#1","text":"mici: teeta anakne orikasiimak meske kor cise kitay ta an=eyapkir pe ne. orasiimak meske kor una oske an=omare p ne. orowano apeucihuci or en “pirka imak enci=kore nankor na” ari awki=an pe ne.","translation":"お父さん： 昔は、上の歯がぬけたら、屋根の上に投げたんだよ。下の歯が抜けたら炉の灰に入れんだよ。それから、「良い歯をさずかりますように」ととなえたんだよ。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"45","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/2019.Ainugoradio_vol.4.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/bihoro-intro/02#0","text":"apeucihuci, apeuciekasi.","translation":"火の神さま","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"２月カムイに感謝をする","dialect":"美幌","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/美幌","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/bihoro_nyumon.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/018#158","text":"apasam’un kamuy ATA KOO, apa orta, utaspa utek'anpa SITE[266], oka ruwe ne hi,","translation":"出入り口の神様方がこう、戸口のところに、互いに手を押さえていることを、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（後半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=18","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/psa/065#11","text":"Aokay anakne nuye an no ne ata usike kata wakka cari, Ne tane-ru kasike e=ramamke: Sasne-sasne an apto ani ne anpe hapurure ruwe ne; Aokay nunuke wa ne anpe siparaspare ruwe ne na.","translation":"畝を潤し、土をならし豊かな雨を注いで柔らかにし芽生えたものを祝福してくださるからです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"65","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/005#45","text":"kotan noski eun *ata ...","translation":"村の中央の方へ（行って）","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"イクレスイェニｼパ、ホイナシﾘへ行く","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#17","text":"sekor yaynu=an kusu, neun ka <ka> kotanhunara=an, aynuhunara=an w_a inkar=an sekor yaynu=an kusu, orowa a=kor sontak teke ani hine a=tura wa, top corpok a=opospa wa, orowa, orowano kotanhunara=an pe ne kusu, aynu-hunara=an pe ne kusu, neun paye=an humi ne ya ka a=eramuskari kor payeka=an ayne, kotan a=pa ruwe ene an h_…","translation":"と思ったので、どうにかして村を探し、人を探してみようと思ったので、そこで赤ん坊の手を引いて連れて行って、竹の下をくぐっていって、そして、村を探しに、人を探しに、どこへ行ったらいいのかもわからぬままに歩き回っているうちに、村を見つけた。","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/10#786","text":"aynuhunara=an kusu","translation":"人を探すために","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"伝染病で生き残った男の話（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BC%9D%E6%9F%93%E7%97%85%E3%81%A7%E7%94%9F%E3%81%8D%E6%AE%8B%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E7%94%B7%E3%81%AE%E8%A9%B1%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/035#132","text":"ora \"ika nen ka aynuhunara=an ciki aynu a=pa wa\"","translation":"そこで「誰か人を探して、見つけなければ」","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"金の小函ゆらゆら","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/030#20","text":"\" keh, ci'oka ka cikii 'anah ci'ee ! \"","translation":"「フン、自分で食うわい！」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"川上男と川下男","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at30aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2005/2/18#4","text":"cioka toyta=as.","translation":"私たちは畑を耕した。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"18","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/05-2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/shizunai-intermediate/18#2","text":"cioka ka huci nisew un=kore.","translation":"私たちにも祖母がどんぐりをくれた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ 18 「私」「あなた」人称代名詞","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/shizunai_t.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#89","text":"rap=an ayne a=kor a mosir cioposore pokna mosir opospa wa rap=an ayne a=ye rok kuni yacine mosir teyne mosir a=koesoyosma inkar=an ruwe ene oka hi","translation":"下りるうちに人間の国をくぐりぬけ下の国を通り抜けて下りたあげくいわゆる谷地の国湿った国にパッと飛び込んで見たのはこのようだった。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-komoriuta/00#6","text":"cioposore haahaa","translation":"通り抜け","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"60のゆりかご（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E5%AD%90%E5%AE%88%E6%AD%8C+60%E3%81%AE%E3%82%86%E3%82%8A%E3%81%8B%E3%81%94%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/079/005#4","text":"hayya cioposore","translation":"突き抜けて","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"まつ子さんのレパートリーについて（冒頭135字削除）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34703AP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/007#78","text":"hawean kor (ra) néa rupne mat ka matkosanu orikikutkor pa siri a=nukár tek kor, cisoekatta=an wa,","translation":"言うと、その老人もパッと立ち上がって帯を高く締める様子を私はちらっと見ながら、家を飛び出して、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その2）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=6","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/011/002#67","text":"sekor kane hawean akus nea menoko hopattektek cisoekatta","translation":"そう言われたのでその女（嫁）はさっと飛ぶように家をとび出して行った。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「シㇼマオッテ」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N011P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3503","text":"cisoekatta","translation":"飛び出す","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column8: ["AA研アイヌ語資料","平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/010#5","text":"i=omaruye [5] citomteresu a=i=ekarkar kor pirka sukup a=ki wa an=an ayne a=koporo","translation":"私は大事にして育てられて、丈夫にすくすくと育ち成長した。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 10」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=9","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/007/002#1","text":"orano poro a=kor yupi easir citomteresu i=ekarkar pa","translation":"大きい兄はそれこそ、私をきれいに磨くように大事に育て","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケソラㇷ゚　カムイ　イレス」孔雀の神に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N007P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#0","text":"a=kor ekasi citomteresu ciararesu i=ekarkar","translation":"お爺さんが私を大事に育てて立派に育ててくれていた。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column8: ["AA研アイヌ語資料","平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/007#284","text":"suy ek hum konna citunaska.","translation":"またやってくる音が早くなりました。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その2）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=6","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/002#166","text":"kasi citunaska","translation":"急いで助け","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（１）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（１）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#63","text":"koyoyamokte a=ki kane kor oka=an awa sineantota ruwesan ka ta pirakka us kur arki humi citunaska kas apa or_ ta arki ki kor tu noiwan suy re noiwan suy apa akkari","translation":"不思議に思っていたがある日のこと浜への下り口に下駄を履いた人が来る音は急いでいるようで仮小屋の戸のところに来ると何十回も何十回も戸を通りすぎる。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/006#52","text":"orano okakehe ta nea kamuy turespo ri cininuype i=eanu","translation":"それから、その後で例の神の妹は高枕に私を置いて","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「アトゥイソカタ　クッタㇻ　モシㇼ」海の上のイタドリの国","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#1174","text":"eanu nanuhu iporo pirka ruwe.","translation":"あなたの顔色はいいですね。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#55","text":"oro ta nesi ape teksam ta ri cininuype a=i=eanu wa orsamkonna koyaysikarun a=ki ruwe ne.","translation":"そこで火のそばで私は高い枕をあてがわれてそこで私は意識を取り戻したのだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/056/0#1","text":"Karahuto 'aynu 'itah nah 'ay=yeepe neyke Karahuto 'ohta 'enciw 'utah kii 'itah neewa kayki 'asinno ku=nuu 'ike 'oya mosiri 'oro'un 'itah neeno ku=nuu.","translation":"樺太アイヌ語というものは樺太でエンチュウ (樺太アイヌ) 達が用いた言葉ですが、初めて私が聞いたら外国語のように聞こえました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Karahuto'aynu'itah","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#360","text":"arikirihi enciw","translation":"片方の血統は人間","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1569582525579952128","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/08#3","text":"enciw ka hannehka nee kamuyhenke nee","translation":"（あの翁は）人間ではない、神の翁だ","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ8 文のかたち3「～は～だ」という表現","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/000#1","text":"e=aynumitpo ku=ne wa tapne ekasi itak koitaraye ku=ki kusu ku=kor mici kampi kurka enuye itak iresu huci ekoytakkar ku=ki hawe ne.","translation":"私は若輩者であって，このとおり父祖のことばがわからなくなったので私の父が紙の上に書いたことばを育ての媼神に捧げ唱え申し上げるのです。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"inonnoytak-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/shinyo/03#1358","text":"sirkunpato enuye ci kane","translation":"指図??しながら","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ハチの姉妹と雷神（シﾘクンパト）（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%8F%E3%83%81%E3%81%AE%E5%A7%89%E5%A6%B9%E3%81%A8%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%88%E3%82%B7%EF%BE%98%E3%82%AF%E3%83%B3%E3%83%91%E3%83%88%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1901","text":"Ikokkahaytakur ene na .Kunuye tuwit otta nep enukar wa tampe neno enuye rusuy ya ka anarerampetek pe ne na .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/795229917675827201","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/017/004#11","text":"a=enuyekar","translation":"彫られていました","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"カムイユカㇻ「カンヌサカチューレ」クマゲラとウミスズメの由来","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N017P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#27","text":"poro re uymam cip cip hon kurka rep ta rok kamuy ya ta rok kamuy tu noka orke re noka orke a=enuyekar","translation":"大きい三艘の貿易船の船の胴体の表面に沖に座す神陸に座す神の多くの姿数多の姿が彫られている。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-komoriuta/00#34","text":"a=enuyekar haahao","translation":"描かれている","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"60のゆりかご（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E5%AD%90%E5%AE%88%E6%AD%8C+60%E3%81%AE%E3%82%86%E3%82%8A%E3%81%8B%E3%81%94%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]
