column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/007/002#266","text":"nea pon menoko ka ineap yuptek wa siriki ya ka eramiskarino","translation":"例の若い女も、なんとまあ、しっかりとした働き者であるかわからないほど","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケソラㇷ゚　カムイ　イレス」孔雀の神に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N007P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"center/011/04#273","text":"（ne）neun ne yakka a=eramiskarino","translation":"どうあっても私は知らずに","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"ネコに殺されそうになった友人を助けた男の話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou11-04.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/006#15","text":"B: hekattar hekota ci=ki p ne yakka, porokur utar arikikino eutanne p ne. kuani ka samormosir cuppok un kotan or wa ku=ek pe ne kusu, aynu utar eramiskarino arki utar ene yaynu humi ku=eraman he ki wa, uneno an yaynu ci=kor kor ukoytak=as easkay nankor. ora, te ta ku=monrayke ayne, sisam ku=ne hi tantane ku=eraman. tan…","translation":"B: 子供向けのプログラムでも 大人の方が熱心に参加してくれますね 私も関西出身なので 初めてアイヌについて学ぶ人の感覚がわかるというか 近い気持ちで話せるのではないかと思います また ここで働くようになって 自分は和人だったんだとだんだん実感しました 今までは 学校でも自分の身の回りにも 和人しかいないという感覚だったので 自分自身のルーツも あまり考える機会がありませんでした けれど今は 同僚がアイヌとして思うことをいろいろ聞かせてくれるので なおさら 自分は和人なので 感覚の違いがあることも理解しました それだけではなく 共感できることがあることも 知りました","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　ラリウ【アイヌ語・幌別方言】","dialect":"幌別方言","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QS76Suygcgk","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

column8: ["AA研アイヌ語資料","アイヌ語アーカイブ","アイヌ語弁論大会"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#16","text":"nenkane wa ponmat a=kor wa si-sam esirkirapte kuni a=erámpokiwen wa,","translation":"第二の妻を持って私のそばで彼女を困らせるのではと私は可哀想になり、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/04#278","text":"nep a=esirkirapte somo ki no","translation":"何の不自由もさせないで","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"エゾマツと魔鳥（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A8%E3%82%BE%E3%83%9E%E3%83%84%E3%81%A8%E9%AD%94%E9%B3%A5%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-benron/27/00#17","text":"…a mosir hoppa. sonno kampinuye easkay pe ne wa, orowa yupke rampo kor pe ne kuni ku=ramu korka, siketoko takne p aynu ne wa kusu, kotan utur ta a=esina a=esirkirapte p cieramnukare wa, iruska kewtum itak ne kar kuni, pewre kaspa somo ki nankor ya. orowa pirka tokuye an wa ne yak easir, ikokantama siri a=eraman wa itak…","translation":"また、知里さんは若くして世を去りました。非常に勉学に秀でた女性ですし、強い心を持っていたと思いますが、社会の隠された問題を見抜き、怒りを言葉にするには若過ぎたのではないでしょうか。曖昧にされている問題を言葉にするには、良い友に恵まれる必要もあります。知里さんの周囲には、そういう意味で良い出会いは無く、孤独に過ごしていたのではないでしょうか。知里さん自身は、差別に対して激しい感情を持っていたと伝えられています。しかし、それをシサㇺに向かって発することは、若い女性には困難なことです。","collection":"アイヌ語弁論大会","document":"知里幸恵生誕120年に思う事","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/itakanro/files/r05_pg_22.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-speech-contest"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#39","text":"kamuy ne... or ta neyakka a=eunara pakno an siretokkor","translation":"神の中でも惜しまれるほどの美貌","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/006/003#98","text":"a=kor kosonte a=e=koyok hike makani a=eunara hawe.”","translation":"私の小袖をあなたに売っても、なにを惜しむことがあろうか」","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「チシナオッ　イタㇰ　ハウェ　アヌ」死人の声を私は聞いた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N006P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/09#514","text":"a=eunara ka somo ki kusu ne na.","translation":"嫌ということもないですよ。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ワシ神の化身と人間の娘（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%AF%E3%82%B7%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E5%8C%96%E8%BA%AB%E3%81%A8%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%AE%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/012#38","text":"poo korohci 'ike taa hempah poo ka korohci. kihci yayne taa 'orowa ne'an poohohcin taa, 'okayahci 'ike kotampa 'etuhturihci, mosiripa 'etuhturihci kihci yayne taa rihpo ka 'ahkas cikah ka 'okore tehkupihi sayayse 'ike 'uynahci 'ike muysankeh ne naa, sahka ne naa korohcipe nee manu.","translation":"子どももできて何人か子どもをもった。こうしてからその子どもたちもたくさんになって、村も大きくなり、国も大きくなって、空飛ぶ鳥もみんな羽を振って落として、拾ってホウキやハシにしたということだ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"豊漁の神","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at12aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/9/001#14","text":"hempah wan pa ka an wenporo esaman","translation":"何十年も生きたとても大きなカワウソが","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"カワウソのばけもの（エサマン チャラハウ）","dialect":"樺太（西海岸南部・多蘭泊）","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸","region":"樺太","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/73720/08_sakaguchi.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/26#2","text":"hempah poo ka korohci.","translation":"幾人もの子供をもうけた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ26 疑問詞を用いた疑問表現1","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/032#135","text":"'orowa ne'ampe taa, neya niinankorope tani 'ampa wa makani ike, kinta makan teh taa, cise 'osmaketa 'ampa wa makan teh taa, 'inawehe kara teh taa nii hekopas taa hotarika manu.","translation":"それから、その木の人形を持って山へ行って、山の方へ行って、家の後ろの山へ持って行って、イナウを作ってnii hekopasを立てたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"チッポ虫","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at32aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#27","text":"hotarika manu.","translation":"立てたという。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/24#2","text":"tani oken kara manuyke cise osmake ta hotarika manu.","translation":"今、魔除けの像を作って、家の後ろに立てたそうだ","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ24 位置関係の表現１","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#302","text":"hemanta mak an pe ne ruwe ne ya sorekusu tu imerukur re imerukur cise onnay etusnatki kane","translation":"何が、どんなものなのか、それこそ二つの輝き、三つの輝きが家の中に満ち溢れ","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/11#18","text":"tu imerukur re imerukur tuytuye kane","translation":"２つの光３つの光がこぼれ落ちるくらいで","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"兄と交易に行った妹（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%85%84%E3%81%A8%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E3%81%AB%E8%A1%8C%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E5%A6%B9%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/007#29","text":"V tu imerukur","translation":"ふたつの光","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"カッコウの妻になった女","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/008#12","text":"nah taa hecirehci wa sapahci manuyke taa, cisehehcin ta 'ahupahci manu. 'ahupahci manuyke taa, taa sineh 'imiyehe 'uh mii. tah ku'ani ku'imiyehe sineh 'uh. アノー sine 'imii taa monimahpo kocupu teh 'ahcahcipo kocupu teh 'ama'ike neya 'imiyehe 'ehekempa 'ehekempa koh 'o'isuu manu. neyke taa 'ene yehci manu.","translation":"といって踊りながら下りてきて、家の中へ入って来たとさ。入って来て、その着物を一枚とって着た。それぞれ自分の着物をとった。そのある着物には娘がくるまれていて、あのババがくるんでおいたのを、その着物を引っぱったが固かったとさ。それで皆でこう話したとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"男探しの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at08aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/08#4","text":"B: henke 'imii 'an=kara kusu 'an.","translation":"B: おじいさんの着物を作っているんだ。","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第8課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/31#2","text":"sas neeno hohto imii mii aynu. ica ica ica!","translation":"昆布みたいな（ボロボロの）着物を着た奴。汚い汚い汚い！","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ31 連体修飾表現","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/014/2#6","text":"yayan dahuya anakne \"tiketto somo e=kor yakun k=eyyok na. tane e=kor yakun ku=hok na\" sekor hawean korka, ne to ta anakne \"tiketto isam ruwe ne ya?\" sekor patek oyakoyak un utar kopisipa ruwe ne.","translation":"普通ダフ屋は「チケットないなら売るよ。あるなら買うよ」というのだが、今回は「チケットないか?」と、そればかりあちこちに声をかけている。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Siina Ringo Raibu-Repôto","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#3710","text":"umma k=eyyok rusuy kusu ikotcane kur ku=tak.","translation":"馬を私は買いたいので仲立ち人を私は呼んだ。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"express-new/03#8","text":"hoku: tanpe k=eyam pe ne kusu somo k=eyyok.","translation":"夫：これは僕が大事にしているものだから、売らないんだ。","collection":"ニューエクスプレスプラス アイヌ語","document":"どこから来たの？","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086391","source_slug":"new-express-plus-ainu"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/017#179","text":"“onon ek katkamat e=an kus karaypo siknu=an.","translation":"その娘は「あなたがどこからか来てくれたお蔭で私は生き延びることができました。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 Moyuk（前半）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=17","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/041/0#6","text":"Oosuga katkamat \"pon horkew kamuy yayeyukar\" ye ruwe ne.","translation":"大須賀さんは、「エゾオオカミの小神の自叙伝」をやってくれました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Hokkaidoo-Esuperanto-Taikai","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/08#107","text":"Otasut pito Otasut kamuy katkamat","translation":"オタスッの貴人、オタスッの淑女が","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"オタスッとオタサㇺの忘れ形見（1981）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%AA%E3%82%BF%E3%82%B9%E3%83%83%E3%81%A8%E3%82%AA%E3%82%BF%E3%82%B5%E3%87%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%BF%98%E3%82%8C%E5%BD%A2%E8%A6%8B%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/018/004#33","text":"“hemanta i=katkar kus ene kanna ranke(?) an kor","translation":"「何が俺を惑わせていつでも何度でも","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ウッコッナイ　アイヌ　アネ」好色が元で死んだ男の話（途中でテープ切れ）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N018P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/31#89","text":"“nep wenkamuy hene i=katkar kusu","translation":"「何か悪神に化かされたために","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"狐に化かされた若者を助けた娘（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E7%8B%90%E3%81%AB%E5%8C%96%E3%81%8B%E3%81%95%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E8%8B%A5%E8%80%85%E3%82%92%E5%8A%A9%E3%81%91%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-uepeker/003#132","text":"nep wen kamuy i=katkar kusu ene iki an i tan?’","translation":"何の悪霊が 私についてこんなことになったのだろう』","collection":"知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）","document":"Kemram kamuy nō-tonoho itak","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784832804029","source_slug":"chiri-yukie-uwepeker"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/080/3#6","text":"Okake ta uweypak ta sirpirka korka, ne hikarikaisen anak an ayne no wen. Ku=kor cise onnay ta an modemu hempak suy ka asinno denki a=kar a korka, pirkano monrayke ka somo ki. Ku=kor cise anakne manshon ne kusu, ne manshon or ta an kikai a=utápke yak easir pirka ruwe ne.","translation":"その後徐々に天気は回復しましたが、その光回線はそのままダメでした。私の家の中にあるモデムを何度も新しく電気を付け（再起動をし）ましたが、きちんと働きません。私の家はマンションなので、そのマンションにある機械を修理しないといけないのです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Kamuyhum as hi ta","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#3399","text":"tane pakno moymoyke wa an KIKAI as wa an na.","translation":"今まで動いていた機械が止まっているよ。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#1692","text":"inosisi orowa maskin cikottoi awente kusu kikai cieywanke ka eaikap siri ta an.","translation":"イノシシに想像以上に畑を荒らされて機械が使えない有り様なのです。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1707236718506848427","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#11","text":"…uan kay somo ki. an=utari uekarpa wa, rimse uske en, ku=hapo en=tura wa oman pe ne kusu, neanpe ku=nukar ranke, tantane kuani usa ku=eramuan wa ku=rimse. ku=korupo usa neno rimse eramuan. kampinukatcise or en ku=oman pakno, aynu newa sisam sinnatoyne an pe ne ari ku=yaynu kay somo ki. tan mosir ta uneno okay utar ne ar…","translation":"B: 物心つくころにはいつのまにか知っていました。自分がアイヌだとは言っても「アイヌとはこういうものだ」と詳しくはわかっていませんが。アヌタリが集まって踊るところに、母に連れられて行っていて、踊りを見ているうちにだんだん覚えて自分も踊りました。兄もそうやって踊りを覚えました。学校に行くまで、アイヌと和人が別なものだとも思わずにいました。日本の中に同じように暮らしている人々だとばかり思っていました。学校でアイヌの話を聞いても、和人がアイヌを差別したことは習いませんでした。地元の博物館に行って、アイヌと日本人は別に暮らしていたのを見た程度です。先住民などについての話は、大学に行ってからはじめて学びました。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2019/1/08#0","text":"hapo: etak opuni wa sipinpa yan. tanto inkian imi e=mi ya? e=korupo siwnin imi mi ari awki. kunne ker us ari awki.","translation":"お母さん： 起きて、着替えなさい。今日はどの服を着るの？お兄ちゃんは青の服を着ると言っていたわよ。靴は黒にするって。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"8","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/u3f86t0000058mqj.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/tokachi-beginner/17#1","text":"ku=korupo en=koiruska.","translation":"兄が私に怒った","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ 17 人称について学ぶ 5「私を・私たちを...する」の表現","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/tokachi_s.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#426","text":"patek i=kosiknu wa an pe a=akihi","translation":"唯一生き残った、私の身よりの弟を","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/02#799","text":"i=kosiknu siri ene an kusu","translation":"生きているので","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ききんの神さま（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8D%E3%81%8D%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%95%E3%81%BE%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/030/003#27","text":"“hempak a=utari patek i=kosiknu ruwe ne wa","translation":"「何人かの村人は生き残り","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"同・散文説話（部分）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34636ABP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/032#122","text":"nukoan pe ne korka asinuma a... a... a=kuwehe oro osma pa p po etakasure rupne pa pekor,","translation":"獲物をたくさん獲るのだが、私の仕掛け弓に入るものたちが、なおひときわ大きいように","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・山田慎太郎聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 22","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=32","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/001/002#35","text":"oraun konto a=we… a=kuwehe kamuy osma したんだとよ.","translation":"そうしているうちに、仕掛け弓に熊が掛ったのです。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ユㇰ シキ セイレカ」鹿の目玉を炒る","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N001P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/029#95","text":"\"tan pe a=poho kuwehe ne.\" sekor hawean kor kuwari ruwe ne.","translation":"「これは私の息子です」と言いながら、弓を仕掛けてくれる。","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"村長の奥さんの墓を掘り返した貧乏人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

Aa Israeru kor Kamuy, E hunara utar iteki en kusu sanpe akokurusere kuni ne kar wa en=kore.","translation":"万軍の主、わたしの神よあなたに望みをおく人々がわたしを恥としませんように。イスラエルの神よあなたを求める人々がわたしを屈辱としませんように。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"69","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/12#632","text":"a=mare a=satkere ora","translation":"焼き干しにさせました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"供養をしてくれる人を探す墓標（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BE%9B%E9%A4%8A%E3%82%92%E3%81%97%E3%81%A6%E3%81%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%82%8B%E4%BA%BA%E3%82%92%E6%8E%A2%E3%81%99%E5%A2%93%E6%A8%99%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/048/1#43","text":"Nanbu nispa iway-icen emkoho uk wa, Kobayasi nispa, Masukawa nispa mimaraha ukousaraye ruwe ne na.","translation":"南部先生が賞金の半分を取り、そのまた半分を小林益川両氏が分け合ったよ。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Nobel-syô","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/010/04#196","text":"mimaraha Piratur or ta e=se wa","translation":"その残りを平取に背負って","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"松島トミさんの口承文芸 6","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou10-04.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#4564","text":"yam poronno k=uomare wa k=ek na. mimaraha eci=kore wa.","translation":"栗をたくさん集めてきたよ。半分あなたにあげるわ。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/007#105","text":"homar pewtanke kor niwenhorippa hene ki pa sinne pekor iki pa kor,","translation":"かすかにペウタンケして（危急の叫び声を挙げて）、ニウェンホリッパ（神々に注意を促す行進）もするようにしながら、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その2）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=6","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#5161","text":"niwenhorippa=an wa paye siri osno ku=sapo utar anakne pewtanke kor niwenhorippa kor inawcipa or un paye siri ku=nukar.","translation":"変死人が出たときの儀式的な行進を私たちはして行く後から、お姉さんたちは危急の叫びをあげつつ、変死人が出たときの儀式的な行進をしながら幣場まで行くのを見た。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/ueda-minwa/08#281","text":"niwenhorippa pa kor oka hi","translation":"凶事の際の踏舞をしているのを","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"カツラの舟とハリギリの舟のけんか（1996）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E4%B8%8A%E7%94%B0%E3%83%88%E3%82%B7%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%AB%E3%83%84%E3%83%A9%E3%81%AE%E8%88%9F%E3%81%A8%E3%83%8F%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AE%E3%83%AA%E3%81%AE%E8%88%9F%E3%81%AE%E3%81%91%E3%82%93%E3%81%8B%EF%BC%881996%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/003#33","text":"neyke tani taa, (horokewpo taa,) monimahpo taa, 'ampa teh 'ahun teh taa, neya 'ohta 'okay 'aynu 'uta, taa 'ohta taa, tani monimahpo 'utah neya horokewpo taa 'eerehe ne'ampe taa, tah reekoh keera 'an 'ipe, nn...","translation":"それで今度その、(男はその、) 娘はその、それを持って帰って来て、そこにいた人たちに、女たちや男たちに食べさせたら、それはそれはおいしい食物だった。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カエルの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at03aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/007#14","text":"nn han ruru han ruru ha nn","translation":null,"collection":"elpr-a2","document":"イフンケ 2 (子守歌2)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-yukar/02#867","text":"sikno nn...","translation":"いっぱいに","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ポイヤウンペとスマメノコ（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%EF%BE%97%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%9D%E3%82%A4%E3%83%A4%E3%82%A6%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%81%A8%E3%82%B9%E3%83%9E%E3%83%A1%E3%83%8E%E3%82%B3%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/002#18","text":"nah yehci i=nuurehci. nean an=onaha","translation":"こう言って私に聞かせた。父や","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 2 (言い伝え2)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"express-special/003#7","text":"wooya an itah haciko hekaci ku=nuurehci","translation":"私は小さい男の子に色々な言葉を聞かせた。","collection":"ニューエクスプレス・スペシャル 日本語の隣人たち I+II","document":"馬をたくさん見たよ","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560089231","source_slug":"new-express-special-neighbors"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/25#3","text":"ku=wante pe tani emuyke kesto asinkoh ku=yee iike ku=nuurehci.","translation":"私が知っていること全て、毎日言って聞かせている。","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ25 動詞の単数・複数２","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/015/0#4","text":"Pauahi ôzyo anakne, Kamehameha ôke or ta iyotta iyosno an santeke ne a korka, ó ne hi kopan ruwe ne.","translation":"パウアヒ王女は、カメハメハ王家最後の子孫でしたが、王になることを嫌がりました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Bisyoppu Myûziamu","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#88","text":"oke..., oke..., kara an oken","translation":"作っておいた木人形を","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/19#991","text":"ikir a=oke...","translation":"終えました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イクレスイェとカラス神（1984）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%E3%81%A8%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B9%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881984%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/010/001#85","text":"kiyanne hike oronne a.","translation":"年長の方が横座から座った。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「オタサムン カムイ ヘカッタㇻ」オタサㇺのカムイの子ども達","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N010P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#827","text":"cise oronne anu yan.","translation":"家の上座に置いて下さい。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/035#170","text":"poniwne noyne an h_ike harkiso peka oronne ek h_ine ape ari.","translation":"年下らしいほうは、左座の下手に来て、火をたいた。","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"金の小函ゆらゆら","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/022/007#164","text":"orano konto tamkur poki a=osanosan","translation":"それから今度は、（アトゥイヤウンクㇽの）刀の前に踊り出て","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N022P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/005#0","text":"ki ruy maskin mismurayke a=ki kusu sineantota Sisirmuka a=kor petpo santapkasi a=osan’osan","translation":"あまりにも私は退屈で死にそうだったのである日沙流川（という）私たちの川に（天の国から）下りた。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/11#368","text":"apesam osan'osan","translation":"炉のそばに来て","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"シナ皮を背負ったクマ（1980）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%B7%E3%83%8A%E7%9A%AE%E3%82%92%E8%83%8C%E8%B2%A0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/010/001#86","text":"poniwne hike outunne a kane oharkiso un","translation":"若い方が木尻座から座り、左座に","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「オタサムン カムイ ヘカッタㇻ」オタサㇺのカムイの子ども達","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N010P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3617","text":"taan wen wakka outunne osura yan.","translation":"この汚い水を家の下手へ捨てなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#36","text":"yakka oya no suru kotodamono to omotte tatteita, sorede owarunokana to omotte, doko sa ka sono hureayusni asinru yori utu.. outunne or un hapo osura kusu arpa noyne an wa","translation":"でも親のすることだものと思って立っていたそれで終わるのかなと思ってどこさかそのタチイチゴ便所より#下座側ところへ母捨てるため行くらしいいる/あるてだけど親のすることだものと思って立ってい。それで終わるのかなと思って、どこかにそのタチイチゴを便所より下座側のところへ母が捨てに行ったようで","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#5923","text":"pekotope en=sam ta anu. ku=ku rusuy na.","translation":"牛乳を私のそばに置きなさい。飲みたいな。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2018/3/36#0","text":"tan pekotope k=osura kusu ne.","translation":"この牛乳捨てるよ。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"36","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/u3f86t000003im86vol3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/chitose-beginner/77#1","text":"hawe ne yakun uturano a=kar wa inkar=an ro. cikap nok newa pekotope sanke wa en=kore.","translation":"それなら一緒に(私たちが)作って(私たちが)みようか。卵と牛乳を出してちょうだい。","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ77「～してください」「～してみる」「～したい」の言い方","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/chitose_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/032/2#48","text":"Kurokawa Setsu katkemat \"iwaninjin, omkekar=an kor a=popte wa a=ku ne. iwaninjin anak upew (=senkyû) ne ruwe ne.\" sekor hawean.","translation":"黒川セツさんは、「イワニンジンは、風邪ひいた時などに煎じて飲む。イワニンジンは、ウペウ (=センキュウ) のこと。」と言いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"upew","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-dict/007#7","text":"Setsu húci kor póho ne wa.","translation":"セツさんのお子さんですよ。","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"家族","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/QWaddix#500","text":"O-ri-pak no nis u-po-Setsu Naa ratchitara itak yan.","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"Qateri Waddi (@QWaddix)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/QWaddix/status/1798161568708087930","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/022#23","text":"Orowa, ne utar hawe aste hemhem ki, kor raypi siraraye hemhem ki, koponci herikas-parur hemhem ki kusu,","translation":"彼らがわめき立てて上着を投げつけ、砂埃を空中にまき散らすほどだったので、","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"22","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/007/002#327","text":"akusu a=poroyupi hoskinopo siraraye tek arpa kanni tura i=kohopuni","translation":"すると、大きい兄は、まっ先にぱっと着物を脱いで、棍棒をもって私のところに飛んで来て、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケソラㇷ゚　カムイ　イレス」孔雀の神に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N007P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/002#19","text":"“Tane sino sirpopke kusu kinasut kamuy siraraye aan na ; kap piru aan na,” sekor utar ye ruwe ne.","translation":"「今本当に暖かいのでヘビの神は脱皮したのだよ」とみんなが言いました。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/014/2#17","text":"hôru oyakoyak ta utar poro haw sanke korka, nani sirmo wa utar opitta pirka no sinotcaki nu. utar opitta mono netopake suyesuye kor, pirkano nu pa kor oka. káni ka néno iki ruwe ne.","translation":"あちこちから大きな歓声、それもすぐに静かになり、ホール全体が謹聴、私も含め皆が身体を静かに揺らす。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Siina Ringo Raibu-Repôto","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#3832","text":"sirmo","translation":"（辺りが）静かだ","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#4778","text":"Tanto ka aynumosir ta ene iki hi neno sirmo wa nep rorumpe an ka somo ki nankor .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1298401990297489417","source_slug":null}]

Okake ta, ne yam ani yammesi a=kar akusu sonno kéraan pe ne.","translation":"それでも良く見れば実が落ちているので、拾って帰り栗ご飯にして食べるととても美味しい。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Mukago","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/006/001#70","text":"eun ka pirka sirwante=an ayke","translation":"そちらもよく見回し確かめていると、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ヌサコㇿカムイ　イカオピューキ」祭壇を司る神さまが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N006P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3698","text":"ku=kor hapo hemanta ka esoyne nu korka ku=kor hapo anakne soyne wa inkar ka eay(?) kusu e=soyne wa sirwante yan. hemanta hum as humi. っちゅう。","translation":"私の母が何か外で聞いたけれど、母は外に出て見ることもできないので「外に出て眺めてごらん。何か音がするよ」という。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/043#102","text":"'okore rayahci manu. yayekota kamihihcin 'ehci 'ike, 'orowa tani taa 'okore ne'an tatakihci 'ike mun naa nii naa 'okore 'eymehkarakarahci 'omantene taa, 'okore 'eymehkarakarahci manu.","translation":"みんな死んでしまったとさ。自分たちの肉を食って、それでいま、みんな叩いて切って、草にも木にも配って、みんな配ってやったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"三人娘とウンカヨ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at43aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/002#25","text":"…kari wa kusu, sinuye sekor an pe sitoma korka, pon hi wano amkirpa yakun sitoma ka somo ki nankor sekor ku=yaynu. Upopoy or ta arki wa, usa usa amkirpa wa, yayekota ka kor puri ka, somo kor puri ka an. inan kur sani ne yakka, a=kor mosir ta aynu puri an hi eramuokay wa, ne yak easir, yayekota kor puri ka pirkano eramuo…","translation":"B: 特に好きなのがアイヌの踊り、口琴、英雄詞曲なので、これを楽しんで好きになってもらえたら。私の祖母は、北海道に生まれてもアイヌ文化を知らなかったので、入墨というものを恐く思いましたが、小さいころから知っていれば恐いと思わないだろうと思います。ウポポイに来ても、色々なことを知って、来場者にとっては自分の文化だったりちがったりするけど、ルーツに関係なくだれでも、日本にアイヌ文化があることを知って、そうしたらその人の地元の文化のことも改めて良く理解することができると思います。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　ケチ【アイヌ語・千歳方言】","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/jsYjmkgV4v8?si=BUIOa-vg4yYCjKB7","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/42#0","text":"yayekota kotanuhu ekaamesukara pe tah nee manu.","translation":"（ヤイレスーポが）その村を自ら救ったものなのだ","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ42 形式名詞による文末表現１","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/008#84","text":"cisahci yayne tani taa reera yuhke 'ike poro 'ahto ran manu, reekoh poro 'ahto ran manu.","translation":"そう言って泣いたら風が強くなって大雨が降ったとさ。すごい大雨が降ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"男探しの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at08aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/07#0","text":"'ATAYEHE YUHKE","translation":"高いですね","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第7課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/01#6","text":"tanto reera yuhke.","translation":"今日は風が強い","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ1 アイヌ語の表現を覚えて使おう","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

Tanpe anak ru paruru ta a=etoyta kur ne ruwe ne.","translation":"だれでも御国の言葉を聞いて悟らなければ、悪い者が来て、心の中に蒔かれたものを奪い取る。道端に蒔かれたものとは、こういう人である。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"13","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#4806","text":"aetoytap","translation":"畑の作物","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

'asinke 'ike yan nii kasketa 'amaa. yannii kaata 'ama teh, taa 'orowa 'otakaata 'aa yayne taa yan nii kaata 'aa yayne taa sine 'etuhka taa kimma san manu.","translation":"泳いでフンドシがぬれた。脱いで上がった。木の上に掛けておいた。寄り木に掛けて、それから浜辺に座ったり、寄り木に腰掛けたりしていると、一羽のカラスが山から降りてきたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"フンドシをとられた話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at05aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#91","text":"cise osmake ta amaa teh,","translation":"家の後ろに安置して、","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

Tap koraci an wen puri e=ki kusu tewano eani anakne pet wakka somo e=ku kusu ne. Orowa tewano eani anakne atto as yakun roski cikuni tumama ta an sinrus korpok peka wakka ciriri yakun ne wakka patek e=iku kusu ne na,” sekor itak ruwe ne.","translation":"すると偉い神も怒って天から降りてきてこう言いました。 「そこのヤマゲラ、なぜお前はこんなこ とをしているのだ？アイヌも火の神も一緒に飲む水に、お前は何をしているのだ？このように悪い行 いをしているから今後お前は川の水を飲めないぞ。今からお前は雨が降ったら立っている木の幹に生 えた苔の下を水がしたたると、その水だけ飲むのだぞ」と言いました。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第4話「ヤマゲラ（Siruscir）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/019#11","text":"neeteh taa, cise soyke poka taa cise 'onnayketa taa ray 'aynu ponihi イッパイ 'an manu. イッパイ 'an teh taa, sanketa taa, アノー 'ahpuy caake, puyara caaketa taa, sine monimahpo nanuhu キズツイタ, maciri koro monimahpo taa 'an manu.","translation":"その家の外に、その家のなかには死人の骨がいっぱいあったとさ。いっぱいあってそのそばに、窓の縁に、窓辺に一人の娘が、顔に傷がある娘が、傷のある娘がそこにいたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"トンコリ娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at19aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#47","text":"too caake ta eyayciw,eyayciw","translation":"沼の端に行き当たった。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nam-kuzuno/0/003#212","text":"usa eiatcausi","translation":"また無駄にする","collection":"葛野辰次郎の伝承","document":"水の神への祈り（30201 03）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=KTCD1P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kuzuno-tatsujiro-traditions"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-exhibits/005#3","text":"sinooynane siror ne yakka ramat un ki no okay pe ne a kus irara kewtum ari eiatcausi an=ki p ne ka somo ne. sioynane uresumosir kor rok a itemka ki oyna kamuyramat or _en a=kohepoki ani tapan na.","translation":"大自然にもラマッが宿っているため、人間は悪戯心で大地を汚すようなことをせず、恵みをもたらすカムイのラマッに感謝するのです。","collection":"ウポポイ館内展示","document":"ラマッ（霊魂）について","dialect":"静内（東別）","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-upopoy.jp/","source_slug":"upopoy-exhibits"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/025#55","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy, horokewpo, （わかってる？ Si）（いいよ、いいよ、どうぞ続けて。M) 'ehokuhu 'etahkara, ceh 'etahkara.\" nah yee manu.","translation":"「ねえ、あなた、（わかってる？ Si）（いいよ、いいよ、どうぞ続けて。Ｍ）夫に食べさせなさい、魚を食べさせなさい。」と言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"フキとりの話 -88","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at25aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-354/43#26","text":"pon kapariw ohkayo munciripehe kam etahkara.","translation":"小カレイ男は親類を肉で（宴会に）招いた。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"ピウスツキ採集のアイヌ語樺太方言民話テキスト : 「カレイ男とカジカ男」","dialect":"樺太（東海岸）","dialect_path":"樺太/東海岸","region":"樺太","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/107765/354-P043.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/021#18","text":"teh 'okaakeketa taa, moni-, horokewpo taa neya tepa 'ampa teh, 'ipe kara 'ike taa, hankata 'ohta 'ama manu. saranihi 'ohta 'ama teh 'ampa teh taa 'orowa san teh taa 'otakaata san teh taa suy yuukara.","translation":"その後で男はそのフンドシをもって食物も作ってハンカタにそれを入れたとさ。サラニヒに入れて抱えて、それから浜の方へ下りて、それから下りて浜辺でまた歌ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カニの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at21aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/33#0","text":"yara kee wa hankata kara teh oh ta an=ama ciki pirika","translation":"樹皮を剥がして曲げ物を作って、そこに（虫を）入れたら良いだろう","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ33 「～へ」「～から」格助詞","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column8: ["アイヌ神謡集","アイヌ語訳新約聖書"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/南西/幌別"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/act/001#12","text":"Orowa ne utar anakne Kanran-us ari a=ye nupuri oro wano Yerusarem kotan orun hekompa nisa ruwe ne; ne nupuri anakne Yerusarem kotan ehanke, Kamuy toho ta paye hi pakno an usike ne ruwe ne.","translation":"彼らは都に入ると、泊まっていた家の上の部屋に上がった。それは、ペトロ、ヨハネ、ヤコブ、アンデレ、フィリポ、トマス、バルトロマイ、マタイ、アルファイの子ヤコブ、熱心党のシモン、ヤコブの子ユダであった。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"1","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/001/2#58","text":"kamuy utar hekompa i ta pirka inaw","translation":"そして神々が帰るときに美しい御幣を","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"3","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

'eerehcihi ne'ampe taa, コンダ makiri kaama manu.","translation":"それで今、男はこんどアザラシ捕り、アザラシ捕りをして、アザラシも皆で煮たとさ。煮て、食べて、かかとの骨とか、食べさせたとさ。'otokomponihiというのはここの骨なんだが、かかとの骨（はーん。Ｍ）それも食べさせたとき、こんどは包丁にわなを掛けたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/24#1","text":"an=koro kotan poronay etokoho onne ka’ama kusu makah_=an.","translation":"私の村の大川の水源へ、罠かけするために上って行った","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ24 位置関係の表現１","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/004#83","text":"\" 'iine'ahsuy monimahpo 'uta, アノ、unkayo, koykihci, raykihci 'ike hannehka sinenehka kihcihi ka hannehka. taa 'utah ka 'uta 'eykaasiw wa 'omantene 'unkayo 'utah raykipe neewa ne'an. hemata 'e'ocisahci kusu ne'an 'ekuhtehkahci kusu ne'ani?\"","translation":"「あのね、娘たちや。ウンカヨを捕って殺したのは一人でしたのじゃないよ。みんなに助けてもらって、ようやくウンカヨをやっつけたんだよ。何を悔やんで、こんなに暗くしているのかい？」","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#259","text":"anpene emawsahkakara kihcihi","translation":"まったく弱らせた","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/04#10","text":"a=kimoturaynu wa","translation":"山で行方不明になって","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"エゾマツと魔鳥（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A8%E3%82%BE%E3%83%9E%E3%83%84%E3%81%A8%E9%AD%94%E9%B3%A5%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#361","text":"Iskar put un sinep takup kor poho a=kimoturaynu wa kesto kesto ihunarapa p iwor so ka ehoyuppa kor okay pe ne yak a=ye hi a=onaha nu hine","translation":"イシカㇻ川の河口の（村長の）一人息子が山で行方不明になり、毎日毎日捜索隊が山を駆けずり回っているという話を私の父が聞いて","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/1964115650919747593","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/022/007#52","text":"seturu kas ta Kimuntounkur yaykosantekturihitara","translation":"その背後でキムントウンクㇽが手を伸ばし、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N022P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/010#130","text":"‘aynu mosir pirka hawe tu asur orke a=nu kusu aynu mosir a=orap yakne pirka urespa a=ki kuni p ne na.’ sekor itak wa aynu mosir a=orap ruwe ne rok awa a=kor yupi utarihi kesto an kor Kimuntounkur kosinewpa kusu paye ruwe ne.","translation":"『人間の国が素晴らしいということで多くの噂を聞いたので人間の国に降りたら立派な子育てをできるようなのですよ』と話して人間の国に私たちは降りたのでしたが兄さんたちは毎日キムントウンクㇰのところに遊びに行くのでした。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-3","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column8: ["AA研アイヌ語資料","アイヌ語アーカイブ"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/静内"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/026#136","text":"ne nupuri kes un caca se nipes, a=koamakar wa ene, an a hi koraci kamuy pa... parkes ne an kuni ne a=kor nispa osonkokote a p, wen pakehe, kim ta, osonkokote a kotom [64], nipes a=kor nispa se wa san hine","translation":"例の山裾のおやじ（クマ）は背負ったシナを降ろさせてもらい、もとの通り、神様の末席になるように旦那様は言伝をしたが、悪い（クマの）頭に、山に（行って）、伝言をしたらしく、旦那様は背負って降りて来て、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 織田ステノさん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ Otasut-un-katkemat オタスッウン カッケマッ","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=26","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/38#317","text":"se nipes a=koamakar wa","translation":"持っていたシナ皮をひきはがして","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"シナ皮を背負ったクマ（1981）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%82%B7%E3%83%8A%E7%9A%AE%E3%82%92%E8%83%8C%E8%B2%A0%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E3%82%AF%E3%83%9E%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#41","text":"a p eun ... ne p... pirka menoko koowseterke hine a=hekote nispa","translation":"が、きれいな女に惚れ込んで、私の旦那様が","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/012#356","text":"\"a=weyyupihi sorekusu pirka menoko koowseterke,","translation":"「性悪の兄さん、きれいな女のところにまっしぐらに向かったくせに","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チェンパｸのニｼパの話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#138","text":"comapresu a=e=ekarkar ki rok ana a=utari koykipa p e=tuypa kuni p ne na.” sekor kira tuyka itak’o hawe maskin kusu turus kinra ne i=kohopuni","translation":"私はお前を可愛がって育てたのだから仲間と戦う連中をお前は切るべきなのだよ」と逃げながら言ったことでなおのこと狂おしい怒りに私はかっとなった。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/07#276","text":"haw`oka kor i=koykipa _hine","translation":"言って私を叱りました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ペッラサンペに取り憑かれた男の子（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%9A%E3%83%83%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B5%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%81%AB%E5%8F%96%E3%82%8A%E6%86%91%E3%81%8B%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E7%94%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%AD%90%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/017#7","text":"nah yehci 'ike taa 'orowa tani taa, 'otakaata sapahci 'ike tani taa, アノーmonimahpo 'utah taa 'otakaata sapahci 'ike tani taa, 'onuuman 'oman teh 'ipekarahci yayne taa neya, nutanne horokewpo, nutahkon horokewpo, nu'issikaarimpa horokewpo, tehpis taa, 'uturahci wa 'arikihci manuyke taa, yehci manu.","translation":"そう言ってそれからこんど、浜に出て、その娘たちは浜に出ていたら、夕方になって、夕食を作っていたら、その顔の長い男と顔の短い男と、顔の丸い男が、3人、そこに連れ立ってやって来て、言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"丸顔スキー","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at17aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intro/02#2","text":"nuuman onuuman ku=mokoro koyaykus.","translation":"昨日の夜は眠れなかった","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"２月カムイに感謝をする","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_nyumon.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語訳新約聖書","ウポポイ職員インタビュー"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/北東/十勝"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/1co/009#7","text":"pumma uk somo ki tumi-kor kur inan kur ne ruwe? Hat-toy etoyta wa orowa hetuku ipehe somo e kur inan kur ne ruwe? Sama ta, cikoykip respa wa ne tope somo ipe kur inan kur ne ruwe he an?","translation":"そもそも、いったいだれが自費で戦争に行きますか。ぶどう畑を作って、その実を食べない者がいますか。羊の群れを飼って、その乳を飲まない者がいますか。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"9","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#21","text":"…u=an pe ne kusu, an=itakihi ku=eramuisam\" ari patek ku=ye. ikucise or ta, Upopoy or ta ku=monrayke hi ku=ye kor, ku=eramiskari kur en=koytupa wa “haw ne cik pumma poronno e=uk nankor” ari hawki hi kay an. ku=monrayke wa ku=yaycaroyki kay ku=ki korkay, neanpe patek kay somo ne hike, pumma ku=uk hi wenno en=ye wa. yaun s…","translation":"B: 工房で働いているときに、差別的なことをいう人が何度か来ました。アイヌが木彫りをするときに和製の小刀を使うので、「本当にアイヌ文化か？ちがうんじゃない？」と小ばかにしてきました。「ぼくは勉強中なんで、おっしゃることがわかりません」とだけ言っておきました。居酒屋で「ウポポイで働いている」と言ったら知らない人にねたまれて「じゃあいい給料もらってんだな」といわれたこともありました。働いて食べはするけれどそれだけじゃないんですけど、給料をもらうことが悪いみたいに言われて。北海道の和人はアイヌの文化・服装くらいは知っていると思いますが、北海道外の人々や、海外の人々にも、知ってもらったら良いと思うことはこういうことです。和人が来る前には、私たちの仲間は違う言葉、違う服装をし、違う生活をしていたのが、なぜ和人と同じように暮らしているのか、をよく知ってもらえれば良いですね。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2co/005#19","text":"ne anpe anak ene an anpe ne, — Kamuy anak Kiristo oske ta an wa yay or ta mosir eramuritenka siriki an, awa, mosir kor ohay ta puri somo esanniyo; ayke, ramuritenka kusu an itak un sikkasmare nisa ruwe ne.","translation":"つまり、神はキリストによって世を御自分と和解させ、人々の罪の責任を問うことなく、和解の言葉をわたしたちにゆだねられたのです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#1561","text":"ramuritenka. ramuritenka","translation":"機嫌をとる","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/033/1#2","text":"Bacherâ Yaeko (Mukai Huchi 1884-1962) anakne, Usu kotan un aynu katkemat ne a korka, Kirisuto-kyô i=epakasnu ka ki, sísam itak ani tanka kar ka ki ruwe ne.","translation":"バチェラー・八重子 (向井フチ1884-196 2) は、有珠のアイヌ民族出身のご婦人でしたが、キリスト教伝道者でもあり、日本語で短歌も作りました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"\"pewre utar eun\" ku=nukar wa","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#4039","text":"Te ta sisam utar nuye hi neno Hokuto-aynu sisamitak,orwa tanka sekor an pe eiwanke kus tap Hokuto-aynu an hi wano tane pakno anutari ka sisam ka sieramante nankor .","translation":"ここに和人達が書いているように、北斗アイヌが和語、それに短歌というものを用いたからこそ、北斗アイヌの時代から現在","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1081474939058704385","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/005#1","text":"Ne inonnoytak ene an h_i, oka hi :—“Ni topoci kamuy tunasno tan aynu iwankere wa i=kore yan. Siranpa kamuy kor poho e=ne ruwe ne. Kanto orwano a=ranke kamuy Siranpa kamuy ne. Cikuni tono pase kamuy e=ne ruwe ne. Ne rehe ikkewe anakne ‘Mosir ka ta an’ sekor itak ne ruwe ne.","translation":"そのお祈りの言葉は次の通りです。 「木の神様であるニトポチよ、このアイヌを元気にしてくださ い。あなたはシランパカムイの息子です。天から下ろされた神がシランパカムイです。木の殿様であ る偉い神様です。この名前の意味は『大地の上にある』という意味です。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第5話「樹木崇拝（Cikuni eoonkami oruspe）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kuzuno/2/002#25","text":"suni topoci","translation":"炉鉤の召人","collection":"葛野辰次郎の伝承","document":"閉式の祈り（30204 02）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=KTCD3P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kuzuno-tatsujiro-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/005#242","text":"takupi (utu) ukowtur ta","translation":"ただお互いの間に、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 7」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=4","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/003/004#174","text":"asinkar utu... paye=an hawe ene ne","translation":"私達が進んでいく声がして、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「オコッコ　チャペ　アライケ」化け猫を私は退治した","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N003P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#36","text":"yakka oya no suru kotodamono to omotte tatteita, sorede owarunokana to omotte, doko sa ka sono hureayusni asinru yori utu.. outunne or un hapo osura kusu arpa noyne an wa","translation":"でも親のすることだものと思って立っていたそれで終わるのかなと思ってどこさかそのタチイチゴ便所より#下座側ところへ母捨てるため行くらしいいる/あるてだけど親のすることだものと思って立ってい。それで終わるのかなと思って、どこかにそのタチイチゴを便所より下座側のところへ母が捨てに行ったようで","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/004#166","text":"kunpehe, kayki an=erameskari.","translation":"らしいのだろうかも、私はわからずにいる。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 4 (言い伝え4)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/08#10","text":"B: taranoka 'aynu 'utah hemata ki=hci kusu 'okay=ahcihi hee 'an=eram'eskari.","translation":"B: あの人たちが何をしているか私は知らない。","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第8課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2015/4/50#0","text":"A: Kim ta nisapno an=erameskari kur an=koekari yakun nekon a=ye yak pirka?","translation":"A: 山で突然知らない人に出会ったら、なんて言ったらいいの?","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"50","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/151222_2015vol4.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/050/3#10","text":"Katakana-mozi \"チェ (ce) (セ+Gôziyô-Handakuten)\", \"トゥ (tu) (ツ+Gôziyô-Handakuten)\", \"ピ (tu) (ト+Gôziyô-Handakuten)\" ka Gôseizumi-mozine ruwe ne.","translation":"カタカナ文字『ゼ (ce,チェ,合字用半濁点) 』、『ツ (tu,トゥ,ツ+合字用半濁点』、『ド (tu,トゥト+合字用半濁点』も合成済み文字です。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Konpyuta ka ta a=eywanke gengomei-kôdo, fonto","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"bible/rom/013#7","text":"Nen ne yakka a=kor kunip sanke yan: yaku a=kor kuni utar or ta yaku korpare; ce a=kor kuni utar or ta ce sanke: koysitoma kuni utar ko-isitoyna; ko-oripak kuni utar ko-oripak yan.","translation":"すべての人々に対して自分の義務を果たしなさい。貢を納めるべき人には貢を納め、税を納めるべき人には税を納め、恐るべき人は恐れ、敬うべき人は敬いなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"13","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#3860","text":"supun ruype ne yakka nep ce... cep ne yakka hu no a=e kor keraan.","translation":"ウグイのルイベでも何の魚でも生で食べると美味しい。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/012/002#479","text":"ciepakasnu","translation":"お前に教えて","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚ ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」火なしに育った、水なしに育った（続き）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N012P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#24","text":"iteki soyne no oka yan.” sekor a=koytakmuye ki rok awa “yuppo.” sekor haweoka kor a=cinkikese tunoiwan suy renoiwan suy oukoraye ki korkayki tu pirka kuni p re pirka kuni p ciepakasnu a=ekarkar hine soywasamma a=osiraye","translation":"決して外に出ずにいるのだよ」と言い置きをすると，（妹は）「お兄ちゃん」と言いながら私の着物の裾に何度も幾度もしがみついてきたけれど多くのよいこと多数のよいことを（妹に）教え諭して私は外に出た。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"onsei12/07/0#426","text":"ciepakasnu","translation":"話して教えて","collection":"アイヌ語音声資料","document":"村焼き国焼き1 KOTAN SITCIRE MOSIR SITCIRE 1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://waseda.repo.nii.ac.jp/search?search_type=2&q=1636","source_slug":"ainu-audio-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/016#233","text":"iwor or peka e=apkas wa ne yakne (yuk cikoykip kamuy ciko) kamuy kam yuk kam","translation":"山の猟場に行って熊肉や鹿肉","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 13","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=16","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/heb/011#37","text":"suma ani a=piyekar hene aki, ekusna aca hene aki, a=koramnukar hene aki, atamerayke hene aki: hitsuji ciko-iki p rus hene yanki cikoykip rus hene ray wa apkas;","translation":"彼らは石で打ち殺され、のこぎりで引かれ、剣で切り殺され、羊の皮や山羊の皮を着て放浪し、暮らしに事欠き、苦しめられ、虐待され、","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"11","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#5787","text":"k=ekamke wa ku=simpay kor TEREBI ku=nukar wa poro CIKO ... CIKO ku=nukar kor ku=cis ka ki DEMO YAPPARI ekamke","translation":"予感がして、私は心配しながら、テレビを見て、大きな事故を見ながら泣いたときでもやっぱり予感がする。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#98","text":"cinuye mun [85] ka ta a=an wa an=an wa a=sike a=anu hine","translation":"掃きだめの上で私は座っていて、私の荷物を置いて","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/014/004#28","text":"cinuye kampi","translation":"文字の書かれた紙が","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"カムイユカㇻ「アイヌモシㇼ　チクニレ　カムイ　モシㇼ　チクニレ（エーイノォー）」人間界の木の名前と神の国の木の名前","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N014P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/12#157","text":"mintar or ta cinuye wen... cinuye mun だか hetap ne","translation":"庭に掃除されたごみだか何だか","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"夜襲から女たちを救った子グマの神（1981）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E5%A4%9C%E8%A5%B2%E3%81%8B%E3%82%89%E5%A5%B3%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1%E3%82%92%E6%95%91%E3%81%A3%E3%81%9F%E5%AD%90%E3%82%B0%E3%83%9E%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/022#94","text":"a=eyaykopuntek kor, ”tapne tapne iki=an pe ne ruwe ne a p kusu, a=ekoyayattasa wa sake ne ciki inaw ne ciki ek siri ne na.","translation":"私は喜んで、「これこれこういうふうに私が行動したところ、それで、私はお礼をされて、酒でもイナウでも来たのだよ。","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・山田慎太郎聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 15","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=22","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/010/003#232","text":"nea Iskar putu kor nispa a=ekoyayattasa.","translation":"その石狩の河口のニシパにお礼に渡した。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ウラユシウンクㇽ」ウラユシの人（最後テープ切れで本編中断）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N010P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#174","text":"orowa cironnup kamuy a=ekoyayattasa p ney a=eonkami cironnup","translation":"そして狐のカムイへ返礼をすることを、その私が拝礼する狐の","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#435","text":"eutunne eronne iyomare kusu so utur ae... a=erututke [142] hike ka a=koiyomare pa ka somo ki","translation":"下座の方を向き、上座の方を向き、酒宴の間をお酌して回っても、（いとこ兄弟には）お酌もせず","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#142","text":"kamuy cikirpe ar utomciwre kamuy cipanup erurikikur- rayehitara tanpa ne pa sinotnumatpo erikomare pakno an pirka menoko tanepo tapne cisetatures esirkapakte pon menoko anipuntari esimukko- anpa kane iomare kusu cikupso utur erututke","translation":"立派な着物を一枚羽織り立派な鉢巻をかぶって髪を押さえ，今年あたりに遊びの胸紐を高くあげるくらいの（年頃の）美しい女で，初めて家にいる妹に匹敵する顔立ちの娘が両口の銚子をかかげ持って酌をするために酒宴の席の間をあちこち回る。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/27#25","text":"nispa uturu erututke wa","translation":"長者たちの間をまわり","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"火の女神の嫉妬（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E7%81%AB%E3%81%AE%E5%A5%B3%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E5%AB%89%E5%A6%AC%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/031#386","text":"\"kewtumu［243］ pirka kasikamuye pirka pe anakne neno iki kor kamuy koinkar［244］ ka ki,","translation":"「心がけが良くて憑き神が良い者には、そのようにカムイが目をかけもする","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 21","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=31","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/005/002#89","text":"kasikamuye yupke wa siriki hi ne sekor an pe","translation":"その守り神が強力なので、そのようなことなのだということ、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「スルクマッ　チクペニカムイ　イカオピューキ」トリカブトとエンジュのカムイが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N005P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/05#243","text":"kewtumu pirka kasikamuye pirka menoko","translation":"良い心、良い憑き神の女性が","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"クモを戒めて妻にしたオコジョ（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%AF%E3%83%A2%E3%82%92%E6%88%92%E3%82%81%E3%81%A6%E5%A6%BB%E3%81%AB%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%E3%82%AA%E3%82%B3%E3%82%B8%E3%83%A7%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/036#30","text":"'ani ike taa, 'orowa taa,'ahun teh taa 'so'aanu, sohkara turi sokara turi 'omantene taa 'orowa horokewpo 'ahun ike taa, monimahpo kara 'omayehe kasikehe sanike 'aa manu.","translation":"男が外にいて、それから中に入って、敷物のゴザを敷いてそれから男が入って、娘が用意した寝床の上に来て座ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"いびきの話 -89","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at36aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/023#270","text":"apeetok ta piratur un ekasi monoa hine a... ca... kasikehe kurkasi aehoma... oma hine an=an hi ne a p","translation":"いろりの上座にピラトゥㇽのお祖父さんが座ってその上に私は寄り掛かっていたのだが","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・喜多直人聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 16","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=23","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/002#3","text":"“ Ape kamuy anakne yaymonoroeyam eaykap pe ne ruwe ne. Awa, e=itura wa Aynumosir_ ta e=an yak anakne mosir kasikehe uhuy i ta eani ne yakka uhuy wa isam kusu ne na; ’’ sekor Pase Kamuy itak ruwe ne.","translation":"「火の神は自分を制することができないものだ。だからお前が一緒に人間の世界に行ったら大地 が燃える時にお前も燃えてしまうよ」と偉い神は言いました。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-folklore/03#68","text":"mimtuci sekor a=ye p, Mosirpa-un-sar or un kotankorkur, mimtuci sekor a=ye p, inawcipa utorsam ta poro, nis or eus kane an poro cikuni as wa, ne cikuni kitaykehe ta mimtuci sekor a=ye p, tumi sermak ne an pe kor wa okay wa, neun topattumi kusu paye yakka, newaan pe tura wa paye するんだと。","translation":"ミㇺトゥチというもの、モシㇼパウンサㇻの村長は、ミㇺトゥチというものを、幣棚の脇に大きな、天まで届くような大きな木が立っていて、その木のてっぺんにミㇺトゥチというものを、戦の守護神として持っていて、どこへトパットゥミに行っても、それが一緒に行くんだと。","collection":"アイヌ口承文芸テキスト集","document":"白沢ナベ口述トパットゥミから逃れたウライウㇱナイの少年","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023336/","source_slug":"ainu-oral-literature-texts"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/04#125","text":"a=unihi kitaykehe ta","translation":"私の家のてっぺんに","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"エゾマツと魔鳥（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A8%E3%82%BE%E3%83%9E%E3%83%84%E3%81%A8%E9%AD%94%E9%B3%A5%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/022/003#5","text":"kitaykehe a=sina wa","translation":"そのてっぺんを縛って","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"散文説話（部分）「木の神」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34627BP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/020/4#1","text":"11 cup 10 to ta, Hurano or ta aynu-go benrontaikai (aynu itak uekarpa) an wa, Benron-bumon or ta anakne, Ôsaka wa ren ne wa arki Ci=kor Nay Tomo-no-kai saiyûsyû-syô eunkeray. kôsyôbungê-bumon or ta anakne Muka kotan wa arki Osino Akemi, Osino Rika pon katkemat utar saiyûsyû-syó eunkeray.","translation":"11月10日に富良野で第5回アイヌ語弁論大会が行われ、弁論部門では大阪の「チコロナイ友の会」3人が、口承文芸部門では鵡川の押野朱美・里架さんが最優秀賞を受賞した。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ci=kor Nay hemanta an?","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#198","text":"hopuni=an onkami=an aokay ne yakka neyta pakno ne yakka nupuri kes un kamuy utar a=oyra somo ki kuni h_i ramma a=okanomi kuni h_i osino a=koytak.","translation":"私は起き上がって祈りを捧げ、いつまでも山裾に住むカムイたちを忘れるつもりがないこと、いつも供養をするつもりであることを、後から（彼らに）述べた。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#5158","text":"\"atuy or_ ta sine acapo yan wa an\" sekor hawas wa utari utar poronno paye wa \"umma ani a=kor wa ek\" sekor hawas wa ku=nukar kusu k=ek hi ta inne acapo utar kamuyoroitak kor emus kor wa horippa siri ku=nukar. osino ku=sapo utar anakne pewtanke kor horippa kor inawcipa or un paye siri ku=nukar.","translation":"「海で一人のおじさんがあがっている」という話しで、仲間たちが大勢行って「馬で運んで来た」というので見に来ると、沢山のおじさんたちが神に祈りながら刀を持って踊っている様子を私は見た。後からお姉さんたちが危急の叫びをあげながら踊りつつ、幣場まで行く様子を私は見た。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/025/2#11","text":"ora k=unihi un ku=hosipi wa, ne ota \"sôgan-zittai-kenbikyô\" sekor a=ye pani ku=nukar kor, ineapkusun, chikyu tum un ku=inkar koraci an kewtum ku=yaykorpare wa.","translation":"また、家へ帰ってからこの砂を「双眼実体顕微鏡」というもので見ますと、何と地球の中を覗いているかのような気持ちになるんです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"haw-an-ota","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#64","text":"ney okay pe anakne tono mosir wa ihok kusu pencay o wa topaha yap wa aynu utar orowa kamuy cihoki hene yuk cihoki cep hene nep ne yakka hokpa kusu amam hene kamuy sake hene poronno kusa wa yap wa peni un aynu pani un aynu utar poronno ihok.","translation":"その者たちは、和人の国から商売のために弁財船に乗って大勢で上陸し、アイヌたちから熊の毛皮や鹿の毛皮や魚やら何でも買うために、米やら良い酒やらたくさん乗せて上陸し、川上のアイヌたち、川下のアイヌたちは、たくさん買い物をした。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#504","text":"Pet rutom ta mean korka upas as ka somo ki korka pani ta tuasno mata an sirki .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/532874442813087745","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/jas/002#6","text":"Korka, eci utar anakne ne irapokkari kur epeka somo yaykatanu ki nisa ruwe ne na, oteknu utar anakne eci ramuniste wa kore hine akoypisi set or ta eci=ninpa somo ki ruwe he an?","translation":"だが、あなたがたは、貧しい人を辱めた。富んでいる者たちこそ、あなたがたをひどい目に遭わせ、裁判所へ引っ張って行くではありませんか。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#1299","text":"ramuniste","translation":"残酷だ","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/11#1412","text":"enepo easir a=e=ramuniste kaspa siri","translation":"こんなにも無慈悲過ぎる様子に","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"伝染病の神の息子とねたむ人間たち（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BC%9D%E6%9F%93%E7%97%85%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A8%E3%81%AD%E3%81%9F%E3%82%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/025#426","text":"nep reraha taskor kus siri isam no[191],","translation":"どんな悪い風も通る様子もなく、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 18","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=25","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/078/1#12","text":"…eta utar ramachihi ka e=kore haru turano kamuy orun apunno sirepa ruwe ne. Tewano anakne sasuysir unno eci=utári a=eci=epúnkine. Oyakoyak ta nep taskori nep réraha sururke yakka e=kotanuhu anakne nep ka eci=eyáywennukar ka somo ki no nep eci=erának ka somo ki no eci=okáy pe ne na\" sekor kane wentarap=an.","translation":"その夜また夢を見ました。またあの本当に神らしい男が現れて、「あなたには心から感謝しています。あなたがいたからあの酷い殺され方をした犬達があなたのくれたお土産を持って無事に神の国へ到着できました。これからはいつ迄も貴方の同胞を守ります。あちこちで色々な災害や病気が流行っても貴方の村は何も心配すること生活できますから」と言いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Seta-hopunire uwepeker","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/014/008#99","text":"sasuysir pakno nep reraha nep taskori sururke yakka","translation":"いつまでも、病や寒気が流行しても","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トノト　カムイ　イコシネウェ／トゥキ　オルン　オクイマ　メノコ」酒の女神が私を訪ねてきた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N014P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/032/2#39","text":"Pon-nay-putu (Urakawa) maciya or un Tôyama Saki katkemat kimun'upew anak iwaninjin sekor re an pe ne.\" sekor hawean.","translation":"浦河町字姉茶の遠山サキさんは「キムンウペウはイワニンジンと言われるものです」と言いました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"upew","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/002#9","text":"oro un arpa akusu, ku=kor etoko ta hemanta okkayo neno an kur watasi no saki, nante yunda, etoko, ku=kor etoko ta an.. apkas kor an siri ku=nukar wa, oh..","translation":"そこへ行くと私の前方に、何か男のような人が、私の前方に歩いているのが見えて","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト2・2015年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"x-social/QWaddix#505","text":"kut cam pi saki","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"Qateri Waddi (@QWaddix)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/QWaddix/status/1798164839678071256","source_slug":null}]
