column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/038#123","text":"'orowa nukarahci teh taa 'orowa taa, horokewpo tani taa neera 'omanahka sinka kusu tani taa hosipi manu.","translation":"それから男はそれを見て、いくら旅を続けても疲れるから、もう家に帰ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"アザラシの胃袋のソリ","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at38aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#220","text":"ney ta pakno pewre sinka a=eyayram- kotormewpa mewpa kane pakno ne kor kane awanki a=sanasanke a=nukar ruwe ene oka hi","translation":"いつまでも若いおたけびをあげ胸を張り元気を起こしてそうして金の扇を出して見るとこのようだった。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/yukar/04#321","text":"sinka kane humse kane","translation":"気勢を上げて","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"移動の宝、透視の宝（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%82%8A%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E7%A7%BB%E5%8B%95%E3%81%AE%E5%AE%9D%E3%80%81%E9%80%8F%E8%A6%96%E3%81%AE%E5%AE%9D%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/076/1#1","text":"\"E=amihi tanne na tuye wa anu\" sekor Kayano jiten (oro 'Tanne' a=nuyé uske) ka ta a=nuyé wa an korka, urepetami eytasa takneno a=tuyé yak wen pe ne ruwe ne. Siyeye oruspe anak eci=nukár kowen nankor korka, iruka nukar yan.","translation":"「お前の爪が伸びているから切っておけ。」と萱野辞典(「タンネ」)の上に書いてあったのですが、足指の爪をあまりに短く切ると良くないものです。 病の話だったらあなたは読みたくないと思うでしょうが、ちょっと読んでください。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Urepetami-arka oruspe","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/12#84","text":"emkota ku=ye na takneno","translation":"（早くいうよ、短く）","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ニコㇿマメを授けた女神（1982）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%8B%E3%82%B3%E3%87%BF%E3%83%9E%E3%83%A1%E3%82%92%E6%8E%88%E3%81%91%E3%81%9F%E5%A5%B3%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2019/3/28#2","text":"hapo: ayapo, etak e=amihi tuypa wa takneno kar.","translation":"お母さん： おやおや、さあ爪を切って短くしなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"28","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/files/u3f86t0000060mqj.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/018/002#200","text":"teoro ne wa Iskar putu kor nispa a=ne ruwe ne.","translation":"ここであって、私は石狩川の河口を領有する長者なのだ。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トパットゥミ　オッタ　アサハ　トゥラ　アエイッカ」トパットゥミで姉とともに連れ去られた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N018P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/shinyo/03#1547","text":"sirkunpato teoro oka utar","translation":"ここにいる人たち","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ハチの姉妹と雷神（シﾘクンパト）（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%83%8F%E3%83%81%E3%81%AE%E5%A7%89%E5%A6%B9%E3%81%A8%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%88%E3%82%B7%EF%BE%98%E3%82%AF%E3%83%B3%E3%83%91%E3%83%88%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/024#187","text":"“teoro ka somo ne”","translation":"「ここじゃない」","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"少年（再録版）","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/048/2#15","text":"Kesto kesto cikuni ani wakka ci=sesseka wa ani tompuri or c=óahup easkay pe ci=ne kusu \"Tane anakne ne húci ye hi koraci cóka ka nispa ci=ne\" sekor haweoka=as kor emo c=úmomare ruwe ne.","translation":"毎日薪でふろを焚いています。だからフチが言った様に、“私達も金持ちだな”と言いながらいもの収穫をしました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"emo","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"mashiho-mintan/01#34","text":"tompuri otta pirkano a-huraye aine, tane pakno","translation":"風呂にてよく体を洗い，そして今まで","collection":"アイヌ民譚集","document":"パナンペ放屁譚","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784003208113","source_slug":"ainu-mintanshu"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/imosirkokiru#513","text":"Misato usa hayta Sinji osus tompuri un ku=osus kopan !","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"野良アイヌ・ルﾌﾟネイケ (@imosirkokiru)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/imosirkokiru/status/409602791888273408","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/psa/149#8","text":"Sinkop ani mosir sikkasma utar tupetupe, Uok kani ani pase utar tupetupe kuni ne ruwe ne;","translation":"王たちを鎖につなぎ君侯に鉄の枷をはめ","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"149","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/019/004#84","text":"nanuhu ta uok punkar ne","translation":"その顔には結んだ蔓のように","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ポイサルンクㇽ」若い沙流の人","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N019P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#86","text":"ney ta kusu Aynurakkur ene an kamuy iruska rici uok punkar ne enankurkasi ipukitara “wen aynu sani a=pirkarenkap i=korenka ka somo ki kusu teyne mosir upakasnu mosir a=orura kuni p ne hi tapan na.”","translation":"先ほどと同じくアイヌラックㇰ（という）あれほどの神は怒りの青筋が絡まったブドウ蔓のように顔面に立っていて「悪者の子孫が私の善意を受け入れもしないから湿った国に罰の国土に運びますよ」","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/034#31","text":"…e taa, 'anayne taa, 'uurah rukum (pay) puy kaari 'asin, 'uurah rukum 'apa kaari 'asin, kii teh sewa teh 'an manuyke taa, 'onnayketa taa, sine 'ahchcipo taa 'ahrus kara kusu 'an manu.（テープ切れる）","translation":"それで今度、それから男はそこに行って、家の戸を開けた。中に入ったら中は真っ暗だったとさ。真っ暗で、その中に煙が立っていたとさ。それからその暗闇の中に入って行ったら、もやの半分は窓から出て、もやの半分は戸から出て、もやが晴れて、見ると、一人のババがそこでアツシを作っていたとさ。（テープ切れる）","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭がい骨 -89","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at34aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/mkpoli#185","text":"ahrus-i-sitayki=an","translation":"厚司 それを 叩く 我ら","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"♪ まくぽり ☆彡 (@mkpoli)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/mkpoli/status/1872270305105953033","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intro/11#0","text":"ku=aaca ahrus mii.","translation":"お父さんがアㇵルㇱを着る","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"11月針と糸をもって","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_nyumon.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/015#167","text":"nukoan=an a hi neno[77] yuk cikoykip kamuy cikoykip a=eaunarura kor iwor otta ne yakka","translation":"猟運に恵まれていたときのように、鹿や熊を家に運びながら狩場でであっても","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・山田慎太郎聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 12","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=15","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/1#4","text":"…ta kim ta kucacise kar wa or ta rewsi kor matanki ka ki pa p ne a wa. ora yuk neya kamuy neya isoan kor kamihi anakne uepeker koraci kotan or ta opitta a=eaunarura. rusihi anakne a=eyyok pe ne ruwe ne a wa. hekattar ka yaykata isepo ka neya eyami ka neya kar pe ne awa.\" sekor hawean.","translation":"貫気別の夫婦は次のように言いました。 「昔は貫気別村でも魚が多くいて、秋になるとクトゥ (魚をとる仕掛)で魚取りをした。 それから、冬になると食べるための薫製の魚も作ったよ。 男たちは冬になる前に山に狩小屋を作り、 そこで泊まりながら狩りもしたものだったよ。 また、鹿やら熊やら獲物があると、肉はウェペケレのように村全体へ配られた。 皮は売られたものだったよ。 子供達も自分で、 ウサギのわなやらカケスのわなやらを作ったものだったよ」 と話しました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"húci ekasi kensyû-ryokô ki ruwe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/03#649","text":"emonipirka wa eaunarura","translation":"猟運があって、家に運んできました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"イクレスイェとミズナラの神（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AF%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B9%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A7%E3%81%A8%E3%83%9F%E3%82%BA%E3%83%8A%E3%83%A9%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","北海道大学所在地の先住民族に対する敬意の表明","葛野辰次郎の伝承"]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"hokudai-respect/full#15","text":"明治 atpake ta sisam itak ani \"開拓\" sekor a=ye p sisam utar ki wa, Aynumosir wente kusu, yak eas aynu utar te oro wano yaytukte. ne okake ta te ta 北海道大学 an=asi. neanpe neun ne yakka somo ci=oyra no, te wano anakne ramma ci=eucaskuma.","translation":"本学は、明治の初めに和人にとって「開拓」と呼ばれた事業が進められたことにより、暮らしを営んできたアイヌと土地との結びつきが断ち切られ、のちにその場所に本学のキャンパスが設置された経緯を認識し、語り継いでいきます。","collection":"北海道大学所在地の先住民族に対する敬意の表明","document":"全文版","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.hokudai.ac.jp/pr/johokokai/ainu/","source_slug":"hokudai-indigenous-respect-statement"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kuzuno/0/007#124","text":"a=eucaskuma","translation":"語り継ぐ","collection":"葛野辰次郎の伝承","document":"太陽の神への祈り（30201 07）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=KTCD1P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kuzuno-tatsujiro-traditions"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#1066","text":"Xuristossiko-eucaskuma","translation":"クリスマスのウチャシクマ","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/680286130806259712","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/030/3#0","text":"ikucise or ta","translation":"飲み屋にて","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"ikucise or ta","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/003#21","text":"…ar makiri eywanke kusu, \"sonno aynupuri he, somo ne nankor\" ari en=kopasrota. \"ku=kampinuye kan ku=an pe ne kusu, an=itakihi ku=eramuisam\" ari patek ku=ye. ikucise or ta, Upopoy or ta ku=monrayke hi ku=ye kor, ku=eramiskari kur en=koytupa wa “haw ne cik pumma poronno e=uk nankor” ari hawki hi kay an. ku=monrayke wa ku=…","translation":"B: 工房で働いているときに、差別的なことをいう人が何度か来ました。アイヌが木彫りをするときに和製の小刀を使うので、「本当にアイヌ文化か？ちがうんじゃない？」と小ばかにしてきました。「ぼくは勉強中なんで、おっしゃることがわかりません」とだけ言っておきました。居酒屋で「ウポポイで働いている」と言ったら知らない人にねたまれて「じゃあいい給料もらってんだな」といわれたこともありました。働いて食べはするけれどそれだけじゃないんですけど、給料をもらうことが悪いみたいに言われて。北海道の和人はアイヌの文化・服装くらいは知っていると思いますが、北海道外の人々や、海外の人々にも、知ってもらったら良いと思うことはこういうことです。和人が来る前には、私たちの仲間は違う言葉、違う服装をし、違う生活をしていたのが、なぜ和人と同じように暮らしているのか、をよく知ってもらえれば良いですね。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　レタンナイ【アイヌ語・帯広方言】","dialect":"帯広方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://youtu.be/qN_Z0VHMxjA?si=Xbkd1_JkjqnPW0_b","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#3480","text":"Kunne an kor maciya noski ta usa ciesinotusi otta ka usa ihokcise otta ka usa ikucise otta ka ene iki hi neno imerusune are yakka ureska kusu neno iki wa ene an=kar hi ka isam nankor .","translation":"暗くなれば中心街の遊技場、商店、歓楽街に灯がともるが、生きるためには仕方ないだろう。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1039039673186758657","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#1","text":"…n 'aacahahacin 'okore 'isan teh sinenehka yayreske monimahpo. 'etuhka ta'ah tura 'an manu. 'etuhka tura 'ani ike taa, 'etuhka monimahpo tura 'ani ike taa, keraykusu taa kopiyanu manu.","translation":"サンヌピシ村に娘が一羽のカラスと一緒に住んでいたとさ。(ふうん。Ｍ）サンヌピシ村でカラスと暮らしていたとさ。小さいときから…（アイヌ語で言ってちょうだい。Ｍ）小さいときから母さんもなく父さんもなく独りぼっちで育った娘だった。それでカラスと一緒にいたとさ。カラスと一緒にいて、カラスと娘が一緒にいて、おかげで孤独を慰め合っていた。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/028/3#12","text":"'tonkori ramatuhu an keraykusu pirikano an=rehte easkay anpe' sekor hawean.","translation":"『トンコリの魂のお陰でうまく弾けたんだよ』と。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Fujiyama Haru húci k=etunankar","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#900","text":"yaynu=an keraykusu","translation":"考えられてきたおかげで","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/661139718172602368","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"murasaki-enciw/08#9","text":"A: taranoka 'aynu 'utah hemata ki=hci kusu 'okay=ahci hii?","translation":"A: あの人たちが何をしているんだろう？","collection":"エンチウ（樺太アイヌ語）会話入門","document":"第8課","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784865381757","source_slug":"enchiw-sakhalin-conversation"},{"sentence_id":"sentoku/2#94","text":"y ki=hci uneno pirika okay","translation":"います。同じく元気でいます","collection":"千徳太郎治のピウスツキ宛書簡","document":"第3の手紙","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/900023326/","source_slug":"sentoku-pilsudski-letters"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/mkpoli#156","text":"utara opista kikanay okay ki=hci","translation":"人々はみんな元気でいます","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"♪ まくぽり ☆彡 (@mkpoli)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/mkpoli/status/1866754296458645554","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["アイヌタイムズ","アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","平取町アイヌ口承文芸"]
column10: ["北海道/北東/十勝","北海道/南西/千歳","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/4#4","text":"kuttomo hup cikanakne kikin ari réan ni, húra yupke ni a=tuypa wa arki=an. ni ruye cikanakne kapu a=kar yakkay pirka korkay níteke usa a=kaypa wa su or en a=o wa a=popte. numihi anakne pon korkay a=e easkay. su otta kikinni a=popte wa imi an=ekamure tek ohonno an cikanakne kuttomo ponno kay riten nankor. kikinni wakka…","translation":"のどが腫れたなら、キキンという名の木、香りの強い木 (注: エゾノウワミズザクラ) を切ってきます。 木が太かったら皮を剥いでもいいですが、枝も折って鍋に入れて煮ます。 実は小さいですが食べられます。 鍋でキキンニを煮て、服を頭にかぶってしばらくすると、 のどが少しでも治まるでしょう。キキンニの (を沸かした)お湯の湯気を決して逃がさないように服を頭にかぶって口を開けます。 のどが治まってくればいいです。 2度3度だけならのどは治まらないでしょう。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"omkekar hi ta","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/021/006#45","text":"mun ne yakka kikin ne yakka nep ne yakka ukoytak hawe ka","translation":"草であれ、虫であれ、何であれお互いに話しをしていることを","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ポンニマ」小皿（途中テープ切れ　22号へ続く）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N021P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2873","text":"sukus hauke wa kikin rek wa ratci kunneiwa ne ruwe ne wa.","translation":"日差しが緩くて虫が鳴いて、穏やかな朝です。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1830359760648192290","source_slug":null}]

column8: ["elpr-a2","アイヌ語教材テキスト","浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II"]
column10: ["樺太/西海岸/小田洲","樺太/西海岸/来知志"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/027#54","text":"…hekaci pahkay, samahki pahkay, nah kii 'ike taa 'onne taa, rekucihi 'onne 'okoysehci 'osomahci yayne taa, rekucihi tuyteki ike ray manu. ray teh taa 'orowa kisaruhu taa 'opusihci 'ike taa, poro ninkaari kaari アノー 'ahunkehci teh taa 'ociwehci manu.","translation":"それでこんどは、その女、その死んだ男の妻は食べるものもなくなった。それからあちこちで子守をした。あちこちで子守をし、子守をしていたが、子どもを逆さにおぶったり、ちゃんとおぶったり、横におぶったりしたから、その首にオシッコしたり、エンコしたりして、とうとうその首が切れて死んでしまったとさ。死んでから、その耳に穴をあけて大きい耳輪をそこから通してお葬式を出したとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"おならの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at27aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#21","text":"etooninkaari sanke manuyke taa kisaruhu","translation":"出して耳に通した。","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/28#1","text":"poroo etooninkaari sanke manuyke taa kisaruhu kotuye.","translation":"提げ飾りのついた大きな耳飾を出して、耳に通した","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ28 所有の表現２","dialect":"来知志","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/031#466","text":"Rikunpet un kotan ne a p kotan koci poka ka isam no,","translation":"かつてリクンペッの村であったものは、村の跡形もなくなり、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・石井正樹聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 21","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=31","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"bible/1pe/002#21","text":"Tanpe kusu, eci=a=nisuk nisa ruwe ne; inanpe kusu ne yakun, Kiristo ne yakka eci utar kusu ayayramsitnere, awa, ne koci or ta eci=kari kuni ne, eci utar kusu aykoykarape ante nisa ruwe ne:","translation":"あなたがたが召されたのはこのためです。というのは、キリストもあなたがたのために苦しみを受け、その足跡に続くようにと、模範を残されたからです。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"2","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-dict/039#68","text":"cikir koci; ruwehe","translation":"足の跡；足跡","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"地","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/022/007#40","text":"soyun ciketoy a=koesoyosma","translation":"外庭に出て行き","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N022P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#89","text":"rap=an ayne a=kor a mosir cioposore pokna mosir opospa wa rap=an ayne a=ye rok kuni yacine mosir teyne mosir a=koesoyosma inkar=an ruwe ene oka hi","translation":"下りるうちに人間の国をくぐりぬけ下の国を通り抜けて下りたあげくいわゆる谷地の国湿った国にパッと飛び込んで見たのはこのようだった。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/18#456","text":"a=koesoyosma akusu","translation":"に出ました。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"あの世の入り口（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E3%81%82%E3%81%AE%E4%B8%96%E3%81%AE%E5%85%A5%E3%82%8A%E5%8F%A3%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/058/1#17","text":"Utapke ka porosere a=okére wa kunneywa k=útapke benchi or ta k=a wa kôhî ku=ku kor sonno ku=sampe pirka.","translation":"修理も大半が終わり、朝、自分で直したべンチに座ってコーヒーを飲むと心が落ち着く。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Husko cise ku=hok ruwe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-dict#3","text":"kohi an=ku kusu akup ekota paye=an rok!","translation":"珈琲を飲みにカフェに行きましょう！","collection":null,"document":"ウポポイのアイヌ語表示辞典","dialect":"旭川方言","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://nam.go.jp/wp/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/5c5e1f24922be5ef27295ed7cbba5e48.pdf","source_slug":"upopoy-ainu-language-signage-dictionary"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#342","text":"iruka kusini wa kôhî kuku so.","translation":"一寸コーヒーブレイクにしましょう。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1567747104092848128","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/039#48","text":"monimhahpo tani taa huhteh naa 'unci 'ohta 'ama 'ike ta'a paaha kara 'ike 'epaapahsekakara. 'orowa taa kemaha naa huure po'us tah konoye. tekihi naa huure po'us konoye. tani taa 'ecikiiki numa manu.","translation":"娘は今度、松葉を火にくべて、煙を出して、煙らせた。それから、足にも、赤い布をつけ、手にも赤い布を付けて、今、エチキーキは起きたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"エチキーキ鳥","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at39aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/010#57","text":"kayani kitay sine ikinne at konoye at sarkese Poysoyaunmat tekkonoye koyay’otoytum- anpa kane ne rapoki Poysoyaunkur hayok sak nispa rokuntew upsor etamani","translation":"帆柱のてっぺんすべてに（アカㇺの）紐がからみつき，紐の端をポイソヤウンマッは手にまきつけて力を振りしぼってそうしている間にポイソヤウンクㇰ（という）鎧のない勇士は戦艦の中で刀で戦っていました。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-3","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/yukar/05#764","text":"inunpe ka... konoye kor","translation":"炉縁木を踏みつけながら","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"高貴な兄とよこしまな姉（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%E3%83%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%82%8A%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E9%AB%98%E8%B2%B4%E3%81%AA%E5%85%84%E3%81%A8%E3%82%88%E3%81%93%E3%81%97%E3%81%BE%E3%81%AA%E5%A7%89%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語アーカイブ","アイヌ語弁論大会","アイヌ語教材テキスト"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/幌別","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/09#153","text":"a=onaha earkinne newsar konuptek pe","translation":"父は本当に話好きで","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"ワシ神の化身と人間の娘（1986）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%83%AF%E3%82%B7%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E5%8C%96%E8%BA%AB%E3%81%A8%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%AE%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881986%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-benron/27/00#7","text":"…ya. aynuitak ekampinuye utar aynu oruspe ekampinuye utar anak 『アイヌ神 謡集』 epitta sikkuspare. korka 『アイヌ神謡集』 eramaspa utar tumke ta, atpake un itak etakasure konuptek pe ka inne somo ki ya. kamuyyukar ikir tum ta, hokampa oruspe ka inne, kaske un kem hura at oruspe ka inne. hoski itak an wa kusu easir, ene 知里 katkemat, a…","translation":"そもそも、『アイヌ神謡集』はどれくらい読まれているのでしょう。アイヌ語研究をする人、文学の研究をする人は『アイヌ神謡集』の中の話を読みます。しかし、『神謡集』を好む人の中には、特に序文が好きだという人も多いのではないでしょうか。本の中の神謡は、難解なものも多いし、血の匂いのするの話多い。知里さんがこれほど知られている理由としては、やはり巻頭の美文の存在が大きいのではないでしょうか。","collection":"アイヌ語弁論大会","document":"知里幸恵生誕120年に思う事","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/learn/language/itakanro/files/r05_pg_22.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-speech-contest"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/horobetsu-intermediate/24#4","text":"tane ki sinotca iyotta ku=konuptek!","translation":"今歌っている歌が一番（私は）好きだ！","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ 24「きれいに」「ゆっくり」「みじかく」 副詞","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/horobetsu_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-358/3/1#84","text":"aokay ne yakka mik=an kor inne seta utur a=korawosma.","translation":"私も吠えながら大勢の犬の間へと潜り込んでいく。","collection":"アイヌ語・アイヌ文化研究の課題","document":"金田一京助宛ノート散文説話「金の煙草入れ（konkani tampakop）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/109482/358-p015.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-ainu-research-issues"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/005/0#49","text":"korawosma hontomo ta soyoterke.","translation":"とび込むと、すぐにまたとび出しました。","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"1","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-uepeker/002#69","text":"néap too ki-sar tumu korawosma kor ene itaki","translation":"その鹿はずーっとかや原へ 逃げ込むときに 言いました、","collection":"知里幸恵のウウェペケレ（昔話）","document":"Iskarputu un Nispa itak","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784832804029","source_slug":"chiri-yukie-uwepeker"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/013/004#119","text":"u tuki korpok","translation":"杯のもとに","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚　ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」火なしに育った、水なしに育った","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N013P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/21/002#17","text":"Suy, “kinasut” sekor an itak ikkewehe anakne mun korpok peka apkas kusu a=ye hi ne ruwe ne kusu ne na.","translation":"また、「草の根元」と言う言葉の由来は（ヘビが）草の下を歩くと言われているからです。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第2話「ヘビの起源（Kinasutkamuy moto katu）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#2825","text":"korpok ta","translation":"直前に、下に","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#73","text":"enkasike nispa mutpe otu santuka oukaoma uepusakur- suypa kane casi kotor mike kane kurkot kane oharkisoun pon menoko an nankor _ya? nupur pe sone nupur cannoyep tusu cannoyep esirutumta- nuyna kane mukke turenpe ekimuykasi tewninpaye sara turenpe kapap say kunne episkanike say’unitara pa","translation":"その上に勇者の太刀の多くの刀の柄が積み重なり房飾りを揺らして山城の天井が輝いたりかげったりして，左座に若い女がいるのだろうか，巫力の強い者に違いなく巫力の現れトゥスの現れを頭飾りをかぶって隠しながらも隠形の憑き神はその頭の上でまたたき現形の憑き神はコウモリの群のように彼女のまわりに群れている。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#238","text":"nispa mutpe","translation":"豪華な刀が","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/1067639831272947712","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2004/4/41#26","text":"mutpe opitta","translation":"佩く物全てを","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"41","dialect":"旭川","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":null,"source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/032/2#22","text":"asinni húci, apa kamuy or ta kasi a=kik hine, orowano upew (=Karahuto-ninjin) ani a=ewónnere.","translation":"アシンニフッチ、アパカムイのとこでカシキクして、それからウペウ (=カラフトニンジン) でもって顔洗わせる。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"upew","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#2617","text":"DAIKON ne yakka NINJIN ne yakka taykora ne yakka omare wa ohaw a=kar wa a=e","translation":"大根であっても、人参であっても、大根の葉であっても入れて汁を作って食べる","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#253","text":"TAMANEGI NINJIN an=tatatata","translation":"玉葱と人参をみじん切りにします","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1560392419581263873","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#332","text":"rikun nira... ninar ninar ka ta an a kotan kotan kor kur ne an","translation":"高い丘の、丘の上にあった村の村おさがいて","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/shinyo/04#39","text":"eino nira... nita... ninae... ninar noski","translation":"平原の真ん中に","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"神の娘に恋をした（エイノ）（1982）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%A5%9E%E8%AC%A1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E5%A8%98%E3%81%AB%E6%81%8B%E3%82%92%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%EF%BC%88%E3%82%A8%E3%82%A4%E3%83%8E%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%881982%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2384","text":"tanpa ka nira suisen akopa wa ae oruspe kukoinu ruwe ne.","translation":"今年も韮と水仙を取り違えて食べた話が聞こえてきました。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1778551801744347623","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#2103","text":"ku=an .Neampe kusu ku=nisnu korka sinenne ku=an hi ta anak ku=kiroroan .Kutci sekor an pe ta sino isam yakka pirka .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/814373146027429888","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2011/4/49#5","text":"nep ka e=ki ka somo ki no e=en=tere wa e=an yakka e=nisnu nankor.","translation":"何もしないで待っていても退屈でしょう。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"49","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/11-4.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/ishikarigawa-intermediate/24#1","text":"Oman wa isam okake ta sonno ku=nisnu.","translation":"彼が去った後、私はとても寂しかった","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ24 位置関係の表現1","dialect":"石狩川","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/ishikari_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/030#17","text":"eytasa a=turesi cis kor a=parunpehe a=nunnunte","translation":"ひどく妹が泣くと、私は舌をしゃぶらせるだの、","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 川上まつ子さん口演・阪口諒聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 20","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=30","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#7029","text":"pon soy unuhu nepki kusu soyne wa isam pe ne kusu totto nunnun rusuy kusu cis kor patek an pe ne kusu sucihi kaptora nunnunte wa kor an.","translation":"子供が母親が仕事で外に出てしまったものだから、お乳が飲みたくて泣いてばかりいるので、祖母が老いた乳房を吸わせていた。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/002#112","text":"korkoni a=kar wa a=kuykuy wa a=e=nunnunte h_ike","translation":"フキを採ってかじり、お前に口移しで吸わせたけれども、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"ぶどうづるの輪がトパットゥミを退けてくれた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/049/0#13","text":"Te pakno Kushiro un kur ye itak jisho oassam wa kusu, ne kampisos anak, nekon a=eyayrayke yakkay a=hayta pakno pirka kampisos ne ruwe ne.","translation":"今まで釧路の人たちの言葉の辞書は全くなかったため、この辞書は、どんなに感謝しても足りないほど素晴らしい辞書でした。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Matsumoto Shigeyoshi nispa","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"hokkaido-minzokugaku/2/001#11","text":"(tek), wa, (ne), tane pak kamuy kay oassam a hi nekon an kus tap kamuy","translation":"それで、今までクマも全くいなかったのにどうしてクマが","collection":"北海道民族学","document":"クマの追跡を逃れた話","dialect":"十勝（本別）","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://hes.official.jp/images/kaishi_pdf/02/02-06takahashi.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2016/2/23#0","text":"A: nen kay oassam cik wen nankor kus pirkano siruye ani.","translation":"A: 誰もいないと良くないから、きちんと留守番をしてください。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"23","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/H28ainuradiotext_vol.2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/031/3#10","text":"hokuhu anak macihi eun \"omae\" sekor hawean.","translation":"その夫は妻に「お前」と言います。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"mat anakne a=etun pe ne","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"center/017/02#201","text":"eun OMAE, a=utek sisam utar","translation":"そこへお前たち､ 稼ぎ人たちが","collection":"北海道立アイヌ民族文化研究センター紀要","document":"和人の散文説話 ― 継母から殺されかけた姉を救った妹 ―","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu-center.hm.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/kankou/kiyou/pdf/kiyou17_02.pdf","source_slug":"hokkaido-ainu-culture-center-bulletin"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#28","text":"dare konna kurai toki aruku mono irunoyo, omae kuraina mondabesa nasite konna toko de neterundatte yutte","translation":"誰こんな暗いとき歩くものいるのよお前くらいなもんだべさなしてこんなとこで寝てるんだってゆって（母は）「誰がこんな暗い時間に歩くのよ、お前くらいなもんでしょ。なんでこんなところで寝ているんだ」と言って","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/029/4#6","text":"\"iuta upopo\" \"saranpe\" \"côrakkun❞ \"Sarkiusnay kotan\" \"utari opunpare wa\" \"aru o\"....","translation":"「イウタウポポ」 (杵つき歌) 「サランペ」 (反物)「チョーラックン」「サルキウシナイコタン」(葦がびっしり生えている沢の村)「ウタリオブンパレワ」 (みんな立ち上がって)「アルオー」 (山菜がいっぱいある)","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"CD \"upopo sanke\"","dialect":"十勝・本別","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/prmag_bunka#0","text":"utar opunpare wa","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"文化庁 (@prmag_bunka)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/prmag_bunka/status/1362250869396307970","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2016/1/10#0","text":"utar opunpare wa rimsere yan a hao hao i","translation":"人々を起き上がらせて踊らせなさい。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"10","dialect":"十勝","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/十勝","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B8%E3%82%AA%E8%AC%9B%E5%BA%A72016vol1.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/018/002#88","text":"po hene cis=an. cip oputuypa kus ne kor","translation":"なおのこと私は泣きました。両親は舟を押しだそうとし、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トパットゥミ　オッタ　アサハ　トゥラ　アエイッカ」トパットゥミで姉とともに連れ去られた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N018P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-dict/004#137","text":"oputuypa wa payere","translation":"押しやる","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"移動","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/001/0#60","text":"wenkur hekaci uko-oputuypa uko-kikkik.","translation":"貧しい子を皆で突きとばしたりなぐったりしました。","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"1","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

column8: ["アイヌ神謡集","千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","平取町アイヌ口承文芸"]
column10: ["北海道/南西/幌別","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/007/002#165","text":"paye=an ayne oyak wa ek pet pet ru orke a=i=orapte","translation":"行って、別の所から来ている川、川沿いの道に私たちを下らさせました。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ケソラㇷ゚　カムイ　イレス」孔雀の神に育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N007P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-325/25#142","text":"orowa ne wa easir sonno yaykokatpak pa yayokapaste pa ‘hemanta kusu ene wen puri patek a=ki i=panakte=an kusu nitay sak cikap sak usike a=i=orapte ko suy yaykokatpak=an ka somo ki no asirikinne naa sino wen yaynu wen puri a=ukoramuosma wa aynu kotan un sap a p hontomo ta pirka kuni ne aynu a=nukar wa a=rayke a=e kuni a…","translation":"そこで（彼らは）本当に大層後悔して、悔いて、『どうして、私たちはそのように悪い振る舞いばかりをして、罰を受けるために、林もなく鳥もいない場所へと下ろされて、まだ後悔することもなく、新たに一層本当に悪い考え、悪い振る舞いをすることに皆で合意して、アイヌの村へと下りていったが、その途中に美味しそうなアイヌを見て、我々が殺して食べようと思ったのだが、アイヌの女性が良い言葉を口にしながら我々に料理をしてくれる様子に、我々はいたく感謝をして食事をした。","collection":"千葉大学大学院人文公共学府研究プロジェクト報告書","document":"金成マツ筆録ノートの口承文学テクストの原文対訳及び解釈 : 散文説話「六人の山子（iwan yamanko）」","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/104915/S18817165-325-P025-FUJ.pdf","source_slug":"chiba-grad-report"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/011/0#43","text":"kenas so ka ci-orapte.","translation":"木原の上に降ろされた。","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"1","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/052#3","text":"neeteh taa 'okaaketa taa, 'ayyayne taa, ウン yeesu taa, macihi 'isan teh taa 'okaaketa taa muhru 'empoke wa tani neya kosonto somaha taa, 'asinke manu. kosonto somaha 'asinke 'ike taa, pitata 'ike taa, niinum tuh pis 'ohta 'an manu.","translation":"それからしばらくして、イエースはその妻が出かけていない時に後で、枕の下からその晴れ着に包んだものを取り出したとさ。晴れ着の包みを取り出して包みを開けたら、木の玉が２つそこにあったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物-92","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at52aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/08#866","text":"“nekon an... torattus pitata wa i=kore","translation":"「何とか…丈夫な紐を解いてください。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"オタスッとオタサㇺの忘れ形見（1981）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%AA%E3%82%BF%E3%82%B9%E3%83%83%E3%81%A8%E3%82%AA%E3%82%BF%E3%82%B5%E3%87%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%BF%98%E3%82%8C%E5%BD%A2%E8%A6%8B%EF%BC%881981%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/27#3","text":"paaporo mahtekuh sineh kemoh sanke teh atuhu pitata.","translation":"そのお婆さんは、針入れを１つ出して、紐をほどいた","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ27 所有の表現１","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/041/3#10","text":"orowano, 2001 pa ta, Ainu Bunkasinkou Zaidan kor Ainu Go Radio Kouza or ta ne yakkay Aynuitak eicakoko.","translation":"そして、2001年、アイヌ文化振興財団のアイヌ語ラジオ講座でもアイヌ語を教えました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ueno Sada huci mosirhoppa","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#3557","text":"Yakka ku=inu hike rorumpe sonno yupke kusu iotta an=eiwanke kuni ikor an=porore kuni mosireyaytunususi ta an=urenkare sekor radio orwa sonko cisanke kusu iisoneka sekor ku=eyaykopuntek .","translation":"だが、激甚災害のため予算の増額が国会で決まったとのラジオニュースを聞き、よかったと思った。","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1045585684906438656","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2006/2/21#2","text":"kuani anak RADIO ku=nu.","translation":"私はラジオを聞く。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"21","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/06-2.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#4906","text":"rapuhu","translation":"…の羽","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-minwa/34#146","text":"rapuhu ran... tuy wa owse inaw ikkew","translation":"削りかけが落ちて心棒だけになったものが","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"祭壇の神に育てられた子どもの敵討ち（1980）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E7%A5%AD%E5%A3%87%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AB%E8%82%B2%E3%81%A6%E3%82%89%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A9%E3%82%82%E3%81%AE%E6%95%B5%E8%A8%8E%E3%81%A1%EF%BC%881980%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/saru-intermediate/28#2","text":"Isokapiw sine rapuhu ne yakka puyar or ta apa or ta a=racitkere kor pirka p ne na.","translation":"アホウドリの羽の一枚でも、窓のところに、戸口のところにぶら下げておくとよいのですよ","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ28 所有の表現２","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/saru_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/004#3","text":"…ahpo 'uta (makapahci) sapahcihi ne'ampe taa, 'ene sine cisina hekaci taa 'ukahci teh 'ampahci wa 'arikihci manu.neyke taa, 'orowa ne'an, cise 'ohta taa tura ruura wa reekoh 'e'ukiroro'okaytehci teh haw'ikihi neya, ワラウナガラ コンダキタンダト。 ナンダベト オモッテウチ sapahci koh pon hekaci sineh 'ampahci wa sapahci manu. pon hekaci sineh 'am…","translation":"留守番をしていたが、（山に行った）娘たちが帰ってきたのだが、紐で縛られた赤ん坊を拾って抱いて帰って来たとさ。それで、それから、家に連れて帰って、とても喜んでうれしそうに話しながら帰って来たとさ。何だろうと思ったら、娘たちは小さい赤ん坊を一人連れて帰って来て、今こうやってあやしたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ポヌンカヨ -86","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at04aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/itangiku#347","text":"Hopuni=an ruwe i=ruura toomaw an=i=kokara !","translation":"私達は出立します 追い風を 送ってください！","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"丹菊逸治 (@itangiku)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/itangiku/status/1904897826972459322","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intro/02#1","text":"ku=yuhpoho inaw ruura.","translation":"兄さんがイナウを運ぶ","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"２月カムイに感謝をする","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_nyumon.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/013/0#7","text":"kewehe sekken us kane onsen osma utar ka oka.","translation":"体に石鹸を付けて、温泉に入る人たちもいた。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"sísam patek","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#6456","text":"tumi okere okake ta usa okay pe isam wa SEKKEN sekor a=ye p ka isam pe ne kusu una or un wakka k=omare wa ponno k=anu wa kasikihe k=ecikiki wa ani ku=mipihi ku=huraye wa pirka.","translation":"戦争が終わった後は色々な物が無くて、石鹸というものも無かったので、灰に水を入れて、少し置いて、その上澄みの部分を流して、それで私の着物を洗濯するときれいになった。","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"},{"sentence_id":"nakamoto-kamuyyukar/018#5","text":"tan sekken ani amip huraypa wa en=kore yan!","translation":"この石鹸で着物を洗ってください。","collection":"カムイユカㇻを聞いてアイヌ語を学ぶ","document":"第18章","dialect":"千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560086803","source_slug":"learning-ainu-through-kamuy-yukar"}]

Setu húci irwak a=ne ruwe an?","translation":"兄弟を恋しく思いますか？ あなたはセツさんのご兄弟ですか？","collection":"トピック別 アイヌ語会話辞典","document":"家族","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/topic/","source_slug":"topical-ainu-conversation-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/021#250","text":"sietuuk siparouk kor","translation":"自分の鼻をおさえて、自分の口をおさえながら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 14（後半）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=21","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/006/001#184","text":"sekor hawean=an akusu sietuuk siparuk kor","translation":"と言うと、（老爺は）自分の鼻をおさえ、口をおさえ","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ヌサコㇿカムイ　イカオピューキ」祭壇を司る神さまが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N006P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/16#395","text":"kamuy utar opitta sietuuk pa kor","translation":"神達はみんな驚いて鼻を押さえ","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"雷神にさらわれた娘（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AB%E3%81%95%E3%82%89%E3%82%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/005/002#87","text":"oraun kamuy sikoypakte p ne kusu","translation":"そしてカムイが腹を立てたために、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「スルクマッ　チクペニカムイ　イカオピューキ」トリカブトとエンジュのカムイが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N005P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#161","text":"sekor okay pe a=yuputari i=kopasrota koramusinne a=ki wa ramma kane oka=an hike a=yaykotuyma- siramsuye wa inu=an hike “tumunci ekasi Nitaypakaye kor wen kewtum opakanere a=ki rok kusu emkosama Aeoynakamuy kor_ turesi ene an kamuy ene an pito sikoypakte a=ki ya?” sekor yaynu=an hike ipe kera a=yaykosakka","translation":"と兄さんたちが私をしかりつける（と）私は心が安らいで（それからは）いつもどおりに暮らしていたが思いをめぐらせてみると「トゥムンチ爺さんのニタイパカイェの悪い精神（のせい）で私は馬鹿になったからそのためにアエオイナカムイの妹をあれほどの神あれほどの方を怒らせてしまったのか」と思うと食事の味も感じられない。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/16#485","text":"somo ki yakun po sikoypakte a=ki.","translation":"話さないならばなおさら私は罰せられます。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"雷神にさらわれた娘（1985）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E9%9B%B7%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AB%E3%81%95%E3%82%89%E3%82%8F%E3%82%8C%E3%81%9F%E5%A8%98%EF%BC%881985%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語訳新約聖書","平取町アイヌ口承文芸","鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート"]
column10: ["北海道","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/mat/026#39","text":"Orowa, Sinuma ponno hoskino oman wa nanuhu kosirikata pakno hacir wa inonno-itak hine ene itak hi :— Aa Ku Mici, aeaskaype ne yakanak ne, tan itanki En=oro wano simaka a=oraye kuni ne ki wa En=kore: korka, Ku renkayne koraci somo ne, E renkayne koraci ki wa En=kore, ari itak.","translation":"少し進んで行って、うつ伏せになり、祈って言われた。「父よ、できることなら、この杯をわたしから過ぎ去らせてください。しかし、わたしの願いどおりではなく、御心のままに。」","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"26","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/012/003#385","text":"ponno simaka","translation":"少し開かれて","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚ ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」ポイヤウンペ イソイタㇰ　火なしに育った、水なしに育った","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N012P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#16","text":"pakno ne kor amso ka ta tumi simaka wenpe simaka a=eyaytapkurka- osikirpa","translation":"そうして床の上で戦いのそぶり戦争のそぶりをし肩で風を切って身をひるがえした。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/055/0#9","text":"Esir sirtokap kusu túnasno moymoyke ka eaykap nankor kuni ku=ramu.","translation":"さっきは昼だったので早く動くことができなかったのだろう。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Tane anakne ku=uni piskani ta…..","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"biratori/018/002#111","text":"orano sirkunne したり sitok... sirtokap したり","translation":"それから、夜になったり、昼になったりして、","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「トパットゥミ　オッタ　アサハ　トゥラ　アエイッカ」トパットゥミで姉とともに連れ去られた話","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N018P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/0#4861","text":"sirtokap","translation":"昼になる","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"新井田セイノ氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/032/2#42","text":"sinrici anakne shôyaku or ta tôki sekor a=ye p ne ruwe ne.","translation":"この根は生薬では、当帰 (トウキ) と呼ばれるものです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"upew","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"hoppo-gengo/14/001#28","text":"dare konna kurai toki aruku mono irunoyo, omae kuraina mondabesa nasite konna toko de neterundatte yutte","translation":"誰こんな暗いとき歩くものいるのよお前くらいなもんだべさなしてこんなとこで寝てるんだってゆって（母は）「誰がこんな暗い時間に歩くのよ、お前くらいなもんでしょ。なんでこんなところで寝ているんだ」と言って","collection":"北方言語研究","document":"火の玉を見て気を失った話（テキスト1・2014年）","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://eprints.lib.hokudai.ac.jp/repo/huscap/all/92082/14_Kishimoto.pdf","source_slug":null},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/022#9","text":"SONO MATA KITE, SONO MUSUKORA CIRERARETE ITTA TOKI NI,","translation":"またやってきて、その息子たちが連れられていったが、そこで、","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"会所の番人に家族を殺され、逃げた若者","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/014/004#45","text":"tunoiwan suy","translation":"何回も何回も","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"カムイユカㇻ「アイヌモシㇼ　チクニレ　カムイ　モシㇼ　チクニレ（エーイノォー）」人間界の木の名前と神の国の木の名前","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N014P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/008#24","text":"iteki soyne no oka yan.” sekor a=koytakmuye ki rok awa “yuppo.” sekor haweoka kor a=cinkikese tunoiwan suy renoiwan suy oukoraye ki korkayki tu pirka kuni p re pirka kuni p ciepakasnu a=ekarkar hine soywasamma a=osiraye","translation":"決して外に出ずにいるのだよ」と言い置きをすると，（妹は）「お兄ちゃん」と言いながら私の着物の裾に何度も幾度もしがみついてきたけれど多くのよいこと多数のよいことを（妹に）教え諭して私は外に出た。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/minwa/23#25","text":"tunoiwan suy renoiwan suy kampi ek wa","translation":"何度も何度も手紙が来て","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"殿様の無理難題と津波の神（1983）","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29%E6%AE%BF%E6%A7%98%E3%81%AE%E7%84%A1%E7%90%86%E9%9B%A3%E9%A1%8C%E3%81%A8%E6%B4%A5%E6%B3%A2%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%881983%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/043/3#18","text":"Uraka ta an \"Bethel no Ie\" ari an=ye uske eutanne.","translation":"浦河に「べてるの家」というところに参加しました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Ainu Minzoku Bunkasai newa \"itak=an ro\" Sirarika ta an=kor","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"upopoy-staffs/001#9","text":"B: Uraka kotan ta porokampinukatcise pakno ku=an. haykannukampinukatcise ta, repunkur itak ku=ekampinuye wa, sonno ku=ekiroroan. orowa neanpe ku=koarikiki wa, ku=kotan ta, repunkuritak upakte an hi ta ka, oro ta ku=eykaun wa.","translation":"B: 高校まで浦河にいました。中学校で、英語を習って、とても楽しくて、 それから英語をがんばって、町内の英語暗唱大会があったときも、そこで優勝しました。","collection":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー","document":"ウポポイ職員インタビュー　クワンノ【アイヌ語・浦河方言】","dialect":"浦河","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/浦河","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oX5DYkGLjKo","source_slug":"upopoy-staff-interviews"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2006/3/40#1","text":"Uraka pakno apkas=an no.","translation":"浦河まで歩きましょう。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"40","dialect":"様似","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/様似","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/06-3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]

'omantene taa yeesu taa cise 'ohta hosipi manuyke taa, cise 'ohta 'an nahkayki taa nah 'an manu.","translation":"そのいろいろな物を出して、そのイェースにやったとさ。そうしてから、男は家へ帰ったが、家にいても同じことをしたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"おならの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at27aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/005#135","text":"wooya an poopoh an=kara an=kii","translation":"いろいろの供物を作って","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"トゥイタハ (言い伝え5)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"},{"sentence_id":"express-special/003#7","text":"wooya an itah haciko hekaci ku=nuurehci","translation":"私は小さい男の子に色々な言葉を聞かせた。","collection":"ニューエクスプレス・スペシャル 日本語の隣人たち I+II","document":"馬をたくさん見たよ","dialect":"樺太","dialect_path":"樺太","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:isbn:9784560089231","source_slug":"new-express-special-neighbors"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/013#209","text":"yayesiruwante=an [40] wa inkar=an kusu ne na.’ sekor hawa... hawan... hawan=an kor","translation":"あたりをよく見まわしてみるのよ」と私は言いながら","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料 「川上まつ子さん口演・欠ヶ端和也聞き起こし・訳注：uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 11","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=13","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/11#444","text":"‘yayesiruwante=an wa inkar=an kusu ne na’","translation":"『俺もあたりを見回してよく見てみよう』","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"伝染病の神の息子とねたむ人間たち（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E4%BC%9D%E6%9F%93%E7%97%85%E3%81%AE%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%81%A8%E3%81%AD%E3%81%9F%E3%82%80%E4%BA%BA%E9%96%93%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/045/013#7","text":"e=yayesiruwante easirki p ne na","translation":"おまえは自分で様子を見に行かなければならないのだよ","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"アイヌ語でいいなずけの言い方","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34666BP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/014#17","text":"hosipihci teh taa, cise 'ohta payehci teh taa, tani 'etuhka tah yaykoniwen manu.","translation":"帰って、家に帰って今、カラスは腹が立って仕方がなかったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ハシ細カラスとカラス","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at14aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"bible/luk/016#16","text":"Tuytak newa uweinkarape anakne Yoannes pakno an; ne hi ta wano Kamuy mosir kusu an Pirka sonko ewpaskuma a an, orowa, opittano ahup utar anakne yaykoniwen wa ahup ruwe ne.","translation":"律法と預言者は、ヨハネの時までである。それ以来、神の国の福音が告げ知らされ、だれもが力ずくでそこに入ろうとしている。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"16","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#31","text":"ta sinta rakki pokon yaynu=an yaykoniwen yaykosinne","translation":"飛行船が下りてくるように思った。不満足で一人で（？）","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/030/1#7","text":"ora, yaykotan or wa kamuy wakka ci=kor wa arki=as ruwe ne.","translation":"また、自身の村から私たちは聖なる水を持ってきました。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Kamuynomi","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/kawakami-minwa/01#1246","text":"yaykotan yay`utarmore a=ki kusu ne na.","translation":"自分の村、村人を守っていくつもりなのです。","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"おばあちゃんとヤマブドウ（1987）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E5%B7%9D%E4%B8%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%A4%E5%AD%90%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E6%B0%91%E8%A9%B1%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%81%8A%E3%81%B0%E3%81%82%E3%81%A1%E3%82%83%E3%82%93%E3%81%A8%E3%83%A4%E3%83%9E%E3%83%96%E3%83%89%E3%82%A6%EF%BC%881987%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/022/001#13","text":"yaykotan ka wente tuyma hanke","translation":"自分の村もだめにする。遠い近い","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"ねたみ、のろい","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34627BP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/006#319","text":"a=yaykotuyma-","translation":"私は思いを","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（４）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（４）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#161","text":"sekor okay pe a=yuputari i=kopasrota koramusinne a=ki wa ramma kane oka=an hike a=yaykotuyma- siramsuye wa inu=an hike “tumunci ekasi Nitaypakaye kor wen kewtum opakanere a=ki rok kusu emkosama Aeoynakamuy kor_ turesi ene an kamuy ene an pito sikoypakte a=ki ya?” sekor yaynu=an hike ipe kera a=yaykosakka","translation":"と兄さんたちが私をしかりつける（と）私は心が安らいで（それからは）いつもどおりに暮らしていたが思いをめぐらせてみると「トゥムンチ爺さんのニタイパカイェの悪い精神（のせい）で私は馬鹿になったからそのためにアエオイナカムイの妹をあれほどの神あれほどの方を怒らせてしまったのか」と思うと食事の味も感じられない。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#3949","text":"Yaykotuyma-","translation":"あれやこれやと","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/1078941045662990336","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/016/008#4","text":"yay’unakotaci=an kane yay’unakosiru=an kane kor","translation":"私は自分に灰をくっつけて、自分に灰をこすりつけて","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ルパイェユカㇻ「ウェンクㇽ　フチ　イレス」貧乏人のお婆さんに育てられた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N016P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-eurasia/20/001#9","text":"wano eusaron ene yayunakotaci=an kane yayturasinot=an nempak","translation":"下座へと灰まみれになりながら一人遊びをしていた。何日","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"山本多助筆録「サコロベ」","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/105927/S21857148-20-P127-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"nam-archive/oda-yukar/04#264","text":"yay'unakotaci hokooske an='oma wa","translation":"私は自分に灰をまぶして火にくべて??","collection":"アイヌ語アーカイブ","document":"オオカミ神の娘がポイヤウンペの息子を育てる（1988）","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?keyword=%22%E7%B9%94%E7%94%B0%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%8E%E3%81%95%E3%82%93%E3%81%AE%E3%83%A6%E3%83%BC%E3%82%AB%EF%BE%97%E8%AA%9E%E3%82%8A%28%EF%BD%B1%29+%E3%82%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%82%AB%E3%83%9F%E7%A5%9E%E3%81%AE%E5%A8%98%E3%81%8C%E3%83%9D%E3%82%A4%E3%83%A4%E3%82%A6%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%81%AE%E6%81%AF%E5%AD%90%E3%82%92%E8%82%B2%E3%81%A6%E3%82%8B%EF%BC%881988%EF%BC%89%22&typeCont=on","source_slug":"nam-ainu-archive"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/035#22","text":"niina kusu makaniike taa, yuhpo yuhpo taa niinahci ruwehe 'aniike taa, renkayne 'an teh taa, 'orowa taa (yuhpo) niinahci 'ike 'ohta taa, 'etukuma 'ohta taa, mukara 'ani taah niina. niina teh 'etukuma mukara 'ani humpaha ne'ampe ,","translation":"マキとりに行ったら、兄さん達がマキをとった跡があって、マキがたくさんあって、そのマキをとった所に、木の根っこがあって、マサカリでマキをとった。マキをとって木の根っこをマサカリで切ったら、","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"ウンカヨお化け-89","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at35aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"elpr-a2/039/fujiyama/002#35","text":"aniike kusu, nean yamuhu empoketa","translation":"いるから、その葉の下に","collection":"elpr-a2","document":"ウチャシクマ 2 (言い伝え2)","dialect":"ライチシカ","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/来知志","region":"樺太","uri":"urn:issn:1346-082X","source_slug":"corpus-sghwzc"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/008#1","text":"...te monimahpo, Sannupista re monimahpo 'okayahci. te monimahpo 'okayahci 'ike taa cehkoykihci koh 'ehci, niinahci koh kuruhci, nah kihci 'okayahci yayne tani taa, sine too taa, kiyanne monimahpo taa yee manu. \"niina'an koh 'ankuru, ceh 'ankoyki koh 'aneeno 'ankii yahka ヤッパリ 'ohkayo 'isam, wen.\" nah yee シタト。","translation":"３人娘が、サンヌピシ村に３人の娘がいた。３人の娘がいて魚をとっては食べ、マキをとってはくべ、そうしているうちに今ある日に、上の娘が言ったとさ。「マキをとってはくべ、魚をとっては食べしてもやはり男がいなければよくない」と言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"男探しの話","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at08aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/aynuitak_jiji#2405","text":"Sisam anakne Aynu utarihi nekon koyki yakka kosunke yakka ankoyki utar ankosunke utar kasi-opas ka omo ki .","translation":null,"collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"非ウポポイ系アイヌ (@aynuitak_jiji)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/aynuitak_jiji/status/853155953952174080","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/002#57","text":"neeteh taa 'orowa ne'an monimahpo taa kiraha nee manu. 'otakaata san kusu sanihi ne'ampe, アノー ソノ 'oyasi, cipihi 'ay シタ, 'an manu. ソノ cipihiコンダ 'onnayketa repahci teh taa ソノ hekaci 'utah naa tura teh taarepahci teh taa 'atuy kaata nay 'ohta repahcihi ne'ampe horokewpo アノー 'oyasi taa, neya 'unci 'ohta 'ama tokoho 'oht…","translation":"それから、その娘は逃げたとさ。浜に出ようと下りて行ったら、あのうそのお化け、舟があったとさ。その舟のこんど、中に乗って沖へ出て、子どもたちもいっしょに沖へ出てその海の上に、川に、漕ぎ出して行ったら、男、お化けが、その火を置いて来た所へ行ったが、火はみんな消えてなくなっていたとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"頭蓋骨 -84（娘編）","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at02aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/005#13","text":"aynu or_ ta huttat sekor a=ye rok kuni p inne cipihi a=kor petpo petosanputu cioyankekar siran ruwe ne.","translation":"人間のところに笹と言われるもの（で作られた）多くの舟が私たちの川の川尻に上陸した様子なのだ。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-1","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/011#27","text":"'anayne tani taa sine too taa, アノ horokewpo taa, pon horokewpo taa, cikah koykihi nee manu. cikah sineh taa, kuu 'ani cohca, hayta, cohca, hayta nah kii yayne 'ecikiiki 'ene yee manu.","translation":"そうしているうちにある日、男は、その男の子は、鳥をとってきたとさ。鳥を一羽、弓で射っては失敗し、射っては失敗し、しているとき、エチキーキ鳥がこう言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"カラスと娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at11aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-intermediate/24#3","text":"sine nispa suy cohca. kaske poka hayta. suy sine nispa cohca. okakehe ay haaciri.","translation":"1 人の首領がまた射た。（矢は走っている熊の）上に反れた。また 1 人の首領が射た。（熊）の後ろ（に）矢が落ちた。","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ24 位置関係の表現１","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_tyukyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column10: ["北海道/南西/幌別","北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/009#156","text":"Kamuy’otopus a=kor yupi amso kurka paruparu tan ruy ape eparsere pirka suke eyaykesupka- ewak kane pirka mesi yanke hine ipe=an katu a=omommomo","translation":"カムイオトプㇱ兄さんは床の上を払い激しい火を扇ぎ起こし素晴らしい炊事をしにあちらこちら立ち働いておいしい飯を炊き上げて私たちが食事をする様子はかくかくしかじか。","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"yukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"},{"sentence_id":"yukie-kamuyyukar/003/1#11","text":"e-nan-tuyka-eparsere, pustotta oro-oiki kane","translation":"顔中に現れてきました。オキキリムイは皮製の容れ物の中をまさぐっていたので","collection":"アイヌ神謡集","document":"2","dialect":"幌別","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/幌別","region":"北海道","uri":"urn:isbn:9784883231331","source_slug":"ainu-shinyoshu"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-irc/006#315","text":"sukup hontom esukup kuni a=ramú okkayo menoko umurek (po) pókor pa p po tura,","translation":"成長の中程まで育ったように思われる男や女、夫婦、子を持つものは子を連れ","collection":"AA研アイヌ語資料","document":"音声資料「川上まつ子さん口演・浜田隆史聞き起こし・訳注uwepeker ウウェペケㇾ 民話 8（その1）」","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.aa-ken.jp/main.php?id=5","source_slug":"ilcaa-ainu-materials"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/033/3#10","text":"aynu mosir ta k=an hi ta ka ene an pe ku=sitoma korka, itak esukup húci ekasi sinen sinen isam ruwe sonno ku=niska.","translation":"私が北海道にいたときにもそういうことは恐れていましたが、言葉で育った子供のうちからアイヌ語を聞いて育った) おばあさんやおじいさんが一人一人いなくなってしまうことが本当に惜しいです。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"Nibutani kotan k=ésikarun","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/千歳","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/019#6","text":"'etuyma kuupo","translation":"'etuyme kuupo","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"トンコリ娘","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at19aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/039/0#11","text":"\"kuani Harutori to orene ku=oman hi ta, ku=erampetek aynu utar 'irankarapte, Harutori kotan na etuyma ya?' ani en=kopisi ruwe ne.","translation":"「私は春採湖へでかけたとき、見知らぬアイヌの人たちが私に次のように尋ねました。\"イランカラプテ、春採コタンは未だ遠いですか?\"","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"irankarapte","dialect":"釧路","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/釧路","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"}]

column10: ["北海道/南西/沙流"]
column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/009/003#180","text":"a=eukotuyma-","translation":"長いこと","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚」（２）サㇰソモアイェㇷ゚退治（２）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N009P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/006#7","text":"pakno ne kor ya upsor un a=koyki katu tokap rerko kunne rerko ciwkopiski noiwan rerko ciwkopiski a=kor_ rorunpe a=eukotuyma- siarikiki tu kamuy ray hum re kamuy ray hum nikituy sakno oroneanpe koturimimse ki rok ayne sikator kamuy oyaoposo ki ruwe ne.","translation":"それから【そうして】あみの内へ【網の中で】退治せり【懲らしめる様子は】日の三日【昼の日数と】夜三日【夜の日数を】敷合計【併せて】六中夜【何十日をも】敷へり【数えることになった。】我戰ひけり【この戦いで】我気を長く【私たちは永い間】はげしく切り【奮戦し】二神の死おと【多くの神が死ぬ音】三神の死おと【多数の神が死ぬ音が】是つゞけり【絶え間なく】最所こへ【一緒になって】おとが立けり【鳴り轟いた。】こと如くなり【そうしたあげく】咳病の神は【咳病の神が】綱のめ依り逃出しけり。【網から抜け出した】そうして【のだ。】","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/006/001#121","text":"e=monkurkasi a=euneun kusu a=e=tura wa ek=an","translation":"お前の上についているから、私がお前を連れて来たのだ。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ウエペケㇾ「ヌサコㇿカムイ　イカオピューキ」祭壇を司る神さまが私を助けた","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N006P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"ninjal-folklore/014#181","text":"iwak=an orano a=kor pon_ seta i=sam euneun.","translation":"家路をたどると、わが子犬が頭をすりよせてくる。","collection":"アイヌ語口承文芸コーパス","document":"チチケウニッネイと疱瘡神の息子","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainu.ninjal.ac.jp/folklore/","source_slug":"ninjal-folklore-corpus"}]

Cip parurke an=oterke wa cip hokus yak ekota an=rayke!","translation":"向こう岸まで 俺達が彼を渡したら うちの一族やら殺されるから岸に近くなったら「それっ」と俺が言ったら 岸に跳ねよう。船縁を蹴って 船がひっくり返ったら そこで彼を殺そう。","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"37","dialect":"石狩","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/08-3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/ishikarigawa-beginner/32#7","text":"Kus pakno an=kusa yakun ci=utari usa i=rayke=an kusu eyasi sirhanke ciki etak sekor ku=hawki ciki eyasi terke=an!","translation":"向こう岸まで彼を渡したら私の一族やら私たちが殺されるから岸に近づいたらそれっと私が言ったら岸に跳ねよう！","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ32 「...して」「...しながら」文と文をつなぐ表現","dialect":"石狩川","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/石狩","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/ishikari_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

column8: ["アイヌ語訳新約聖書","川上まつ子の伝承"]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/2co/005#18","text":"Korka, opittano okaype Kamuy oro wano an anpe ne, awa, Sinuma anakne Kiristo kusu yaykota epeka un eramuritenka, ayke, ne aeramuritenka koeyaysi-eywankere hi un kore nisa ruwe ne na;","translation":"これらはすべて神から出ることであって、神は、キリストを通してわたしたちを御自分と和解させ、また、和解のために奉仕する任務をわたしたちにお授けになりました。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"5","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"nam-kawakami/073/001#69","text":"（川上）tokapcup kamuy a=eywankere wa","translation":"太陽の神様を使わせて","collection":"川上まつ子の伝承","document":"『創生神話（日本語）』をアイヌ語に反訳２（34698アから続く）","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=34698BP&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"kawakami-matsuko-traditions"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#82","text":"\" 'iine'ah, horokewpo taa suy ne'an, kimma makan teh taa suy, neya nii taa tohpaha ne'ampe, suy tohpa tohpa yahka horah ka hankii.\" manu.","translation":"「ねえ、兄さん、また山に行って、また木を切っても、いくら切っても倒れないよ」と（キツネが）言ったとさ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2941","text":"horah","translation":"ホラㇵ","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1838039862253084968","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"aa-asai/041#72","text":"neeteh tani taa 'orowa neyahkayki taa tani taa suy hekimoh makanihi ne'ampe taa kinta makanihi ne'ampe sine nii, 'orii nii humihi kayki renkayne 'an nii taa, taa tani tohpa manu. horahte kusu neyke 'amahkahahcin taata macihihcin taata 'okaychi hii, nah taa 'eraman kusu","translation":"そうしてそれからそうしていたけれどまた山の方へ登って行ったら、一本の木があって、高い木の音がして、こんどその木を切り倒したとさ。木が倒れて、そこに娘が、妻がいるだろうと思ったからだ。","collection":"浅井タケ昔話全集 I, II","document":"腫れ物 -90","dialect":"小田洲","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/小田洲","region":"樺太","uri":"http://www.aa.tufs.ac.jp/~mmine/kiki_gen/murasaki/at41aj.html","source_slug":"asai-take-folktales"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-textbooks/karahuto-beginner/27#4","text":"hemata kusu an=cisehe e=horahte?","translation":"どうして私の家を崩したの？","collection":"アイヌ語教材テキスト","document":"ステップ27 疑問詞を用いた疑問表現2","dialect":"鵜城","dialect_path":"樺太/西海岸/鵜城","region":"樺太","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/web/potal_site/files/karahuto_shokyu.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-teaching-materials"}]

Orowa, Topoci sekor an itak anakne “wayasnu p” sekor an, suy, “tunas” sekor an, suy, “ikotcane” sekor an itak ikkewe ne ruwe ne na. Tunasno kasi opiwki wa iwankere yan. Siranpa kamuy kotcake ta tunasno aynu iwankere yan, sekor Aynu utar inonnoytak ruwe ne na.","translation":"だから私たちはお祈りをします。それからトポチという言葉は『賢いもの』という意味で、また 『早い』という意味で、 『仲人』という意味でもあります。早く（病人を）助けてください。シランパ カムイの代わりに早くアイヌを治してください」とアイヌたちがお祈りをするのです。","collection":"千葉大学ユーラシア言語文化論集","document":"第5話「樹木崇拝（Cikuni eoonkami oruspe）」","dialect":"静内","dialect_path":"北海道/北東/静内","region":"北海道","uri":"https://opac.ll.chiba-u.jp/da/curator/108062/S21857148-21-P243-SAK.pdf","source_slug":"anon-journal-chiba-university-eurasian-society"},{"sentence_id":"chiba-mukawa/1#3450","text":"ikotcane","translation":"とりなす","collection":"アイヌ語鵡川方言日本語‐アイヌ語辞典","document":"吉村冬子氏の言葉","dialect":"鵡川","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/鵡川","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.gshpa.chiba-u.jp/cas/Ainu-archives/","source_slug":"mukawa-dialect-dictionary-corpus"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"bible/rev/008#11","text":"ne nociw rehe anakne Incin ari a=porse ruwe ne: orowa, wakka re serke anakne incin ne a=kar; ayke, ne wakka kusu inne aynu raypa, ne wakka siw ne a=kar nisa ruwe ne kusu ne na.","translation":"この星の名は「苦よもぎ」といい、水の三分の一が苦よもぎのように苦くなって、そのために多くの人が死んだ。","collection":"アイヌ語訳新約聖書","document":"8","dialect":"北海道","dialect_path":"北海道","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.bible.com/versions/1944","source_slug":"ainu-new-testament"},{"sentence_id":"x-social/okokkoituren#2500","text":"ne nociu rehe anakne incin(Inchin) ari aporse ruwe ne.orowa watka re serke anakne incin ne akar. aike watka kusu inne ainu raipa. ne watka siu ne akan nisa ruwe ne kusu ne na.","translation":"ニガヨモギ。 ヨハネの黙示録8:11","collection":"アイヌ語ソーシャルメディアコーパス（X/Twitter）","document":"黒狐のシトゥンペ (@okokkoituren)","dialect":null,"dialect_path":null,"region":null,"uri":"https://x.com/okokkoituren/status/1790943271310721366","source_slug":null}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"biratori/012/003#517","text":"kohumumatki","translation":"鳴り轟く。","collection":"平取町アイヌ口承文芸","document":"ユカㇻ「アペサㇰスクㇷ゚ ワッカサㇰスクㇷ゚」ポイヤウンペ イソイタㇰ　火なしに育った、水なしに育った","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://ainugo.nam.go.jp/search/media?matCd=N012P&typeAudio=on","source_slug":"biratori-ainu-oral-literature"},{"sentence_id":"nabesawa/006#4","text":"kane sinta upsor orke a=osikiru kane sinta oroneanpe kohumumatki aynu mosir mosir kurkasi a=kosuototke rap=an ruwe ne.","translation":"金工の神駕【金のシンタの】是内より【中に】のり入りけり【私たちは乗り，】金工の神駕【金のシンタは】其れの如く【一緒になって】おとが立り【轟々と鳴り】アイヌ国の【人間の国】国の上へ【国土の上ヘ】我矢の如く【急降下し】下りけり【下りたのだ。】","collection":"鍋沢元蔵筆録ノート","document":"kamuyyukar-2","dialect":"沙流","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://minpaku.repo.nii.ac.jp/record/4895/files/SER134_04.pdf","source_slug":"nabesawa-motozo-notebooks"}]

column18: [{"sentence_id":"ainu-times/005/3#2","text":"…o-i (Siraoi) kotan ta an “Aynu Minzoku Hakubutukan” kor “intânetto hômu pêzi” (http://www.asahi-net.or.jp/~kt9m-ysd/) anak síno pirka p ne wa. oro ta a=kor konpyûta ani Ueda Tosi húci ye uepeker hawe ka a=nu easkay. néa hakubutukan poronno kor ikor, usa emusi ka usa tamasay ka usa imip ka usa sintoko ka, syasin a=nukar…","translation":"そこではいい話がたくさんあります。白老にある「アイヌ民族博物館」のインターネットホームページ (http://www.asashi-net.or.jp/~kt9m-ysd/) はほんとうにいいものですよ。そこではあなたがお持ちのコンピュータで上田トシフチが話すウエペケレの声もお聞きになることができます。その博物館がたくさん持っている宝物、いろいろなエムシもいろいろなタマサイもいろいろな衣服もいろいろなシントコも写真を見ることができます。","collection":"アイヌタイムズ","document":"intânetto","dialect":"沙流・千歳","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://otarunay.at-ninja.jp/taimuzu.html","source_slug":"ainu-times"},{"sentence_id":"zaidan-radio/2003/3/35#2","text":"KONPYUTA ku=kor rusuy","translation":"私はコンピュータが欲しい","collection":"アイヌ語ラジオ講座テキスト","document":"35","dialect":"平取町二風谷","dialect_path":"北海道/南西/沙流","region":"北海道","uri":"https://www.ff-ainu.or.jp/radio/files/03-3.pdf","source_slug":"ainu-radio-course"}]
